      state.showAllDevicesOnMap = true;
      state.userSelectedDeviceKey = false;
      state.hasCenteredOnCurrentLocation = false;
      state.autoFollowEnabled = false;
      state.pendingColdStartAllModeFit = true;
      removeMainCurrentArrowMarkerFromMap();
      clearAllFailsafeOverlays();
    }

    function ensureNativePhoneRegisteredBeforeTracking() {
      if (!isNativeAppContext()) {
        return;
      }
      var nativeKey = getNativePhoneDeviceKey();
      if (!nativeKey) {
        return;
      }
      if (typeof window.__capacitorSelectDevice === 'function') {
        window.__capacitorSelectDevice(nativeKey, { registerOnly: true });
      } else {
        enforceSelectedDeviceKey(nativeKey);
      }
    }

    function tryFitAllDevicesAfterColdStart() {
      if (!state.showAllDevicesOnMap || !state.pendingColdStartAllModeFit) {
        return false;
      }
      sanitizeLastKnownLatLngByDevice();
      const latLngs = allDeviceLatLngsForView();
      if (!latLngs.length) {
        return false;
      }
      state.pendingColdStartAllModeFit = false;
      fitAllDevicesOnMapAnimated(1.4);
      return true;
    }

    function nativePhoneUsesLocalDisplayOnly(deviceKey) {
      return isNativeAppContext() && isNativePhoneDeviceKey(deviceKey);
    }

    function setNativeFilteredHeadingDegrees(deviceKey, headingDeg) {
      var dk = String(deviceKey || getSelectedDeviceKey() || getNativePhoneDeviceKey() || '').trim();
      var nh = normalizeHeadingDegrees(headingDeg);
      if (!dk || nh === null) return null;
      state.lastHeadingDegreesByDeviceKey[dk] = nh;
      persistLastHeadingsToStorage();
      var selectedKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      if (!selectedKey || selectedKey === dk) {
        state.latestHeadingDegrees = nh;
        syncMapBearingFromHeading(nh);
      }
      return nh;
    }

    function applyNativeFilteredHeadingFromBridge(detail) {
      if (!isNativeAppContext() || !detail) return;
      var effective = detail.effective && typeof detail.effective === 'object' ? detail.effective : null;
      var effectiveHeading = normalizeHeadingDegrees(
        effective && effective.value != null ? effective.value : null
      );
      var compassHeading = normalizeHeadingDegrees(
        detail.filtered != null ? detail.filtered : detail.stable
      );
      var effectiveMode = effective && effective.mode
        ? String(effective.mode)
        : null;
      var prefersCompassForLiveMode = effectiveMode === 'walk' || effectiveMode === 'stationary';
      var effectiveSource = effective && effective.source
        ? String(effective.source)
        : (effectiveHeading !== null ? 'hold' : 'compass');
      var usesCompassForMap = prefersCompassForLiveMode && compassHeading !== null;
      var headingForMap = usesCompassForMap
        ? compassHeading
        : (effectiveHeading !== null ? effectiveHeading : compassHeading);
      var headingForMapSource = usesCompassForMap
        ? 'compass'
        : (effectiveHeading !== null ? effectiveSource : 'compass');
      var nativeKey = getNativePhoneDeviceKey();
      if (!nativeKey) return;
      if (state.showAllDevicesOnMap && headingForMapSource === 'compass' && !prefersCompassForLiveMode) {
        var rememberedHeading = effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(nativeKey, null);
        if (rememberedHeading !== null) {
          headingForMap = rememberedHeading;
          headingForMapSource = 'hold';
        }
      }
      if (headingForMap === null) return;
      var selectedKeyForHeading = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      var otEl = byId('otHeading');
      if (otEl && (!selectedKeyForHeading || selectedKeyForHeading === nativeKey)) {
        otEl.textContent = formatValue(headingForMap, '°') +
          (headingForMapSource ? ' (' + headingForMapSource + ')' : '');
      }
      setNativeFilteredHeadingDegrees(nativeKey, headingForMap);
      if (selectedKeyForHeading && selectedKeyForHeading !== nativeKey) return;
      if (!state.showAllDevicesOnMap && state.currentMarker) {
        updateCurrentPositionIcon(state.currentMarker, nativeKey, headingForMap);
      }
    }

    function bridgePointToPositionEntry(point) {
      var nativeKey = String((point && point.deviceKey) || getNativePhoneDeviceKey() || '').trim();
      if (!point || !nativeKey) return null;
      var parts = nativeKey.split('/');
      return {
        user: parts[0] || 'mobile',
        device: parts.slice(1).join('/') || 'phone',
        key: nativeKey,
        lat: point.lat,
        lon: point.lon,
        rawLat: point.rawLat,
        rawLon: point.rawLon,
        stationary: !!point.stationary,
        filters: point.filters || null,
        source: point.source || 'mobile_app',
        trackId: point.trackId || null,
        sequenceNumber: point.sequenceNumber != null ? point.sequenceNumber : null,
        routePoint: point.routePoint === true,
        final: point.final === true,
        liveSample: point.liveSample !== false,
        segmentId: point.segmentId != null ? point.segmentId : null,
        breakBefore: !!point.breakBefore,
        accuracy: point.accuracy,
        speed: point.speed,
        heading: point.heading,
        headingSource: point.headingSource || null,
        headingMode: point.headingMode || null,
        driveModeActive: point.driveModeActive === true,
        battery: point.battery,
        timestamp: point.timestamp || Date.now(),
        receivedAt: point.receivedAt || point.timestamp || Date.now()
      };
    }

    function getLastNativeBridgePositionEntry() {
      if (!isNativeAppContext()) return null;
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (!bridge || typeof bridge.getLastLocalPoint !== 'function') return null;
      var point = bridge.getLastLocalPoint();
      return bridgePointToPositionEntry(point);
    }

    function bootstrapNativeLocalDevice() {
      if (!isNativeAppContext()) return;
      var nativeKey = getNativePhoneDeviceKey();
      if (nativeKey) {
        if (state.userSelectedDeviceKey && typeof window.__capacitorSelectDevice === 'function') {
          window.__capacitorSelectDevice(nativeKey, { registerOnly: true });
        } else {
          enforceSelectedDeviceKey(nativeKey);
          state.selectedDeviceKey = nativeKey;
        }
      }
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (nativeKey && bridge && typeof bridge.getTrackingState === 'function') {
        var bridgeTrackingState = bridge.getTrackingState();
        if (bridgeTrackingState && bridgeTrackingState.active) {
          setLocalTrackingState(nativeKey, true, false);
        } else if (bridgeTrackingState && bridgeTrackingState.stoppedAt) {
          setLocalTrackingState(nativeKey, false, false);
        }
      }
      var point = bridge && typeof bridge.getLastLocalPoint === 'function'
        ? bridge.getLastLocalPoint()
        : null;
      if (point) {
        applyNativeLocalGpsPoint(point);
      } else {
        updateDeviceSwitcherUi();
        syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();
      }
    }

    function bootstrapCachedTrackingState() {
      var cachedDevices = loadCachedDeviceSnapshot();
      if (cachedDevices) {
        applyDeviceSnapshot(cachedDevices);
      }
      bootstrapNativeLocalDevice();
      updateDeviceSwitcherUi();
      syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();
      tryFitAllDevicesAfterColdStart();
      updateSelectedDeviceConnectionChip(getSelectedDeviceKey());
      applyLocalTrackingStateToUi(getSelectedDeviceKey());
    }

    async function applyNativeOfflineTrackingFallback(deviceKey) {
      if (!isNativeAppContext()) return false;
      var ownNativeKey = getNativePhoneDeviceKey();
      var nativeKey = String(deviceKey || ownNativeKey || '').trim();
      if (ownNativeKey && nativeKey && nativeKey !== ownNativeKey) return false;
      if (!nativeKey) return false;
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (bridge && typeof bridge.importNativeBufferedRoute === 'function') {
        try { await bridge.importNativeBufferedRoute(); } catch (error) {}
      }
      enforceSelectedDeviceKey(nativeKey);
      applyLocalTrackingStateToUi(nativeKey);
      var point = bridge && typeof bridge.getLastLocalPoint === 'function'
        ? bridge.getLastLocalPoint()
        : null;
      if (point) applyNativeLocalGpsPoint(point);
      var routeCount = getNativeLocalRoutePoints().filter(function (routePoint) {
        return routePoint && routePoint.routePoint !== false &&
          typeof routePoint.lat === 'number' && typeof routePoint.lon === 'number';
      }).length;
      var localReceivedByKey = readLocalJsonMap(LOCAL_RECEIVED_COUNT_STORAGE_KEY);
      updateDevicePointCounters(Number(localReceivedByKey[nativeKey] || 0), routeCount, nativeKey);
      updateSyncPendingCounter(getNativeQueueLength());
      if (state.showLatestTrackingRouteByKey[nativeKey]) {
        renderLatestTrackingRouteLineFromHistory(getNativeLocalRoutePoints(), null, nativeKey);
      }
      updateDeviceSwitcherUi();
      syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();
      updateSelectedDeviceConnectionChip(getSelectedDeviceKey());
      return true;
    }

    function positionEntryDeviceKey(entry) {
      if (!entry) return '';
      if (typeof entry.key === 'string' && entry.key.trim()) return entry.key.trim();
      if (typeof entry.user === 'string' && typeof entry.device === 'string' &&
        entry.user.trim() && entry.device.trim()) {
        return entry.user.trim() + '/' + entry.device.trim();
      }
      return '';
    }

    function nativeLiveDisplayLatLng(entry) {
      if (!entry || typeof entry.lat !== 'number' || typeof entry.lon !== 'number') return null;
      return coordinatesArePlausibleForMap(entry.lat, entry.lon) ? [entry.lat, entry.lon] : null;
    }

    function preparePositionEntryForMapDisplay(entry) {
      if (!entry) return entry;
      if (!isNativePhoneDeviceKey(positionEntryDeviceKey(entry))) {
        return fusePositionForMap(entry) || entry;
      }
      var ll = nativeLiveDisplayLatLng(entry);
      if (!ll) return entry;
      var prepared = Object.assign({}, entry, { lat: ll[0], lon: ll[1] });
      if (navigationRouteIsActive() && state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive) {
        var routePrepared = Object.assign({}, prepared, { rawLat: prepared.lat, rawLon: prepared.lon });
        var fused = fusePositionForMap(routePrepared, { allowStationaryHold: false }) || prepared;
        return Object.assign({}, fused, { rawLat: entry.rawLat, rawLon: entry.rawLon });
      }
      return prepared;
    }

    function applyLivePositionEntryToMap(activePosition) {
      if (!activePosition || !state.map ||
        typeof activePosition.lat !== 'number' || typeof activePosition.lon !== 'number') {
        return;
      }
      var selectedDeviceKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      var positionDeviceKey = positionEntryDeviceKey(activePosition);
      if (selectedDeviceKey && positionDeviceKey && selectedDeviceKey !== positionDeviceKey) {
        return;
      }
      activePosition = preparePositionEntryForMapDisplay(activePosition);
      if (state.showAllDevicesOnMap) {
        removeMainCurrentArrowMarkerFromMap();
      }
      var activeDeviceKey = selectedDeviceKey || activePosition.key || '';
      var deviceLabel = getHumanDeviceLabel(activeDeviceKey, activePosition);
      setTextIfPresent('device', deviceLabel);
      setTextIfPresent('lat', activePosition.lat);
      setTextIfPresent('lon', activePosition.lon);

      var currentLatLng = [activePosition.lat, activePosition.lon];
      var headingDeviceKey = selectedDeviceKey || activeDeviceKey || '';
      processNavigationRouteLiveUpdate(activePosition);

      // Den currentMarker zuerst sicherstellen, DANN das Heading aktualisieren
      // (sonst legt updateHeadingVisualization einen separaten Heading-Marker an
      // -> kurzzeitig zwei Standort-Marker) und ERST DANACH verschieben. So nutzt
      // das Follow-easeTo die frische Fahrtrichtung (kein Bearing-Versatz).
      var hadCurrentMarker = !state.showAllDevicesOnMap && !!state.currentMarker;
      if (!state.showAllDevicesOnMap && !state.currentMarker) {
        var effInit = effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(headingDeviceKey, normalizeHeadingDegrees(activePosition.heading));
        state.currentMarker = L.marker(currentLatLng, {
          icon: createCurrentPositionIcon(selectedDeviceKey || '', effInit),
          zIndexOffset: 2000,
          rotateWithView: facingMarkerRotateWithViewOption(),
          rotation: 0
        }).addTo(state.map);
        state.currentMarker.bindPopup('Aktuelle Position');
      }
      updateHeadingVisualization(activePosition, currentLatLng);
      if (hadCurrentMarker) {
        animateCurrentMarkerTo(
          currentLatLng,
          activePosition.timestamp,
          nativePhoneUsesLocalDisplayOnly(selectedDeviceKey || activeDeviceKey),
          activePosition
        );
      }
      state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng = [activePosition.lat, activePosition.lon];
      if (selectedDeviceKey && coordinatesArePlausibleForMap(activePosition.lat, activePosition.lon)) {
        state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice[selectedDeviceKey] = [activePosition.lat, activePosition.lon];
        updateLatestTrackingRouteTailVisualToLatLng(selectedDeviceKey, activePosition.lat, activePosition.lon);
      }
      if (state.showAllDevicesOnMap) {
        syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();
        tryFitAllDevicesAfterColdStart();
      } else {
        followSelectedDeviceOnMapIfArmed(currentLatLng);
      }
      fillOwntracksDetailPanel(activePosition);
    }

    function applyNativeServerUploadAck(detail) {
      if (!detail) return;
      var deviceKey = String(detail.deviceKey || getNativePhoneDeviceKey() || '').trim();
      if (!deviceKey) return;
      var receivedAt = Number(detail.receivedAt) || Date.now();
      if (state.devicesByKey[deviceKey]) {
        state.devicesByKey[deviceKey].receivedAt = receivedAt;
      }
      var uploadedCount = Number(detail.count || 0);
      if (uploadedCount > 0) {
        var receivedByKey = readLocalJsonMap(LOCAL_RECEIVED_COUNT_STORAGE_KEY);
        var lastByKey = readLocalJsonMap(LOCAL_RECEIVED_LAST_KEY_STORAGE_KEY);
        var eventKey = [
          detail.kind || 'transport',
          detail.transport || '',
          receivedAt,
          uploadedCount,
          detail.sequenceNumber != null ? detail.sequenceNumber : ''
        ].join('|');
        if (lastByKey[deviceKey] !== eventKey) {
          receivedByKey[deviceKey] = Number(receivedByKey[deviceKey] || 0) + uploadedCount;
          lastByKey[deviceKey] = eventKey;
          writeLocalJsonMap(LOCAL_RECEIVED_COUNT_STORAGE_KEY, receivedByKey);
          writeLocalJsonMap(LOCAL_RECEIVED_LAST_KEY_STORAGE_KEY, lastByKey);
        }
      }
      if (uploadedCount > 0 && getSelectedDeviceKey() === deviceKey) {
        var currentReceived = Number(readLocalJsonMap(LOCAL_RECEIVED_COUNT_STORAGE_KEY)[deviceKey] || 0);
        var currentRoute = getNativeLocalRoutePoints().filter(function (routePoint) {
          return routePoint && routePoint.routePoint !== false &&
            typeof routePoint.lat === 'number' && typeof routePoint.lon === 'number';
        }).length;
        updateDevicePointCounters(
          Number.isFinite(currentReceived) ? currentReceived : 0,
          Number.isFinite(currentRoute) ? currentRoute : 0,
          deviceKey
        );
        updateSyncPendingCounter(getNativeQueueLength());
      }
      tryClearForcedDisconnectAfterFreshPoint(deviceKey, state.devicesByKey[deviceKey]);
      updateSelectedDeviceConnectionChip(getSelectedDeviceKey());
    }

    function applyNativeBridgeTransportState(detail) {
      if (!detail || !isNativeAppContext()) return;
      var deviceKey = String(detail.deviceKey || getNativePhoneDeviceKey() || '').trim();
      if (!deviceKey) return;
      if (typeof window.__capacitorSelectDevice === 'function') {
        window.__capacitorSelectDevice(deviceKey, { registerOnly: true });
      } else if (!state.devicesByKey[deviceKey]) {
        var parts = deviceKey.split('/');
        state.devicesByKey[deviceKey] = {
          user: parts[0] || 'mobile',
          device: parts.slice(1).join('/') || 'phone',
          key: deviceKey,
          lat: null,
          lon: null
        };
        syncOrderedDeviceKeysFromKnownDevices();
      }
      state.localTransportStatusByDeviceKey[connectionStatusKeyForDevice(deviceKey)] = {
        connected: !!detail.connected,
        connecting: !!detail.connecting,
        serverConfigured: detail.serverConfigured !== false,
        serverUploadEnabled: detail.serverUploadEnabled !== false,
        updatedAt: Number(detail.updatedAt) || Date.now()
      };
      setServerUploadButtonState(detail.serverUploadEnabled !== false, 'transport');
      if (!state.userSelectedDeviceKey) state.selectedDeviceKey = deviceKey;
      updateDeviceSwitcherUi();
      syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();
      updateSelectedDeviceConnectionChip(getSelectedDeviceKey());
    }

    function applyNativeLocalGpsPoint(point) {
      if (!point || !isNativeAppContext()) return;
      var nativeKey = String(point.deviceKey || getNativePhoneDeviceKey() || '').trim();
      if (!nativeKey) return;
      state.lastNativeLocalGpsMs = Date.now();
      var entry = updateNativePhoneLocalState(point);
      if (!entry) return;
      updateNativeLocalPointCounters(point);
      if (point.routePoint === true && state.showLatestTrackingRouteByKey[nativeKey]) {
        scheduleLatestTrackingRouteRender(nativeKey);
      }
      if (state.showAllDevicesOnMap) {
        syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();
        tryFitAllDevicesAfterColdStart();
        updateSelectedDeviceConnectionChip(getSelectedDeviceKey());
        if (getSelectedDeviceKey() === nativeKey) {
          fillOwntracksDetailPanel(state.devicesByKey[nativeKey]);
        }
        return;
      }
      if (getSelectedDeviceKey() === nativeKey) {
        applyLivePositionEntryToMap(entry);
      }
    }

    var nativeLiveGpsUiBound = false;

    function initNativeLiveGpsUi() {
      if (nativeLiveGpsUiBound) return;
      if (!isNativeAppContext()) return;
      nativeLiveGpsUiBound = true;
      window.addEventListener('capacitor-gps-point', function (event) {
        if (!event || !event.detail) return;
        applyNativeLocalGpsPoint(event.detail);
      });
      window.addEventListener('capacitor-device-ready', function (event) {
        var detail = event && event.detail ? event.detail : {};
        var deviceKey = String(detail.deviceKey || getNativePhoneDeviceKey() || '').trim();
        if (!deviceKey) return;
        window.__capacitorSelectDevice(deviceKey, { registerOnly: true, force: true });
        bootstrapNativeLocalDevice();
      });
      window.addEventListener('capacitor-points-uploaded', function (event) {
        applyNativeServerUploadAck(event && event.detail);
      });
      window.addEventListener('capacitor-live-sent', function (event) {
        applyNativeServerUploadAck(event && event.detail);
      });
      window.addEventListener('capacitor-bridge-transport', function (event) {
        applyNativeBridgeTransportState(event && event.detail);
      });
      window.addEventListener('capacitor-tracking-state', function (event) {
        var detail = event && event.detail ? event.detail : {};
        var nativeKey = String(detail.deviceKey || getNativePhoneDeviceKey() || '').trim();
        if (!nativeKey) return;
        setLocalTrackingState(nativeKey, !!detail.active, false);
        if (getSelectedDeviceKey() === nativeKey) {
          state.trackingEnabled = !!detail.active;
          updateTrackingButtonLabel();
          updateTrackingStatusChip();
          if (!detail.active) {
            removeFailsafeReturnMarker();
            removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine();
            delete state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey[nativeKey];
            state.shouldAutoFitTrackLine = false;
            state.autoFollowResumeArmed = false;
            clearAutoFollowResumeTimer();
            markTrackingRouteGapActive(nativeKey);
            updateTrackingRouteButtonLabel();
          }
        }
      });
      window.addEventListener('capacitor-sync-queue', function (event) {
        var detail = event && event.detail ? event.detail : {};
        var nativeKey = String(detail.deviceKey || getNativePhoneDeviceKey() || '').trim();
        if (!nativeKey || getSelectedDeviceKey() === nativeKey) updateSyncPendingCounter(detail.pending);
      });
      window.addEventListener('capacitor-local-route-reset', function (event) {
        var detail = event && event.detail ? event.detail : {};
        var nativeKey = String(detail.deviceKey || getNativePhoneDeviceKey() || '').trim();
        if (nativeKey && getSelectedDeviceKey() === nativeKey) {
          state.trackingEnabled = false;
          updateTrackingButtonLabel();
          updateTrackingStatusChip();
          updateDevicePointCounters(0, 0, nativeKey);
          updateSyncPendingCounter(0);
        }
        if (nativeKey) {
          setLocalTrackingState(nativeKey, false, false);
          delete state.showLatestTrackingRouteByKey[nativeKey];
          removeLatestTrackingRouteLine(nativeKey);
          updateTrackingRouteButtonLabel();
        }
      });
      window.addEventListener('capacitor-tracking-command', function (event) {
        handleRemoteTrackingCommand(event && event.detail);
      });
      window.addEventListener('capacitor-heading-filter-debug', function (event) {
        applyNativeFilteredHeadingFromBridge(event && event.detail);
        var bodyEl = byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterBody');
        if (bodyEl && !bodyEl.classList.contains('hidden')) {
          updateHeadingFilterLivePanel(event && event.detail);
        }
      });
      bootstrapNativeLocalDevice();
    }

    function withVectorRenderer(layerOptions) {
      return Object.assign({}, layerOptions, { renderer: state.vectorRenderer });
    }

    function blockManualMapRotationControls(mapInstance) {
      const mapContainerElement = mapInstance && typeof mapInstance.getContainer === 'function'
        ? mapInstance.getContainer()
        : null;
      if (!mapContainerElement) {
        return;
      }
      const blockRotateControlEvent = function (domEvent) {
        if (!domEvent || !domEvent.target || typeof domEvent.target.closest !== 'function') {
          return;
        }
        if (!domEvent.target.closest('.leaflet-control-rotate')) {
          return;
        }
        if (typeof domEvent.preventDefault === 'function') {
          domEvent.preventDefault();
        }
        if (typeof domEvent.stopImmediatePropagation === 'function') {
          domEvent.stopImmediatePropagation();
        } else if (typeof domEvent.stopPropagation === 'function') {
          domEvent.stopPropagation();
        }
      };
      [
        'click',
        'dblclick',
        'mousedown',
        'mouseup',
        'pointerdown',
        'pointerup',
        'touchstart',
        'touchmove',
        'touchend'
      ].forEach(function (eventName) {
        mapContainerElement.addEventListener(eventName, blockRotateControlEvent, true);
      });
    }

    function initMap() {
      const selectedBaseMapStyle = localStorage.getItem('selectedBaseMapStyle');
      if (selectedBaseMapStyle && BASE_MAP_STYLES[selectedBaseMapStyle]) {
        state.currentBaseMapStyle = selectedBaseMapStyle;
      }
      const initialStyleConfig = BASE_MAP_STYLES[state.currentBaseMapStyle] || BASE_MAP_STYLES.light;
      state.vectorRenderer = L.svg({ padding: 0.5 });
      state.map = L.map('map', {
        style: resolveBaseMapStyleUrl(initialStyleConfig),
        zoomControl: false,
        preferCanvas: false,
        renderer: state.vectorRenderer,
        rotate: true,
        touchRotate: false,
        shiftKeyRotate: false,
        bearing: 0,
        rotateControl: { closeOnZeroBearing: false, position: 'topright' },
        dragging: true,
        inertia: true,
        inertiaDeceleration: 1400,
        inertiaMaxSpeed: 4000,
        easeLinearity: 0.25,
        worldCopyJump: false,
        maxBounds: [[-85.0511, -180], [85.0511, 180]],
        maxBoundsViscosity: 1.0,
        minZoom: 2,
        maxZoom: NAV_NAVIGATION_CLOSE_ZOOM,
        bounceAtZoomLimits: true,
        touchZoom: true,
        tap: false,
        tapTolerance: 30,
        tapHold: false,
        zoomSnap: 0.25,
        zoomDelta: 1,
        wheelPxPerZoomLevel: 40,
        wheelDebounceTime: 20,
        fadeAnimation: false,
        zoomAnimation: true,
        zoomAnimationThreshold: 19,
        markerZoomAnimation: true
      }).setView([52.52, 13.4], 6);
      L.control.zoom({ position: 'topright' }).addTo(state.map);

      const markUserInteraction = function (mapEvent) {
        if (state.suppressMapInteractionForAutoBearing) {
          return;
        }
        if (mapEvent && mapEvent.originalEvent == null) {
          return;
        }
        if (pauseNavigationAutoViewForManualInteraction()) {
          return;
        }
        disableAutoFollowTemporarilyByUserInteraction();
        state.userHasInteractedWithMap = true;
        state.shouldAutoFitTrackLine = false;
      };
      state.map.on('zoomstart', function (mapEvent) { state.mapZoomGestureInProgress = true; markUserInteraction(mapEvent); });
      state.map.on('zoomend', function () {
        state.mapZoomGestureInProgress = false;
        const p = state.navigationRouteTrimPendingLatLng;
        state.navigationRouteTrimPendingLatLng = null;
        if (p && navigationRouteIsActive()) updateNavigationRouteRemainingForLatLng(p[0], p[1]);
      });
      state.map.on('dragstart', markUserInteraction);
      state.map.on('rotate', markUserInteraction);
      state.map.on('rotate rotateend rotatestart load viewreset', scheduleBearingMarkerSync);
      state.map.on('zoom zoomend', scheduleNavigationRouteTurnArrowZoomSync);
      state.map.on('load style.load styledata idle', scheduleOfflineRegionOverlayRefresh);
      state.map.on('zoomend moveend', scheduleOfflineRegionOverlayRefresh);
      scheduleOfflineRegionOverlayRefresh({ reason: 'map.init' });
      scheduleBearingMarkerSync();

      state.map.on('rotatestart', function () {
        state.map.options.inertia = false;
      });
      state.map.on('rotateend', function () {
        state.map.options.inertia = true;
      });
      const mapContainerElement = state.map.getContainer();
      if (mapContainerElement) {
        const handleNavigationManualActivity = function () {
          return pauseNavigationAutoViewForManualInteraction();
        };
        const handleZoomControlInteraction = function (domEvent) {
          if (domEvent && domEvent.target && typeof domEvent.target.closest === 'function' &&
            domEvent.target.closest('.leaflet-control-zoom-in, .leaflet-control-zoom-out')) {
            if (!handleNavigationManualActivity()) disableAutoFollowTemporarilyByUserInteraction();
          }
        };
        const handleMapInteraction = function (domEvent) {
          if (domEvent && domEvent.target && typeof domEvent.target.closest === 'function') {
            if (domEvent.target.closest('.leaflet-control-zoom-in, .leaflet-control-zoom-out')) {
              if (!handleNavigationManualActivity()) disableAutoFollowTemporarilyByUserInteraction();
              return;
            }
            if (domEvent.target.closest('.leaflet-control')) {
              return;
            }
            if (domEvent.type === 'touchstart' && domEvent.touches && domEvent.touches.length >= 2) {
              if (!handleNavigationManualActivity()) {
                disableAutoFollowTemporarilyByUserInteraction();
              }
              return;
            }
          }
          if (handleNavigationManualActivity()) {
            return;
          }
          disableAutoFollowTemporarilyByUserInteraction();
        };
        const handleNavigationZoomActivity = function (domEvent) {
          if (domEvent && domEvent.type === 'pointermove' && !(domEvent.buttons > 0)) {
            return;
          }
          if (domEvent && domEvent.type === 'touchmove' &&
            (!domEvent.touches || domEvent.touches.length < 2)) {
            return;
          }
          if (!handleNavigationManualActivity()) disableAutoFollowTemporarilyByUserInteraction();
        };
        mapContainerElement.addEventListener('pointerdown', handleMapInteraction, { passive: true });
        mapContainerElement.addEventListener('touchstart', handleMapInteraction, { passive: true });
        mapContainerElement.addEventListener('pointermove', handleNavigationZoomActivity, { passive: true });
        mapContainerElement.addEventListener('touchmove', handleNavigationZoomActivity, { passive: true });
        mapContainerElement.addEventListener('wheel', handleNavigationZoomActivity, { passive: true });
        mapContainerElement.addEventListener('click', handleZoomControlInteraction, { passive: true });
      }

      attachMapClickGestures(state.map);

      attachZoomInertia(state.map);
      attachRotatedRendererSync(state.map, state.vectorRenderer);
      blockManualMapRotationControls(state.map);
    }

    function updateMapStyleButtonState() {
      const mapStyleToggleButton = byId('mapStyleToggleBtn');
      if (!mapStyleToggleButton) return;
      const currentStyleConfig = getBaseMapStyleConfigById(state.currentBaseMapStyle);
      const nextStyleId = getNextBaseMapStyleId(state.currentBaseMapStyle);
      const nextStyleConfig = getBaseMapStyleConfigById(nextStyleId);
      mapStyleToggleButton.classList.remove('active');
      const tooltipText = 'Karte: ' + currentStyleConfig.label + ' \u2192 Klick: ' + nextStyleConfig.label;
      mapStyleToggleButton.title = tooltipText;
      mapStyleToggleButton.setAttribute('aria-label', tooltipText);
      mapStyleToggleButton.dataset.styleId = currentStyleConfig.id;
    }

    function waitForMapStyleLoad(token, styleConfig) {
      return new Promise(function (resolve, reject) {
        const nativeMap = state.map && state.map._native;
        if (!nativeMap || typeof nativeMap.once !== 'function') {
          resolve(true);
          return;
        }
        let settled = false;
        const cleanup = function () {
          try { nativeMap.off('style.load', onStyleLoad); } catch (_) {}
          try { nativeMap.off('error', onStyleError); } catch (_) {}
          clearTimeout(timerId);
        };
        const finish = function (ok, error) {
          if (settled || token !== state.mapStyleChangeToken) return;
          settled = true;
          cleanup();
          if (ok) resolve(true);
          else reject(error || new Error('Kartenstil konnte nicht geladen werden.'));
        };
        const onStyleLoad = function () { finish(true); };
        const onStyleError = function (event) {
          const errorMessage = String(event && event.error && event.error.message || event && event.error || '');
          const styleUrlPart = styleConfig && styleConfig.mapId ? String(styleConfig.mapId) : '';
          if (!styleUrlPart || errorMessage.indexOf(styleUrlPart) >= 0 || errorMessage.toLowerCase().indexOf('style') >= 0) {
            finish(false, event && event.error ? event.error : new Error(errorMessage || 'Kartenstil konnte nicht geladen werden.'));
          }
        };
        const timerId = setTimeout(function () {
          finish(false, new Error('Kartenstil-Timeout: ' + (styleConfig && styleConfig.label || '')));
        }, 8000);
        try { nativeMap.once('style.load', onStyleLoad); } catch (_) { finish(true); }
        try { nativeMap.on('error', onStyleError); } catch (_) {}
      });
    }

    function restoreOfflineRegionOverlayAfterStyleChange() {
      state.offlineRegionOverlayHash = '';
      scheduleOfflineRegionOverlayRefresh({ reason: 'style.restore' });
      setTimeout(function () { scheduleOfflineRegionOverlayRefresh({ reason: 'style.restore.250ms' }); }, 250);
      setTimeout(function () { scheduleOfflineRegionOverlayRefresh({ reason: 'style.restore.900ms' }); }, 900);
    }

    async function applyBaseMapStyle(styleId, options) {
      if (!state.map) return;
      options = options || {};
      const nextStyleConfig = BASE_MAP_STYLES[styleId] || BASE_MAP_STYLES[DEFAULT_BASE_MAP_STYLE_ID];
      if (!nextStyleConfig) return;
      const token = ++state.mapStyleChangeToken;
      state.currentBaseMapStyle = nextStyleConfig.id;
      updateMapStyleButtonState();
      try {
        const styleLoadPromise = waitForMapStyleLoad(token, nextStyleConfig);
        state.map.setStyle(resolveBaseMapStyleUrl(nextStyleConfig), { diff: false });
        restoreOfflineRegionOverlayAfterStyleChange();
        await styleLoadPromise;
        try { localStorage.setItem('selectedBaseMapStyle', nextStyleConfig.id); } catch (_) {}
        restoreOfflineRegionOverlayAfterStyleChange();
      } catch (error) {
        if (token !== state.mapStyleChangeToken) return;
        console.warn('Kartenstil fehlgeschlagen, Standard wird geladen:', error);
        logServerFallback('map style fallback', nextStyleConfig.label || nextStyleConfig.id);
        if (!options.fallback) {
          await applyBaseMapStyle(DEFAULT_BASE_MAP_STYLE_ID, { fallback: true });
          return;
        }
        const fallbackConfig = BASE_MAP_STYLES[DEFAULT_BASE_MAP_STYLE_ID];
        state.currentBaseMapStyle = DEFAULT_BASE_MAP_STYLE_ID;
        updateMapStyleButtonState();
        try {
          state.map.setStyle(buildRasterFallbackStyle(fallbackConfig), { diff: false });
          try { localStorage.setItem('selectedBaseMapStyle', DEFAULT_BASE_MAP_STYLE_ID); } catch (_) {}
          restoreOfflineRegionOverlayAfterStyleChange();
        } catch (fallbackError) {
          console.warn('Standard-Kartenstil konnte nicht geladen werden:', fallbackError);
          restoreOfflineRegionOverlayAfterStyleChange();
        }
      }
    }

    function toggleMapStyle() {
      if (!state.map) return;
      const nextStyleId = getNextBaseMapStyleId(state.currentBaseMapStyle);
      applyBaseMapStyle(nextStyleId).catch(function (error) {
        console.warn('Kartenstil konnte nicht gewechselt werden:', error);
      });
    }

    const OFFLINE_REGION_OVERLAY_SOURCE_ID = 'offline-region-boundaries';
    const OFFLINE_REGION_OVERLAY_FILL_LAYER_ID = 'offline-region-boundaries-fill';
    const OFFLINE_REGION_OVERLAY_LINE_LAYER_ID = 'offline-region-boundaries-line';

    function normalizeOfflineRegionBounds(bounds) {
      if (!bounds || typeof bounds !== 'object') return null;
      const north = Number(bounds.north);
      const south = Number(bounds.south);
      const east = Number(bounds.east);
      const west = Number(bounds.west);
      if (![north, south, east, west].every(Number.isFinite)) return null;
      if (north <= south || east === west) return null;
      return {
        north: Math.min(85.0511, Math.max(-85.0511, north)),
        south: Math.min(85.0511, Math.max(-85.0511, south)),
        east: Math.min(180, Math.max(-180, east)),
        west: Math.min(180, Math.max(-180, west))
      };
    }

    function offlineOverlayCoordinateIsValid(coord) {
      return Array.isArray(coord) &&
        coord.length >= 2 &&
        Number.isFinite(Number(coord[0])) &&
        Number.isFinite(Number(coord[1])) &&
        Number(coord[1]) >= -85.0511 &&
        Number(coord[1]) <= 85.0511 &&
        Number(coord[0]) >= -180 &&
        Number(coord[0]) <= 180;
    }

    function offlineOverlayCloseRing(ring) {
      if (!Array.isArray(ring) || ring.length < 3) return null;
      const clean = ring.map(function (coord) {
        return offlineOverlayCoordinateIsValid(coord) ? [Number(coord[0]), Number(coord[1])] : null;
      }).filter(Boolean);
      if (clean.length < 3) return null;
      const first = clean[0];
      const last = clean[clean.length - 1];
      if (first[0] !== last[0] || first[1] !== last[1]) clean.push(first.slice());
      return clean.length >= 4 ? clean : null;
    }

    function normalizeOfflineOverlayPolygonCoordinates(coordinates) {
      if (!Array.isArray(coordinates) || !coordinates.length) return null;
      const rings = [];
      coordinates.forEach(function (ring) {
        const cleanRing = offlineOverlayCloseRing(ring);
        if (cleanRing) rings.push(cleanRing);
      });
      return rings.length ? rings : null;
    }

    function normalizeOfflineOverlayGeoJsonGeometry(input) {
      if (Array.isArray(input)) {
        const polygonFromArray = normalizeOfflineOverlayPolygonCoordinates(
          offlineOverlayCoordinateIsValid(input[0]) ? [input] : input
        );
        return polygonFromArray ? { type: 'Polygon', coordinates: polygonFromArray } : null;
      }
      if (!input || typeof input !== 'object') return null;
      if (input.type === 'FeatureCollection' && Array.isArray(input.features)) {
        const polygons = [];
        input.features.forEach(function (feature) {
          const geometry = normalizeOfflineOverlayGeoJsonGeometry(feature);
          if (!geometry) return;
          if (geometry.type === 'Polygon') polygons.push(geometry.coordinates);
          else if (geometry.type === 'MultiPolygon') geometry.coordinates.forEach(function (polygon) { polygons.push(polygon); });
        });
        return polygons.length ? { type: 'MultiPolygon', coordinates: polygons } : null;
      }
      const rawGeometry = input.type === 'Feature' ? input.geometry : input;
      if (!rawGeometry || typeof rawGeometry !== 'object') return null;
      if (rawGeometry.type === 'Polygon') {
        const polygon = normalizeOfflineOverlayPolygonCoordinates(rawGeometry.coordinates);
        return polygon ? { type: 'Polygon', coordinates: polygon } : null;
      }
      if (rawGeometry.type === 'MultiPolygon') {
        const polygons = (Array.isArray(rawGeometry.coordinates) ? rawGeometry.coordinates : [])
          .map(normalizeOfflineOverlayPolygonCoordinates)
          .filter(Boolean);
        return polygons.length ? { type: 'MultiPolygon', coordinates: polygons } : null;
      }
      return null;
    }

    function offlineOverlayBoundsFromGeometry(geometry) {
      if (!geometry || !Array.isArray(geometry.coordinates)) return null;
      const bounds = { north: -90, south: 90, east: -180, west: 180 };
      let found = false;
      const visit = function (value) {
        if (!Array.isArray(value)) return;
        if (offlineOverlayCoordinateIsValid(value)) {
          const lon = Number(value[0]);
          const lat = Number(value[1]);
          bounds.north = Math.max(bounds.north, lat);
          bounds.south = Math.min(bounds.south, lat);
          bounds.east = Math.max(bounds.east, lon);
          bounds.west = Math.min(bounds.west, lon);
          found = true;
          return;
        }
        value.forEach(visit);
      };
      visit(geometry.coordinates);
      return found ? normalizeOfflineRegionBounds(bounds) : null;
    }

    function normalizeOfflineOverlayRouteCoords(routeCoords) {
      return (Array.isArray(routeCoords) ? routeCoords : []).map(function (coord) {
        if (Array.isArray(coord) && coord.length >= 2) {
          const a = Number(coord[0]);
          const b = Number(coord[1]);
          if (!Number.isFinite(a) || !Number.isFinite(b)) return null;
          if (Math.abs(a) <= 85.0511 && Math.abs(b) <= 180) return [a, b];
          return [b, a];
        }
        if (coord && typeof coord === 'object') {
          const lat = Number(coord.lat);
          const lon = Number(coord.lon != null ? coord.lon : coord.lng);
          return Number.isFinite(lat) && Number.isFinite(lon) ? [lat, lon] : null;
        }
        return null;
      }).filter(function (coord) {
        return coord && coord[0] >= -85.0511 && coord[0] <= 85.0511 && coord[1] >= -180 && coord[1] <= 180;
      });
    }

    function offlineOverlayRouteCoordsFromGeometry(geometry) {
      if (!geometry || !Array.isArray(geometry.coordinates)) return [];
      if (geometry.type === 'LineString') {
        return normalizeOfflineOverlayRouteCoords(geometry.coordinates.map(function (coord) {
          return Array.isArray(coord) && coord.length >= 2 ? [Number(coord[1]), Number(coord[0])] : null;
        }));
      }
      if (geometry.type === 'MultiLineString') {
        const result = [];
        geometry.coordinates.forEach(function (line) {
          normalizeOfflineOverlayRouteCoords((Array.isArray(line) ? line : []).map(function (coord) {
            return Array.isArray(coord) && coord.length >= 2 ? [Number(coord[1]), Number(coord[0])] : null;
          })).forEach(function (coord) { result.push(coord); });
        });
        return result;
      }
      return [];
    }

    function offlineOverlayRouteCoordsFromRegion(region) {
      if (!region || typeof region !== 'object') return [];
      const directCoords = normalizeOfflineOverlayRouteCoords(region.routeCoords || region.coordinates || region.path);
      if (directCoords.length >= 2) return directCoords;
      const routeGeometry = region.route && region.route.geometry ? region.route.geometry : (region.routeGeometry || null);
      const geometryCoords = offlineOverlayRouteCoordsFromGeometry(routeGeometry);
      if (geometryCoords.length >= 2) return geometryCoords;
      return [];
    }

    function offlineOverlaySampleRouteCoords(coords, maxPoints) {
      const list = Array.isArray(coords) ? coords : [];
      const max = Math.max(12, Number(maxPoints) || 120);
      if (list.length <= max) return list.slice();
      const step = Math.ceil(list.length / max);
      const sampled = [];
      for (let i = 0; i < list.length; i += step) sampled.push(list[i]);
      const last = list[list.length - 1];
      if (sampled[sampled.length - 1] !== last) sampled.push(last);
      return sampled;
    }

    function offlineOverlayCorridorGeometryFromRouteCoords(coords, corridorMeters) {
      const sampled = offlineOverlaySampleRouteCoords(normalizeOfflineOverlayRouteCoords(coords), 140);
      if (sampled.length < 2) return null;
      const latRef = sampled.reduce(function (sum, coord) { return sum + coord[0]; }, 0) / sampled.length;
      const metersPerDegLat = 111320;
      const metersPerDegLon = Math.max(1, 111320 * Math.cos(latRef * Math.PI / 180));
      const radiusMeters = Math.max(80, Math.min(10000, Number(corridorMeters) || 2000));
      const projected = sampled.map(function (coord) {
        return {
          x: coord[1] * metersPerDegLon,
          y: coord[0] * metersPerDegLat
        };
      });
      const left = [];
      const right = [];
      for (let i = 0; i < projected.length; i += 1) {
        const prev = projected[Math.max(0, i - 1)];
        const next = projected[Math.min(projected.length - 1, i + 1)];
        let dx = next.x - prev.x;
        let dy = next.y - prev.y;
        const len = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
        if (!len) continue;
        dx /= len;
        dy /= len;
        const nx = -dy;
        const ny = dx;
        const point = projected[i];
        left.push([(point.x + nx * radiusMeters) / metersPerDegLon, (point.y + ny * radiusMeters) / metersPerDegLat]);
        right.push([(point.x - nx * radiusMeters) / metersPerDegLon, (point.y - ny * radiusMeters) / metersPerDegLat]);
      }
      if (left.length < 2 || right.length < 2) return null;
      const ring = offlineOverlayCloseRing(left.concat(right.reverse()));
      return ring ? { type: 'Polygon', coordinates: [ring] } : null;
    }

    function offlineRegionGeometryFromRecord(region) {
      if (!region || typeof region !== 'object') return null;
      const geometryFields = [
        region.geometry,
        region.coverageGeometry,
        region.planGeometry,
        region.outlineGeometry,
        region.polygon,
        region.outline
      ];
      for (let i = 0; i < geometryFields.length; i += 1) {
        const geometry = normalizeOfflineOverlayGeoJsonGeometry(geometryFields[i]);
        if (geometry) return { geometry: geometry, shape: 'geometry' };
        const lineCoords = offlineOverlayRouteCoordsFromGeometry(geometryFields[i]);
        if (lineCoords.length >= 2) {
          const corridorFromLine = offlineOverlayCorridorGeometryFromRouteCoords(lineCoords, region.corridorMeters);
          if (corridorFromLine) return { geometry: corridorFromLine, shape: 'corridor' };
        }
      }
      const routeCoords = offlineOverlayRouteCoordsFromRegion(region);
      if (routeCoords.length >= 2) {
        const corridorGeometry = offlineOverlayCorridorGeometryFromRouteCoords(routeCoords, region.corridorMeters);
        if (corridorGeometry) return { geometry: corridorGeometry, shape: 'corridor' };
      }
      return null;
    }

    function offlineRegionFeature(region) {
      const geometryResult = offlineRegionGeometryFromRecord(region);
      const bounds = normalizeOfflineRegionBounds(region && region.bounds) ||
        (geometryResult ? offlineOverlayBoundsFromGeometry(geometryResult.geometry) : null);
      if (!bounds && !geometryResult) return null;
      const geometry = geometryResult ? geometryResult.geometry : {
        type: 'Polygon',
        coordinates: [[
          [bounds.west, bounds.south],
          [bounds.east, bounds.south],
          [bounds.east, bounds.north],
          [bounds.west, bounds.north],
          [bounds.west, bounds.south]
        ]]
      };
      return {
        type: 'Feature',
        properties: {
          id: String(region.id || ''),
          name: String(region.name || 'Offline-Region'),
          bounds: JSON.stringify(bounds),
          shape: geometryResult ? geometryResult.shape : 'bounds',
          ready: region.ready === false ? 0 : 1
        },
        geometry: geometry
      };
    }

    function offlineRegionOverlayFeatureCollection(regions) {
      return {
        type: 'FeatureCollection',
        features: (Array.isArray(regions) ? regions : []).map(offlineRegionFeature).filter(Boolean)
      };
    }

    function bindOfflineRegionOverlayClick(nativeMap) {
      if (!nativeMap || state.offlineRegionOverlayClickBound) return;
      state.offlineRegionOverlayClickBound = true;
      try {
        nativeMap.on('click', OFFLINE_REGION_OVERLAY_FILL_LAYER_ID, function (event) {
          const feature = event && event.features && event.features[0];
          if (!feature || !feature.properties || !feature.properties.bounds) return;
          let bounds = null;
          try { bounds = JSON.parse(feature.properties.bounds); } catch (_) { bounds = null; }
          bounds = normalizeOfflineRegionBounds(bounds);
          if (!bounds) return;
          nativeMap.fitBounds([[bounds.west, bounds.south], [bounds.east, bounds.north]], {
            padding: 42,
            duration: 650,
            essential: true
          });
        });
        nativeMap.on('mouseenter', OFFLINE_REGION_OVERLAY_FILL_LAYER_ID, function () {
          try { nativeMap.getCanvas().style.cursor = 'pointer'; } catch (_) {}
        });
        nativeMap.on('mouseleave', OFFLINE_REGION_OVERLAY_FILL_LAYER_ID, function () {
          try { nativeMap.getCanvas().style.cursor = ''; } catch (_) {}
        });
      } catch (_) {}
    }

    function ensureOfflineRegionOverlayLayers(nativeMap) {
      if (!nativeMap || typeof nativeMap.getStyle !== 'function') return false;
      try {
        if (!nativeMap.getStyle()) return false;
        if (!nativeMap.getSource(OFFLINE_REGION_OVERLAY_SOURCE_ID)) {
          nativeMap.addSource(OFFLINE_REGION_OVERLAY_SOURCE_ID, {
            type: 'geojson',
            data: { type: 'FeatureCollection', features: [] }
          });
          state.offlineRegionOverlayHash = '';
        }
        if (!nativeMap.getLayer(OFFLINE_REGION_OVERLAY_FILL_LAYER_ID)) {
          nativeMap.addLayer({
            id: OFFLINE_REGION_OVERLAY_FILL_LAYER_ID,
            type: 'fill',
            source: OFFLINE_REGION_OVERLAY_SOURCE_ID,
            paint: {
              'fill-color': ['case', ['==', ['get', 'ready'], 1], '#0f8b8d', '#f59e0b'],
              'fill-opacity': ['interpolate', ['linear'], ['zoom'], 2, 0.22, 8, 0.16, 12, 0.08, 15, 0.02]
            }
          });
        }
        if (!nativeMap.getLayer(OFFLINE_REGION_OVERLAY_LINE_LAYER_ID)) {
          nativeMap.addLayer({
            id: OFFLINE_REGION_OVERLAY_LINE_LAYER_ID,
            type: 'line',
            source: OFFLINE_REGION_OVERLAY_SOURCE_ID,
            paint: {
              'line-color': ['case', ['==', ['get', 'ready'], 1], '#075e60', '#b45309'],
              'line-width': ['interpolate', ['linear'], ['zoom'], 2, 2.2, 8, 2.0, 12, 1.4, 15, 0.8],
              'line-opacity': ['interpolate', ['linear'], ['zoom'], 2, 0.95, 10, 0.82, 15, 0.35]
            }
          });
        }
        bindOfflineRegionOverlayClick(nativeMap);
        return true;
      } catch (error) {
        return false;
      }
    }

    const OFFLINE_REGION_OVERLAY_REFRESH_MIN_MS = 4500;
    const OFFLINE_REGION_OVERLAY_MAP_EVENT_MIN_MS = 9000;
    const OFFLINE_REGION_OVERLAY_CACHE_NATIVE_MAX_MS = 60000;

    function offlineOverlayTraceReason(options, fallback) {
      const opts = options || {};
      return String(opts.reason || (opts.type ? 'map.' + opts.type : fallback || 'unknown')).replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_.:-]/g, '_');
    }

    function offlineOverlayIsMapMovementReason(reason) {
      return /^map\.(idle|moveend|zoomend)$/i.test(String(reason || ''));
    }

    function offlineOverlayCanUseCachedRegions(reason) {
      return /^map\./i.test(String(reason || '')) || /^style\./i.test(String(reason || ''));
    }

    function offlineOverlayRefreshMinMs(reason) {
      return String(reason || '').indexOf('map.') === 0
        ? OFFLINE_REGION_OVERLAY_MAP_EVENT_MIN_MS
        : OFFLINE_REGION_OVERLAY_REFRESH_MIN_MS;
    }

    function applyOfflineRegionOverlayRegions(nativeMap, regions) {
      const data = offlineRegionOverlayFeatureCollection(regions || []);
      const nextHash = JSON.stringify(data.features.map(function (feature) {
        return [
          feature.properties.id,
          feature.properties.bounds,
          feature.properties.ready,
          feature.properties.shape,
          feature.geometry && feature.geometry.type,
          feature.geometry && feature.geometry.coordinates
        ];
      }));
      if (nextHash === state.offlineRegionOverlayHash) return;
      state.offlineRegionOverlayHash = nextHash;
      const source = nativeMap.getSource(OFFLINE_REGION_OVERLAY_SOURCE_ID);
      if (source && typeof source.setData === 'function') {
        source.setData(data);
      }
    }

    async function refreshOfflineRegionOverlay(options) {
      const opts = options || {};
      const force = opts.force === true;
      const traceReason = offlineOverlayTraceReason(opts, 'refreshOfflineRegionOverlay');
      const now = Date.now();
      if (state.offlineRegionOverlayRefreshInFlight) {
        state.offlineRegionOverlayRefreshPending = true;
        state.offlineRegionOverlayRefreshForcePending = state.offlineRegionOverlayRefreshForcePending || force;
        logPerfTraceMaplogik('MaplogikOfflineRegions', [
          'action=skipInFlight',
          'caller=refreshOfflineRegionOverlay',
          'reason=' + traceReason,
          'force=' + String(force)
        ], 'overlay:defer:' + traceReason);
        return;
      }
      const minRefreshMs = offlineOverlayRefreshMinMs(traceReason);
      if (!force && state.offlineRegionOverlayLastRefreshMs &&
        now - state.offlineRegionOverlayLastRefreshMs < minRefreshMs) {
        logPerfTraceMaplogik('MaplogikOfflineRegions', [
          'action=throttle',
          'caller=refreshOfflineRegionOverlay',
          'reason=' + traceReason,
          'force=' + String(force)
        ], 'overlay:throttle:' + traceReason);
        scheduleOfflineRegionOverlayRefresh({ reason: traceReason });
        return;
      }
      const bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      const nativeMap = state.map && state.map._native;
      if (!nativeMap) return;
      if (!ensureOfflineRegionOverlayLayers(nativeMap)) return;
      const cacheAgeMs = state.offlineRegionOverlayCachedAt ? Date.now() - state.offlineRegionOverlayCachedAt : Infinity;
      const hasCachedRegions = Array.isArray(state.offlineRegionOverlayCachedRegions);
      if (!force && hasCachedRegions && offlineOverlayCanUseCachedRegions(traceReason)) {
        logPerfTraceMaplogik('MaplogikOfflineRegions', [
          'action=applyCached',
          'caller=refreshOfflineRegionOverlay',
          'reason=' + traceReason,
          'cacheAgeMs=' + String(Math.max(0, Math.round(cacheAgeMs)))
        ], 'overlay:cached:' + traceReason);
        applyOfflineRegionOverlayRegions(nativeMap, state.offlineRegionOverlayCachedRegions);
        state.offlineRegionOverlayLastRefreshMs = Date.now();
        return;
      }
      if (!force && offlineOverlayIsMapMovementReason(traceReason)) {
        logPerfTraceMaplogik('MaplogikOfflineRegions', [
          'action=skipMapEvent',
          'caller=refreshOfflineRegionOverlay',
          'reason=' + traceReason,
          'cache=' + String(hasCachedRegions)
        ], 'overlay:skipMapEvent:' + traceReason);
        return;
      }
      if (!force && hasCachedRegions && cacheAgeMs < OFFLINE_REGION_OVERLAY_CACHE_NATIVE_MAX_MS) {
        logPerfTraceMaplogik('MaplogikOfflineRegions', [
          'action=applyCached',
          'caller=refreshOfflineRegionOverlay',
          'reason=' + traceReason,
          'cacheAgeMs=' + String(Math.max(0, Math.round(cacheAgeMs)))
        ], 'overlay:cached:' + traceReason);
        applyOfflineRegionOverlayRegions(nativeMap, state.offlineRegionOverlayCachedRegions);
        state.offlineRegionOverlayLastRefreshMs = Date.now();
        return;
      }
      if (!bridge || typeof bridge.listOfflineRegions !== 'function') return;
      state.offlineRegionOverlayRefreshInFlight = true;
      try {
        logPerfTraceMaplogik('MaplogikOfflineRegions', [
          'action=listRegions',
          'caller=refreshOfflineRegionOverlay',
          'reason=' + traceReason,
          'force=' + String(force)
        ], 'overlay:list:' + traceReason + ':' + String(force));
        const regions = await bridge.listOfflineRegions('refreshOfflineRegionOverlay:' + traceReason).catch(function () { return []; });
        state.offlineRegionOverlayCachedRegions = Array.isArray(regions) ? regions : [];
        state.offlineRegionOverlayCachedAt = Date.now();
        state.offlineRegionOverlayLastRefreshMs = Date.now();
        applyOfflineRegionOverlayRegions(nativeMap, state.offlineRegionOverlayCachedRegions);
      } finally {
        state.offlineRegionOverlayRefreshInFlight = false;
        if (state.offlineRegionOverlayRefreshPending) {
          const pendingForce = state.offlineRegionOverlayRefreshForcePending === true;
          state.offlineRegionOverlayRefreshPending = false;
          state.offlineRegionOverlayRefreshForcePending = false;
          scheduleOfflineRegionOverlayRefresh({ reason: 'pending', force: pendingForce });
        }
      }
    }

    function scheduleOfflineRegionOverlayRefresh(options) {
      const opts = options || {};
      const traceReason = offlineOverlayTraceReason(opts, 'scheduleOfflineRegionOverlayRefresh');
      clearTimeout(state.offlineRegionOverlayRefreshTimerId);
      const now = Date.now();
      const minRefreshMs = offlineOverlayRefreshMinMs(traceReason);
      const elapsed = state.offlineRegionOverlayLastRefreshMs ? now - state.offlineRegionOverlayLastRefreshMs : minRefreshMs;
      const delay = opts.force ? 0 : Math.max(120, minRefreshMs - elapsed);
      logPerfTraceMaplogik('MaplogikOfflineRegions', [
        'action=schedule',
        'caller=scheduleOfflineRegionOverlayRefresh',
        'reason=' + traceReason,
        'force=' + String(opts.force === true),
        'delayMs=' + String(delay)
      ], 'overlay:schedule:' + traceReason + ':' + String(opts.force === true));
      state.offlineRegionOverlayRefreshTimerId = setTimeout(function () {
        refreshOfflineRegionOverlay({ reason: traceReason, force: opts.force === true }).catch(function () {});
      }, delay);
    }

    function attachZoomInertia(mapInstance) {
      const ZOOM_SAMPLE_WINDOW_MS = 220;
      const ZOOM_DECELERATION_PER_SEC = 3.5;
      const ZOOM_MIN_VELOCITY = 0.18;
      const ZOOM_MAX_VELOCITY = 3.2;
      const ZOOM_VELOCITY_SCALE = 1.1;
      const ZOOM_MAX_DELTA = 1.2;
      const ZOOM_MIN_DURATION = 0.18;
      const ZOOM_MAX_DURATION = 0.6;
      const ZOOM_TARGET_EPSILON = 0.05;
      const passiveTouchListenerOptions = { passive: true };

      const mapContainer = mapInstance.getContainer();
      let zoomSamples = [];
      let isPinching = false;
      let pinchAnchor = null;

      function computePinchMidpointLatLng(touchEvent) {
        if (!touchEvent || touchEvent.touches.length < 2) return null;
        const rect = mapContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
        const midX = (touchEvent.touches[0].clientX + touchEvent.touches[1].clientX) / 2 - rect.left;
        const midY = (touchEvent.touches[0].clientY + touchEvent.touches[1].clientY) / 2 - rect.top;
        return mapInstance.containerPointToLatLng([midX, midY]);
      }

      function recordZoomSample() {
        const now = performance.now();
        zoomSamples.push({ zoom: mapInstance.getZoom(), time: now });
        while (zoomSamples.length > 0 && now - zoomSamples[0].time > ZOOM_SAMPLE_WINDOW_MS) {
          zoomSamples.shift();
        }
      }

      function computeVelocity() {
        if (zoomSamples.length < 2) return 0;
        const first = zoomSamples[0];
        const last = zoomSamples[zoomSamples.length - 1];
        const dt = (last.time - first.time) / 1000;
        if (dt <= 0) return 0;
        const velocity = ((last.zoom - first.zoom) / dt) * ZOOM_VELOCITY_SCALE;
        if (!isFinite(velocity)) return 0;
        return Math.max(-ZOOM_MAX_VELOCITY, Math.min(ZOOM_MAX_VELOCITY, velocity));
      }

      function isMapRotated() {
        return typeof mapInstance.getBearing === 'function' && mapInstance.getBearing() !== 0;
      }

      function runMomentum(anchorLatLng, velocity) {
        if (Math.abs(velocity) < ZOOM_MIN_VELOCITY) return;
        if (mapInstance._flyToFrame) mapInstance.stop();

        const signed = Math.sign(velocity);
        const rawDelta = signed * (velocity * velocity) / (2 * ZOOM_DECELERATION_PER_SEC);
        const clampedDelta = Math.max(-ZOOM_MAX_DELTA, Math.min(ZOOM_MAX_DELTA, rawDelta));
        const durationSec = Math.max(ZOOM_MIN_DURATION, Math.min(ZOOM_MAX_DURATION, Math.abs(velocity) / ZOOM_DECELERATION_PER_SEC));
        const currentZoom = mapInstance.getZoom();
        const unclampedTargetZoom = currentZoom + clampedDelta;
        const targetZoom = Math.max(
          mapInstance.getMinZoom(),
          Math.min(mapInstance.getMaxZoom(), unclampedTargetZoom)
        );
        if (Math.abs(targetZoom - currentZoom) < ZOOM_TARGET_EPSILON) return;

        if (isMapRotated()) {
          if (typeof mapInstance.setZoomAround === 'function' && anchorLatLng) {
            mapInstance.setZoomAround(anchorLatLng, targetZoom, { animate: true });
          } else {
            mapInstance.setZoom(targetZoom, { animate: true });
          }
          return;
        }

        const zoomScale = mapInstance.getZoomScale(targetZoom, currentZoom);
        const anchorLayer = mapInstance.latLngToLayerPoint(anchorLatLng);
        const currentCenterLayer = mapInstance.latLngToLayerPoint(mapInstance.getCenter());
        const newCenterLayer = anchorLayer.add(currentCenterLayer.subtract(anchorLayer).multiplyBy(1 / zoomScale));
        const newCenter = mapInstance.layerPointToLatLng(newCenterLayer);

        mapInstance.flyTo(newCenter, targetZoom, {
          duration: durationSec,
          easeLinearity: 0.25,
          noMoveStart: true
        });
      }

      mapContainer.addEventListener('touchstart', function (touchEvent) {
        if (mapInstance._flyToFrame) mapInstance.stop();
        if (touchEvent.touches.length === 2) {
          isPinching = true;
          zoomSamples = [];
          recordZoomSample();
          pinchAnchor = computePinchMidpointLatLng(touchEvent);
        }
      }, passiveTouchListenerOptions);

      mapContainer.addEventListener('touchmove', function (touchEvent) {
        if (!isPinching || touchEvent.touches.length !== 2) return;
        const updatedAnchor = computePinchMidpointLatLng(touchEvent);
        if (updatedAnchor) pinchAnchor = updatedAnchor;
      }, passiveTouchListenerOptions);

      mapInstance.on('zoom', function () {
        if (isPinching) recordZoomSample();
      });

      function handlePinchRelease() {
        if (!isPinching) return;
        isPinching = false;
        const pinchReleaseVelocity = computeVelocity();
        zoomSamples = [];
        const anchor = pinchAnchor;
        pinchAnchor = null;
        if (anchor && Math.abs(pinchReleaseVelocity) >= ZOOM_MIN_VELOCITY) {
          runMomentum(anchor, pinchReleaseVelocity);
        }
      }

      mapContainer.addEventListener('touchend', function (touchEvent) {
        if (isPinching && touchEvent.touches.length < 2) handlePinchRelease();
      }, passiveTouchListenerOptions);

      mapContainer.addEventListener('touchcancel', function () {
        if (isPinching) handlePinchRelease();
      }, passiveTouchListenerOptions);
    }

    function attachRotatedRendererSync(mapInstance, vectorRenderer) {
      if (!mapInstance || !vectorRenderer) return;
      let syncRaf = 0;
      function syncRenderer(ev) {
        if (!vectorRenderer._map) return;
        if (typeof vectorRenderer._update === 'function') vectorRenderer._update();
        if (typeof vectorRenderer._reset === 'function') vectorRenderer._reset();
        else if (typeof vectorRenderer._updatePaths === 'function') vectorRenderer._updatePaths();
        if (vectorRenderer._layers) {
          Object.keys(vectorRenderer._layers).forEach(function (id) {
            const layer = vectorRenderer._layers[id];
            if (layer && typeof layer._reset === 'function') layer._reset();
            if (layer && typeof layer.redraw === 'function') layer.redraw();
          });
        }
        if (typeof vectorRenderer._updateTransform === 'function') {
          const map = vectorRenderer._map;
          vectorRenderer._updateTransform(ev && ev.center ? ev.center : map.getCenter(), ev && ev.zoom != null ? ev.zoom : map.getZoom());
        }
      }
      let lastSyncMs = 0;
      function nowMs() {
        return (typeof performance !== 'undefined' && typeof performance.now === 'function')
          ? performance.now() : Date.now();
      }
      function scheduleSync() {
        if (syncRaf) return;
        const run = function () { syncRaf = 0; lastSyncMs = nowMs(); syncRenderer(); };
        // Waehrend einer fortlaufenden Drehung den vollen Reprojektions-Sync auf
        // ~30 Hz begrenzen (sonst O(Routenlaenge) pro Frame = kurzes Haengen).
        const waitMs = Math.max(0, ROTATED_RENDERER_SYNC_MIN_MS - (nowMs() - lastSyncMs));
        syncRaf = (waitMs <= 0 && typeof window.requestAnimationFrame === 'function')
          ? window.requestAnimationFrame(run)
          : setTimeout(run, waitMs);
      }
      mapInstance.on('rotateend zoomend viewreset', function (ev) { lastSyncMs = nowMs(); syncRenderer(ev); });
      mapInstance.on('rotate zoom', scheduleSync);
      mapInstance.on('zoomanim', function (ev) { lastSyncMs = nowMs(); syncRenderer(ev); });
    }

    function byId(id) { return document.getElementById(id); }

    function stopEventPropagation(eventObject) {
      if (eventObject && typeof eventObject.stopPropagation === 'function') {
        eventObject.stopPropagation();
      }
    }

    function getErrorMessageOrFallback(errorObject, fallbackMessage) {
      if (errorObject && typeof errorObject.message === 'string' && errorObject.message.trim()) {
        return errorObject.message;
      }
      return fallbackMessage;
    }

    function handleAsyncActionError(actionError, logMessage, fallbackAlertMessage) {
      console.error(logMessage, actionError);
      if (fallbackAlertMessage) {
        window.alert(getErrorMessageOrFallback(actionError, fallbackAlertMessage));
      }
    }

    function setTextIfPresent(elementId, textValue) {
      const targetElement = byId(elementId);
      if (!targetElement) {
        return;
      }
      targetElement.textContent = textValue;
    }

    function bindClickIfPresent(element, clickHandler) {
      if (!element || typeof clickHandler !== 'function') {
        return;
      }
      element.addEventListener('click', clickHandler);
    }

    function bindAsyncClickIfPresent(element, asyncHandler, logMessage, fallbackAlertMessage) {
      if (!element || typeof asyncHandler !== 'function') {
        return;
      }
      element.addEventListener('click', function () {
        asyncHandler().catch(function (error) {
          handleAsyncActionError(error, logMessage, fallbackAlertMessage);
        });
      });
    }

    async function fetchJson(url, options) {
      const requestOptions = Object.assign({ cache: 'no-store' }, options || {});
      const readBackoffKey = serverReadBackoffKey(url, requestOptions);
      const readBackoffEntry = activeServerReadBackoff(readBackoffKey);
      if (readBackoffEntry) {
        throw serverReadBackoffError(readBackoffEntry);
      }
      if (window.MOBILE_LOCAL_ASSETS && isServerApiPath(url) && window.__mobileServerAvailable !== true) {
        if (readBackoffKey) startServerReadBackoff(readBackoffKey);
        logServerFallback('server unavailable', String(url || ''));
        throw new Error('Server nicht erreichbar; Offline-Modus bleibt aktiv.');
      }
      let resolvedUrl;
      try {
        resolvedUrl = resolveServerApiUrl(url);
      } catch (resolveError) {
        if (readBackoffKey) {
          startServerReadBackoff(readBackoffKey, resolveError && resolveError.message ? resolveError.message : '');
        }
        throw resolveError;
      }
      if (isCapacitorNativeApp() && !requestOptions.signal && typeof AbortController !== 'undefined') {
        var controller = new AbortController();
        requestOptions.signal = controller.signal;
        setTimeout(function () { try { controller.abort(); } catch (_) {} }, 5000);
      }
      let response;
      try {
        response = await fetch(resolvedUrl, requestOptions);
      } catch (fetchError) {
        if (isServerApiPath(url)) logServerFallback('request failed', String(url || ''));
        if (readBackoffKey) {
          startServerReadBackoff(readBackoffKey, fetchError && fetchError.message ? fetchError.message : '');
        }
        throw fetchError;
      }
      if (!response.ok) {
        const responseText = await response.text();
        throw new Error('HTTP Fehler ' + response.status + ' bei ' + url + ': ' + responseText);
      }
      return await response.json();
    }

    async function flushPendingServerReset(deviceKey) {
      // Das Handy resettet den Server nicht mehr ueber HTTPS. Eventuell aus
      // aelteren Versionen verbliebene Pending-Markierungen werden nur lokal
      // aufgeraeumt (kein /api/reset), damit kein versteckter HTTPS-Reset
      // ausgeloest wird und die Verlaufsanzeige nicht haengen bleibt.
      const key = String(deviceKey || '').trim();
      if (!key) return false;
      if (hasPendingServerReset(key)) clearPendingServerReset(key);
      return false;
    }

    async function resetTrackingData(optionalDeviceKey) {
      const nativeResetKey = optionalDeviceKey && isNativeAppContext() && isNativePhoneDeviceKey(optionalDeviceKey)
        ? optionalDeviceKey
        : (!optionalDeviceKey && isNativeAppContext() ? getNativePhoneDeviceKey() : '');
      // Handy resettet ausschliesslich lokal und schickt KEINE Server-Anfrage
      // (kein HTTPS, auch kein nachgelagerter Reset). Der Server kann das Handy
      // weiterhin per MQTT-Command (tracking_reset) zuruecksetzen; Live-Punkte
      // laufen unveraendert weiter.
      if (nativeResetKey) {
        resetNativeLocalTrackingData(nativeResetKey);
        return { ok: true, data: { localOnly: true } };
      }
      const requestBody = {};
      if (optionalDeviceKey) {
        requestBody.deviceKey = optionalDeviceKey;
      }
      return await fetchJson('/api/reset', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify(requestBody)
      });
    }

    async function fetchTrackingStatus(deviceKey) {
      const selectedDeviceKey = typeof deviceKey === 'string' ? deviceKey : getSelectedDeviceKey();
      const statusUrl = selectedDeviceKey
        ? '/api/tracking/status?deviceKey=' + encodeURIComponent(selectedDeviceKey)
        : '/api/tracking/status';
      return await fetchJson(statusUrl);
    }

    async function fetchFailsafeRoutePlan(deviceKey) {
      const selectedDeviceKey = typeof deviceKey === 'string' ? deviceKey : getSelectedDeviceKey();
      const failsafeUrl = selectedDeviceKey
        ? '/api/failsafe-route-plan?deviceKey=' + encodeURIComponent(selectedDeviceKey)
        : '/api/failsafe-route-plan';
      return await fetchJson(failsafeUrl);
    }

    function setRouteInlineInfo(distanceText, durationText) {
      setTextIfPresent('routeDistanceInline', distanceText || '-');
      setTextIfPresent('routeDurationInline', durationText || '-');
    }

    function setNavigationInlineHint(hintText) {
      const routeDurationElement = byId('routeDurationInline');
      if (!routeDurationElement) return;
      routeDurationElement.textContent = hintText || 'Offline';
      routeDurationElement.setAttribute('title', hintText || 'Navigation laeuft lokal weiter.');
    }

    function updateTrackingStatusChip() {
      const selectedKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      // Handy: zeigt den lokalen Zustand (Bridge ist die Wahrheit).
      if (isNativeAppContext() && isNativePhoneDeviceKey(selectedKey)) {
        setStatusChip('trackingStatusChip', state.trackingEnabled ? 'Lokal aktiv' : 'Lokal inaktiv', state.trackingEnabled ? 'green' : 'gray');
        return;
      }
      // Web/Server: zeigt den Server-Zustand und ggf. den Mismatch zum Handy.
      if (state.trackingEnabled) {
        const mismatch = state.serverActiveLocalStoppedByKey && state.serverActiveLocalStoppedByKey[selectedKey];
        setStatusChip('trackingStatusChip', mismatch ? 'Aktiv · Handy gestoppt' : 'Aktiv', mismatch ? 'yellow' : 'green');
      } else {
        setStatusChip('trackingStatusChip', 'Inaktiv', 'gray');
      }
    }

    function removeFailsafeReturnMarker() {
      if (state.failsafeReturnMarker) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.failsafeReturnMarker);
        state.failsafeReturnMarker = null;
      }
    }

    function removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine() {
      if (state.failsafeReturnRouteLine) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.failsafeReturnRouteLine);
        state.failsafeReturnRouteLine = null;
      }
      state.failsafeReturnRouteMeta = null;
    }

    function removeFailsafeOverlayForDevice(deviceKey) {
      const normalizedKey = deviceKey && String(deviceKey).trim() ? String(deviceKey).trim() : '';
      if (!normalizedKey) {
        return;
      }
      if (state.failsafeReturnMarkersByKey[normalizedKey]) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.failsafeReturnMarkersByKey[normalizedKey]);
        delete state.failsafeReturnMarkersByKey[normalizedKey];
      }
      if (state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey]) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey]);
        delete state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey];
      }
      delete state.failsafeRouteRequestInFlightByKey[normalizedKey];
    }

    function clearAllFailsafeOverlays() {
      Object.keys(state.failsafeReturnMarkersByKey).forEach(function (deviceKey) {
        removeFailsafeOverlayForDevice(deviceKey);
      });
    }

    async function updateFailsafeReturnRouteFromPlan() {
      if (state.failsafeRouteRequestInFlight) {
        return;
      }
      state.failsafeRouteRequestInFlight = true;
      try {
        const failsafePlanResponse = await fetchFailsafeRoutePlan();
        const planData = failsafePlanResponse && failsafePlanResponse.data ? failsafePlanResponse.data : null;
        if (!planData || !planData.shouldComputeRoute || !planData.startPosition || !planData.returnPosition) {
          removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine();
          return;
        }
        const startPosition = planData.startPosition;
        const returnPosition = planData.returnPosition;
        if (typeof startPosition.lat !== 'number' || typeof startPosition.lon !== 'number' ||
            typeof returnPosition.lat !== 'number' || typeof returnPosition.lon !== 'number') {
          removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine();
          return;
        }
        const routeResult = await fetchRouteGeometry(
          startPosition.lat,
          startPosition.lon,
          returnPosition.lat,
          returnPosition.lon,
          FAILSAFE_RETURN_TRANSPORT_MODE,
          []
        );
        removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine();
        state.failsafeReturnRouteLine = L.geoJSON(routeResult.route.geometry, {
          style: withVectorRenderer({
            color: '#c62828',
            weight: NAV_ROUTE_CASING_WEIGHT,
            opacity: 0.9
          })
        }).addTo(state.map);
        const routeDistanceText = formatDistanceMeters(routeResult.route.distance);
        const routeDurationText = formatDurationSeconds(routeResult.route.duration);
        state.failsafeReturnRouteMeta = {
          distance: routeDistanceText,
          duration: routeDurationText
        };
        state.failsafeReturnRouteLine.bindPopup(
          'Failsafe-Rückkehrroute: ' + routeDistanceText + ' | ' + routeDurationText
        );
      } catch (failsafeRouteError) {
        console.error('Fehler beim Berechnen der Failsafe-Rückkehrroute:', failsafeRouteError);
        removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine();
      } finally {
        state.failsafeRouteRequestInFlight = false;
      }
    }

    async function updateFailsafeReturnRouteFromPlanForDevice(deviceKey) {
      const normalizedKey = deviceKey && String(deviceKey).trim() ? String(deviceKey).trim() : '';
      if (!normalizedKey || state.failsafeRouteRequestInFlightByKey[normalizedKey]) {
        return;
      }
      state.failsafeRouteRequestInFlightByKey[normalizedKey] = true;
      try {
        const failsafePlanResponse = await fetchFailsafeRoutePlan(normalizedKey);
        const planData = failsafePlanResponse && failsafePlanResponse.data ? failsafePlanResponse.data : null;
        if (!planData || !planData.shouldComputeRoute || !planData.startPosition || !planData.returnPosition) {
          if (state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey]) {
            state.map.removeLayer(state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey]);
            delete state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey];
          }
          return;
        }
        const startPosition = planData.startPosition;
        const returnPosition = planData.returnPosition;
        if (typeof startPosition.lat !== 'number' || typeof startPosition.lon !== 'number' ||
            typeof returnPosition.lat !== 'number' || typeof returnPosition.lon !== 'number') {
          if (state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey]) {
            state.map.removeLayer(state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey]);
            delete state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey];
          }
          return;
        }
        const routeResult = await fetchRouteGeometry(
          startPosition.lat,
          startPosition.lon,
          returnPosition.lat,
          returnPosition.lon,
          FAILSAFE_RETURN_TRANSPORT_MODE,
          []
        );
        if (state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey]) {
          state.map.removeLayer(state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey]);
        }
        state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey] = L.geoJSON(routeResult.route.geometry, {
          style: withVectorRenderer({
            color: '#c62828',
            weight: NAV_ROUTE_CASING_WEIGHT,
            opacity: 0.7
          })
        }).addTo(state.map);
        const routeDistanceText = formatDistanceMeters(routeResult.route.distance);
        const routeDurationText = formatDurationSeconds(routeResult.route.duration);
        state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey].bindPopup(
          'Failsafe-Rückkehrroute (' + getHumanDeviceLabel(normalizedKey, null) + '): ' +
          routeDistanceText + ' | ' + routeDurationText
        );
      } catch (failsafeRouteError) {
        console.error('Fehler beim Berechnen der Failsafe-Rückkehrroute (ALL):', failsafeRouteError);
      } finally {
        delete state.failsafeRouteRequestInFlightByKey[normalizedKey];
      }
    }

    async function updateFailsafeOverlaysForAllDevices() {
      if (!state.map || !state.showAllDevicesOnMap) {
        clearAllFailsafeOverlays();
        return;
      }
      const deviceKeys = allMapDeviceKeysOrdered();
      const activeDeviceKeys = {};
      await Promise.all(deviceKeys.map(async function (deviceKey) {
        const normalizedKey = deviceKey && String(deviceKey).trim() ? String(deviceKey).trim() : '';
        if (!normalizedKey) {
          return;
        }
        if (!shouldRunClientFailsafeUiForDevice(normalizedKey)) {
          removeFailsafeOverlayForDevice(normalizedKey);
          delete state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey[normalizedKey];
          return;
        }
        try {
          const trackingStatusResponse = await fetchTrackingStatus(normalizedKey);
          const trackingStatusData = trackingStatusResponse && trackingStatusResponse.data
            ? trackingStatusResponse.data
            : null;
          const failsafeData = trackingStatusData && trackingStatusData.failsafe ? trackingStatusData.failsafe : null;
          const returnPosition = trackingStatusData ? trackingStatusData.returnPosition : null;
          const linkLostForLongTime = !!(failsafeData && failsafeData.linkLostForLongTime);
          const rLat = returnPosition ? Number(returnPosition.lat) : NaN;
          const rLon = returnPosition ? Number(returnPosition.lon) : NaN;
          const hasReturnPosition = Number.isFinite(rLat) && Number.isFinite(rLon) &&
            rLat >= -90 && rLat <= 90 && rLon >= -180 && rLon <= 180;
          if (!linkLostForLongTime || !hasReturnPosition) {
            removeFailsafeOverlayForDevice(normalizedKey);
            delete state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey[normalizedKey];
            return;
          }

          activeDeviceKeys[normalizedKey] = true;
          const returnLatLng = [rLat, rLon];
          if (!state.failsafeReturnMarkersByKey[normalizedKey]) {
            state.failsafeReturnMarkersByKey[normalizedKey] = L.marker(returnLatLng, {
              icon: redIcon,
              zIndexOffset: 3000
            }).addTo(state.map);
          } else {
            state.failsafeReturnMarkersByKey[normalizedKey].setLatLng(returnLatLng);
          }
          state.failsafeReturnMarkersByKey[normalizedKey].bindPopup(
            'Rückkehrpunkt (Failsafe) ' + getHumanDeviceLabel(normalizedKey, null) + ': ' +
            rLat.toFixed(6) + ', ' + rLon.toFixed(6)
          );
          if (!state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey[normalizedKey]) {
            state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey[normalizedKey] = true;
