            window.alert('Hinweis für Gerät «' + getHumanDeviceLabel(normalizedKey, null) + '»: Seit über 1 Minute wurden keine frischen Tracking-Daten empfangen. ' +
              'Der Rückkehrpunkt wurde ermittelt und ist als roter Marker markiert. Die Rückkehrroute wird angezeigt.');
          }
          await updateFailsafeReturnRouteFromPlanForDevice(normalizedKey);
        } catch (failsafeAllError) {
          console.error('Fehler beim Laden des Failsafe-Status für Gerät:', normalizedKey, failsafeAllError);
        }
      }));
      Object.keys(state.failsafeReturnMarkersByKey).forEach(function (deviceKey) {
        if (!activeDeviceKeys[deviceKey]) {
          removeFailsafeOverlayForDevice(deviceKey);
        }
      });
    }

    function updateFailsafeStateFromTrackingStatus(trackingStatusData) {
      if (state.showAllDevicesOnMap) {
        removeFailsafeReturnMarker();
        removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine();
        return;
      }
      const deviceKeyForFailsafe = (trackingStatusData && trackingStatusData.deviceKey)
        ? trackingStatusData.deviceKey
        : getSelectedDeviceKey();
      if (!shouldRunClientFailsafeUiForDevice(deviceKeyForFailsafe)) {
        removeFailsafeReturnMarker();
        removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine();
        return;
      }
      const failsafeNoticeKey = deviceKeyForFailsafe ? String(deviceKeyForFailsafe) : '__none__';
      if (!state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey) {
        state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey = {};
      }
      if (!trackingStatusData || !trackingStatusData.failsafe) {
        removeFailsafeReturnMarker();
        removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine();
        delete state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey[failsafeNoticeKey];
        return;
      }
      const failsafeData = trackingStatusData.failsafe;
      const returnPosition = trackingStatusData.returnPosition;
      const retLat = returnPosition ? Number(returnPosition.lat) : NaN;
      const retLon = returnPosition ? Number(returnPosition.lon) : NaN;
      const hasReturnPosition = Number.isFinite(retLat) && Number.isFinite(retLon) &&
        retLat >= -90 && retLat <= 90 && retLon >= -180 && retLon <= 180;
      const linkLostForLongTime = !!(failsafeData && failsafeData.linkLostForLongTime);

      if (!linkLostForLongTime || !hasReturnPosition) {
        removeFailsafeReturnMarker();
        removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine();
        delete state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey[failsafeNoticeKey];
        return;
      }

      const returnLatLng = [retLat, retLon];
      if (!state.failsafeReturnMarker) {
        state.failsafeReturnMarker = L.marker(returnLatLng, {
          icon: redIcon,
          zIndexOffset: 3000
        }).addTo(state.map);
        state.failsafeReturnMarker.bindPopup('Rückkehrpunkt (Failsafe): ' +
          retLat.toFixed(6) + ', ' + retLon.toFixed(6));
      } else {
        state.failsafeReturnMarker.setLatLng(returnLatLng);
      }
      if (typeof state.failsafeReturnMarker.setZIndexOffset === 'function') {
        state.failsafeReturnMarker.setZIndexOffset(3000);
      }
      if (typeof state.failsafeReturnMarker.bringToFront === 'function') {
        state.failsafeReturnMarker.bringToFront();
      }

      if (!state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey[failsafeNoticeKey]) {
        const failsafeDeviceLabel = getHumanDeviceLabel(deviceKeyForFailsafe, returnPosition);
        state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey[failsafeNoticeKey] = true;
        window.alert('Hinweis für Gerät «' + failsafeDeviceLabel + '»: Seit über 1 Minute wurden keine frischen Tracking-Daten empfangen. ' +
          'Der Rückkehrpunkt wurde ermittelt und ist als roter Marker markiert. Die Rückkehrroute wird angezeigt.');
      }
      updateFailsafeReturnRouteFromPlan();
    }

    function updateRouteActionVisibility() {
      const routeActionsRowElement = byId('routeActionsRow');
      if (!routeActionsRowElement) {
        return;
      }
      const hasDestination = !!state.destinationMarker;
      routeActionsRowElement.classList.toggle('route-action-hidden', !hasDestination);
    }

    function updateRouteLetterBadgesVisibility() {
      const showRouteLetterBadges = !!state.routeLine;
      document.querySelectorAll('.route-letter-badge').forEach(function (badgeElement) {
        badgeElement.classList.toggle('route-letter-badge-off', !showRouteLetterBadges);
      });
    }

    function applyRouteOnMap(routeResult, destination, routeContext) {
      if (!routeResult || !routeResult.route || !destination) {
        return;
      }
      const preserveCompactNavigation = !!(routeContext && routeContext.preserveCompactNavigation);
      const actualStart = routeContext && routeContext.actualStart ? routeContext.actualStart : null;
      state.activeNavigationRouteCacheKey = routeResult.cacheKey || (routeContext && routeContext.routeCacheKey) || '';
      clearNavigationRouteTurnArrows();
      clearNavigationRouteAccessLine();
      clearNavigationRouteDestinationAccessLine();
      if (!preserveCompactNavigation) clearNavigationRouteLivePolling();
      state.navigationRouteStart = actualStart && Number.isFinite(Number(actualStart.lat)) && Number.isFinite(Number(actualStart.lon))
        ? { lat: Number(actualStart.lat), lon: Number(actualStart.lon), label: actualStart.label || (actualStart.kind === 'currentLocation' ? 'Mein Standort' : ''), kind: actualStart.kind || 'place' }
        : null;
      if (state.navigationRouteStart && !preserveCompactNavigation) {
        const startInput = byId('routeStartQuery');
        if (startInput) startInput.value = state.navigationRouteStart.label;
        state.selectedRouteStart = state.navigationRouteStart.kind === 'currentLocation' ? null : Object.assign({}, state.navigationRouteStart);
        updateStartInlineClearButtonVisibility();
      }
      displayDestination(destination, { skipMapViewUpdate: true, preserveActiveNavigation: preserveCompactNavigation });
      const routeCoords = extractLatLngCoordsFromRouteGeometry(routeResult.route.geometry);
      buildNavigationRouteOverlay(routeCoords);
      if (actualStart && routeCoords.length > 0) {
        updateNavigationRouteAccessConnector(actualStart.lat, actualStart.lon, routeCoords[0]);
      }
      if (routeCoords.length > 0) {
        updateNavigationRouteDestinationConnector(routeCoords[routeCoords.length - 1], destination);
      }
      const contextTransportMode = routeContext && routeContext.transportMode
        ? routeContext.transportMode
        : getSelectedTransportModeFromDom();
      const cumulativeMeters = buildCumulativeMetersForCoords(routeCoords);
      buildNavigationRouteTurnArrows(routeResult.route, routeCoords, cumulativeMeters, contextTransportMode);
      state.navigationRouteCoords = routeCoords;
      state.navigationRouteCumulativeMeters = cumulativeMeters;
      state.navigationRouteBaselineCoords = routeCoords.slice();
      state.navigationRouteBaselineCumulative = cumulativeMeters.slice();
      const rerouteUserProjection = preserveCompactNavigation && actualStart
        ? projectLatLngOntoNavigationBaseline(Number(actualStart.lat), Number(actualStart.lon))
        : null;
      state.navigationRouteProgressArcMeters = rerouteUserProjection && Number.isFinite(rerouteUserProjection.arcMeters)
        ? Math.max(0, rerouteUserProjection.arcMeters)
        : 0;
      state.navigationLiveSnapToPositionActive = false;
      state.navigationLiveSnapLastActiveAtMs = 0;
      state.navigationPrevWrongWayLatLng = null;
      state.navigationRouteLastBaselineArcMeters = null;
      state.navigationRouteTotalMeters = cumulativeMeters.length > 0
        ? cumulativeMeters[cumulativeMeters.length - 1]
        : 0;
      state.navigationRouteDestination = {
        lat: destination.lat,
        lon: destination.lon,
        label: destination.label || ''
      };
      state.navigationRouteTransportMode = contextTransportMode;
      const contextWaypoints = routeContext && Array.isArray(routeContext.waypoints)
        ? routeContext.waypoints
        : (Array.isArray(state.selectedWaypoints) ? state.selectedWaypoints : []);
      state.navigationRouteWaypointsSnapshot = contextWaypoints
        .filter(function (waypointItem) {
          return waypointItem &&
            typeof waypointItem.lat === 'number' &&
            typeof waypointItem.lon === 'number' &&
            Number.isFinite(waypointItem.lat) &&
            Number.isFinite(waypointItem.lon);
        })
        .map(function (waypointItem) {
          return { lat: waypointItem.lat, lon: waypointItem.lon, label: waypointItem.label || '' };
        });
      state.navigationOffRouteConsecutiveTickCount = 0;
      const routeDistance = formatDistanceMeters(routeResult.route.distance);
      const routeDuration = formatDurationSeconds(routeResult.route.duration);
      setRouteInlineInfo(routeDistance, routeDuration);
      updateRouteLetterBadgesVisibility();
      if (preserveCompactNavigation) {
        beginNavigationRouteLivePolling();
        state.activeNavigationRouteObject = routeResult.route;
        state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive = true;
        state.navigationGuidanceZoomMode = 'drive';
        state.navigationAdaptiveZoomStage = null;
        clearNavigationAdaptiveZoomTimer(); state.navigationAdaptiveZoomInProgress = false;
        state.navigationNextEventDistanceMeters = null;
        state.navigationAutoViewEnabled = state.autoFollowEnabled = true;
        state.navigationAdaptiveZoomArmed = false;
        state.navigationDriveZoom = resolveNavigationMaxDriveZoomLevel();
        setNavigationMapDockActive(true);
        const sheetElement = byId('placeBottomSheet');
        if (sheetElement) sheetElement.classList.add('navigation-compact-active');
        renderNavigationGuidanceIntoPlaceSheetBody(routeResult.route, actualStart ? actualStart.lat : undefined, actualStart ? actualStart.lon : undefined);
        syncNavigationRemainingIndicator();
        applyPlaceSheetFooterForContentKind();
        syncNavigationGuidanceStartButtonVisibility();
        syncNavigationCenterButtonVisibility();
        refreshPlaceSheetToggleButton();
        if (!state.navigationRouteStart || state.navigationRouteStart.kind === 'currentLocation') {
          enableHeadingUpBearingControl();
          state.userHasInteractedWithMap = false;
        }
        if (actualStart) {
          state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng = [actualStart.lat, actualStart.lon];
          syncMapBearingFromHeading(effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(getSelectedDeviceKey(), state.latestHeadingDegrees));
          flyMapToLatLonMaxZoomAnimated(actualStart.lat, actualStart.lon);
          enableNavigationRouteAutoView();
        }
        beginNavigationGuidanceCompactPolling(NAV_CLOSE_VIEW_LAYOUT_DELAY_MS + NAV_CLOSE_VIEW_CONFIRM_DELAY_MS + 180);
      } else {
        openNavigationGuidancePlaceSheet(routeResult.route, destination);
      }
    }

    function navigationRouteIsActive() {
      return !!(state.navigationRouteCoreLine &&
        Array.isArray(state.navigationRouteCoords) &&
        state.navigationRouteCoords.length >= 2);
    }

    function extractLatLngCoordsFromRouteGeometry(routeGeometry) {
      if (!routeGeometry || !Array.isArray(routeGeometry.coordinates)) {
        return [];
      }
      const result = [];
      routeGeometry.coordinates.forEach(function (coordPair) {
        if (!Array.isArray(coordPair) || coordPair.length < 2) return;
        const lon = Number(coordPair[0]);
        const lat = Number(coordPair[1]);
        if (!Number.isFinite(lat) || !Number.isFinite(lon)) return;
        result.push([lat, lon]);
      });
      return result;
    }

    function buildCumulativeMetersForCoords(coords) {
      const cumulative = [0];
      if (!Array.isArray(coords) || coords.length < 2) {
        return cumulative;
      }
      let total = 0;
      for (let i = 1; i < coords.length; i += 1) {
        const km = haversineKilometers(coords[i - 1][0], coords[i - 1][1], coords[i][0], coords[i][1]);
        total += km * 1000;
        cumulative.push(total);
      }
      return cumulative;
    }

    function buildNavigationRouteOverlay(coords) {
      if (!Array.isArray(coords) || coords.length < 2 || !state.map) {
        removeNavigationRouteOverlayLayers();
        state.routeLine = null;
        return;
      }
      if (state.navigationRouteCoreLine && state.navigationRouteCasingLine) {
        state.navigationRouteCasingLine.setLatLngs(coords);
        state.navigationRouteCoreLine.setLatLngs(coords);
        state.routeLine = state.navigationRouteCoreLine;
        return;
      }
      removeNavigationRouteOverlayLayers();
      state.navigationRouteCasingLine = L.polyline(coords, withVectorRenderer({
        color: NAV_ROUTE_CASING_COLOR,
        weight: NAV_ROUTE_CASING_WEIGHT,
        opacity: NAV_ROUTE_CASING_OPACITY,
        lineCap: 'round',
        lineJoin: 'round',
        interactive: false
      })).addTo(state.map);
      state.navigationRouteCoreLine = L.polyline(coords, withVectorRenderer({
        color: NAV_ROUTE_CORE_COLOR,
        weight: NAV_ROUTE_CORE_WEIGHT,
        opacity: NAV_ROUTE_CORE_OPACITY,
        lineCap: 'round',
        lineJoin: 'round'
      })).addTo(state.map);
      state.routeLine = state.navigationRouteCoreLine;
    }

    function clearNavigationRouteTurnArrows() {
      cancelNavigationRouteTurnArrowAnimation();
      if (state.navigationRouteTurnArrowLayer && state.map) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.navigationRouteTurnArrowLayer);
      }
      state.navigationRouteTurnArrowLayer = null;
    }

    function latLngAtRouteArc(coords, cumulative, arcMeters) {
      const clampedArc = Math.max(0, Math.min(arcMeters, cumulative[cumulative.length - 1] || 0));
      for (let i = 1; i < cumulative.length; i += 1) {
        if (cumulative[i] < clampedArc) continue;
        const prevArc = cumulative[i - 1] || 0;
        const nextArc = cumulative[i] || prevArc;
        const ratio = nextArc > prevArc ? (clampedArc - prevArc) / (nextArc - prevArc) : 0;
        return [
          coords[i - 1][0] + ((coords[i][0] - coords[i - 1][0]) * ratio),
          coords[i - 1][1] + ((coords[i][1] - coords[i - 1][1]) * ratio)
        ];
      }
      return coords[coords.length - 1];
    }

    function routeCoordsBetweenArcs(coords, cumulative, startArc, endArc) {
      const segment = [latLngAtRouteArc(coords, cumulative, startArc)];
      for (let i = 1; i < coords.length - 1; i += 1) {
        if (cumulative[i] > startArc && cumulative[i] < endArc) {
          segment.push(coords[i]);
        }
      }
      segment.push(latLngAtRouteArc(coords, cumulative, endArc));
      return segment;
    }

    function bearingBetweenLatLngs(fromLatLng, toLatLng) {
      const startLatRad = fromLatLng[0] * Math.PI / 180;
      const endLatRad = toLatLng[0] * Math.PI / 180;
      const lonDeltaRad = (toLatLng[1] - fromLatLng[1]) * Math.PI / 180;
      const y = Math.sin(lonDeltaRad) * Math.cos(endLatRad);
      const x = Math.cos(startLatRad) * Math.sin(endLatRad) -
        Math.sin(startLatRad) * Math.cos(endLatRad) * Math.cos(lonDeltaRad);
      return (Math.atan2(y, x) * 180 / Math.PI + 360) % 360;
    }

    function resolveNavigationRouteTurnArrowIconPx(zoomLevel) {
      const zoom = Number.isFinite(zoomLevel) ? zoomLevel : NAV_ROUTE_TURN_ARROW_ICON_ZOOM_AT_MAX;
      const span = NAV_ROUTE_TURN_ARROW_ICON_ZOOM_AT_MAX - NAV_ROUTE_TURN_ARROW_ICON_ZOOM_AT_MIN;
      const unit = span > 0 ? Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (zoom - NAV_ROUTE_TURN_ARROW_ICON_ZOOM_AT_MIN) / span)) : 1;
      return Math.round(NAV_ROUTE_TURN_ARROW_ICON_PX_MIN + unit * (NAV_ROUTE_TURN_ARROW_ICON_PX_MAX - NAV_ROUTE_TURN_ARROW_ICON_PX_MIN));
    }

    function turnArrowDivIcon(iconPx) {
      const sizePx = Math.max(NAV_ROUTE_TURN_ARROW_ICON_PX_MIN, Math.min(NAV_ROUTE_TURN_ARROW_ICON_PX_MAX,
        Math.round(Number.isFinite(iconPx) ? iconPx : resolveNavigationRouteTurnArrowIconPx(state.map && state.map.getZoom()))));
      return L.divIcon({
        className: 'navigation-route-turn-arrow-marker',
        html: '<svg class="navigation-route-turn-arrow-head" viewBox="0 0 32 32" aria-hidden="true" style="width:' + sizePx + 'px;height:' + sizePx + 'px;color:#EEFF00"><path d="M16 2L29 28L16 20L3 28Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg>',
        iconSize: [sizePx, sizePx],
        iconAnchor: [sizePx / 2, sizePx / 2]
      });
    }

    function navigationRouteTurnArrowMarkerOptions(bearingDeg) {
      const bearing = Number.isFinite(bearingDeg) ? wrapHeadingDegreesForMap(bearingDeg) : 0;
      const zoom = state.map && state.map.getZoom();
      return {
        icon: turnArrowDivIcon(resolveNavigationRouteTurnArrowIconPx(state.map && state.map.getZoom())),
        opacity: Number.isFinite(zoom) && zoom < NAV_ROUTE_TURN_ARROW_HEAD_HIDE_BELOW_ZOOM ? 0 : 1,
        rotateWithView: true,
        rotation: bearing * Math.PI / 180,
        interactive: false,
        keyboard: false,
        zIndexOffset: 1800
      };
    }

    let turnArrowZoomRaf = 0;
    let turnArrowAnimationRaf = 0;

    function cancelNavigationRouteTurnArrowAnimation() {
      if (turnArrowAnimationRaf) cancelAnimationFrame(turnArrowAnimationRaf);
      turnArrowAnimationRaf = 0;
    }

    function animateNavigationRouteTurnArrows() {
      cancelNavigationRouteTurnArrowAnimation();
      if (!state.navigationRouteTurnArrowLayer) return;
      const startMs = performance.now();
      const cycleMs = NAV_ROUTE_TURN_ARROW_ANIMATION_MS + NAV_ROUTE_TURN_ARROW_ANIMATION_PAUSE_MS;
      const step = function (frameMs) {
        if (!state.navigationRouteTurnArrowLayer) {
          turnArrowAnimationRaf = 0;
          return;
        }
        const progress = Math.min(1, ((frameMs - startMs) % cycleMs) / NAV_ROUTE_TURN_ARROW_ANIMATION_MS);
        state.navigationRouteTurnArrowLayer.eachLayer(function (layer) {
          if (!layer || !layer._navigationTurnMarker || layer._navigationTurnPassed) return;
          const segment = layer._navigationTurnSegment;
          const cumulative = layer._navigationTurnCumulative;
          const totalMeters = cumulative[cumulative.length - 1] || 0;
          const partial = routeCoordsBetweenArcs(segment, cumulative, 0, totalMeters * progress);
          const tip = partial[partial.length - 1];
          layer.setLatLngs(partial);
          layer._navigationTurnMarker.setLatLng(tip);
          if (partial.length > 1) {
            layer._navigationTurnMarker.options.rotation = bearingBetweenLatLngs(partial[partial.length - 2], tip) * Math.PI / 180;
            if (layer._navigationTurnMarker._map && typeof layer._navigationTurnMarker.update === 'function') layer._navigationTurnMarker.update();
          }
        });
        turnArrowAnimationRaf = requestAnimationFrame(step);
      };
      turnArrowAnimationRaf = requestAnimationFrame(step);
    }

    function scheduleNavigationRouteTurnArrowZoomSync() {
      if (turnArrowZoomRaf || !state.navigationRouteTurnArrowLayer) return;
      const run = function () {
        turnArrowZoomRaf = 0;
        if (!state.map || !state.navigationRouteTurnArrowLayer) return;
        const zoom = state.map.getZoom();
        const iconPx = resolveNavigationRouteTurnArrowIconPx(zoom);
        const opacity = Number.isFinite(zoom) && zoom < NAV_ROUTE_TURN_ARROW_HEAD_HIDE_BELOW_ZOOM ? 0 : 1;
        state.navigationRouteTurnArrowLayer.eachLayer(function (layer) {
          if (layer && !layer._navigationTurnPassed && layer._isNavigationRouteTurnArrow && typeof layer.setIcon === 'function') {
            if (opacity > 0) layer.setIcon(turnArrowDivIcon(iconPx));
            if (typeof layer.setOpacity === 'function') layer.setOpacity(opacity);
            if (layer._map && typeof layer.update === 'function') layer.update();
          }
        });
      };
      turnArrowZoomRaf = typeof window.requestAnimationFrame === 'function' ? window.requestAnimationFrame(run) : setTimeout(run, 0);
    }

    function syncNavigationRouteTurnArrowsWithProgress(progressArcMeters) {
      if (!state.map || !state.navigationRouteTurnArrowLayer || !Number.isFinite(progressArcMeters)) return;
      state.navigationRouteTurnArrowLayer.eachLayer(function (layer) {
        if (!layer || !layer._navigationTurnMarker || layer._navigationTurnPassed) return;
        const marker = layer._navigationTurnMarker;
        const turnArc = Number(layer._navigationTurnArcMeters);
        const endArc = Number(layer._navigationTurnEndArcMeters);
        if (Number.isFinite(turnArc) && turnArc <= progressArcMeters - 3) {
          layer._navigationTurnPassed = marker._navigationTurnPassed = true;
          if (layer.remove) layer.remove();
          if (marker.remove) marker.remove();
          return;
        }
        const startArc = Math.max(Number(layer._navigationTurnStartArcMeters) || 0, progressArcMeters);
        if (Number.isFinite(endArc) && endArc > startArc) {
          const segment = routeCoordsBetweenArcs(state.navigationRouteBaselineCoords, state.navigationRouteBaselineCumulative, startArc, endArc);
          if (segment.length >= 2) {
            layer._navigationTurnSegment = segment;
            layer._navigationTurnCumulative = buildCumulativeMetersForCoords(segment);
          }
        }
        if (layer.bringToFront) layer.bringToFront();
        if (marker.bringToFront) marker.bringToFront();
      });
    }

    function shouldRenderNavigationRouteTurnArrow(stepItem, transportMode) {
      if (!isTurnManeuverStep(stepItem)) return false;
      if (transportMode === 'driving') return true;
      const maneuver = stepItem.maneuver || {};
      const modifier = String(maneuver.modifier || '');
      const maneuverType = String(maneuver.type || '');
      const stepDistance = Number(stepItem.distance);
      if (modifier.indexOf('uturn') >= 0 || maneuverType === 'roundabout' || maneuverType === 'rotary') return true;
      if (modifier.indexOf('left') < 0 && modifier.indexOf('right') < 0) return false;
      return !Number.isFinite(stepDistance) || stepDistance >= (transportMode === 'cycling' ? 25 : 14);
    }

    function buildNavigationRouteTurnArrows(routeObject, routeCoords, cumulativeMeters, transportMode) {
      clearNavigationRouteTurnArrows();
      if (!state.map || !Array.isArray(routeCoords) || routeCoords.length < 2) return;
      const totalMeters = cumulativeMeters[cumulativeMeters.length - 1] || 0;
      const layers = collectOsrmStepsFromRouteObject(routeObject)
        .filter(function (stepItem) { return shouldRenderNavigationRouteTurnArrow(stepItem, transportMode || 'driving'); })
        .map(function (stepItem) {
          const maneuver = stepItem.maneuver || {};
          const isUturn = String(maneuver.modifier || '').indexOf('uturn') >= 0;
          const location = Array.isArray(maneuver.location) ? maneuver.location : null;
          const lat = location && Number(location[1]);
          const lon = location && Number(location[0]);
          if (!Number.isFinite(lat) || !Number.isFinite(lon)) return null;
          const projection = projectOntoRouteCoords(routeCoords, cumulativeMeters, lat, lon);
          if (!projection) return null;
          const compactMode = transportMode === 'walking' || transportMode === 'cycling';
          const beforeMeters = compactMode ? (transportMode === 'cycling' ? 16 : 10) : NAV_ROUTE_TURN_ARROW_BEFORE_M;
          const afterMeters = compactMode ? (transportMode === 'cycling' ? 14 : 9) : NAV_ROUTE_TURN_ARROW_AFTER_M;
          const startArc = Math.max(0, projection.arcMeters - (isUturn ? beforeMeters * 2 : beforeMeters));
          const endArc = Math.min(totalMeters, projection.arcMeters + (isUturn ? afterMeters * 2 : afterMeters));
          const segment = routeCoordsBetweenArcs(routeCoords, cumulativeMeters, startArc, endArc);
          if (segment.length < 2) return null;
          const marker = L.marker(segment[0], navigationRouteTurnArrowMarkerOptions(bearingBetweenLatLngs(segment[0], segment[1])));
          const line = L.polyline([segment[0]], withVectorRenderer({
            color: '#EEFF00',
            weight: NAV_ROUTE_CORE_WEIGHT,
            opacity: NAV_ROUTE_CORE_OPACITY,
            lineCap: 'round',
            lineJoin: 'round',
            interactive: false
          }));
          marker._isNavigationRouteTurnArrow = true;
          Object.assign(line, { _navigationTurnMarker: marker, _navigationTurnArcMeters: projection.arcMeters, _navigationTurnStartArcMeters: startArc, _navigationTurnEndArcMeters: endArc, _navigationTurnSegment: segment, _navigationTurnCumulative: buildCumulativeMetersForCoords(segment) });
          Object.assign(marker, { _navigationTurnArcMeters: projection.arcMeters, _navigationTurnLine: line });
          return [line, marker];
        })
        .flat()
        .filter(Boolean);
      if (layers.length > 0) {
        state.navigationRouteTurnArrowLayer = L.layerGroup(layers).addTo(state.map);
        scheduleNavigationRouteTurnArrowZoomSync();
        animateNavigationRouteTurnArrows();
      }
    }

    function clearNavigationRouteConnectorLine(lineKey) {
      if (state[lineKey] && state.map) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state[lineKey]);
      }
      state[lineKey] = null;
    }

    function updateNavigationRouteConnectorLine(lineKey, fromLatLng, toLatLng) {
      if (!state.map || !Array.isArray(fromLatLng) || fromLatLng.length < 2 ||
        !Array.isArray(toLatLng) || toLatLng.length < 2 ||
        !Number.isFinite(fromLatLng[0]) || !Number.isFinite(fromLatLng[1]) ||
        !Number.isFinite(toLatLng[0]) || !Number.isFinite(toLatLng[1])) {
        clearNavigationRouteConnectorLine(lineKey);
        return;
      }
      const connectorMeters = haversineKilometers(fromLatLng[0], fromLatLng[1], toLatLng[0], toLatLng[1]) * 1000;
      if (connectorMeters < NAV_ROUTE_ACCESS_CONNECTOR_MIN_M) {
        clearNavigationRouteConnectorLine(lineKey);
        return;
      }
      const connectorCoords = [[fromLatLng[0], fromLatLng[1]], [toLatLng[0], toLatLng[1]]];
      if (state[lineKey] && typeof state[lineKey].setLatLngs === 'function') {
        state[lineKey].setLatLngs(connectorCoords);
        return;
      }
      state[lineKey] = L.polyline(connectorCoords, withVectorRenderer({
        color: NAV_ROUTE_CORE_COLOR,
        weight: NAV_ROUTE_CORE_WEIGHT,
        opacity: 0.8,
        dashArray: '2 10',
        lineCap: 'round',
        interactive: false
      })).addTo(state.map);
    }

    function clearNavigationRouteAccessLine() {
      clearNavigationRouteConnectorLine('navigationRouteAccessLine');
    }

    function clearNavigationRouteDestinationAccessLine() {
      clearNavigationRouteConnectorLine('navigationRouteDestinationAccessLine');
    }

    function updateNavigationRouteAccessConnector(fromLat, fromLon, routeLatLng) {
      updateNavigationRouteConnectorLine('navigationRouteAccessLine', [fromLat, fromLon], routeLatLng);
    }

    function updateNavigationRouteDestinationConnector(routeLatLng, destination) {
      updateNavigationRouteConnectorLine(
        'navigationRouteDestinationAccessLine',
        routeLatLng,
        destination ? [destination.lat, destination.lon] : null
      );
    }

    function removeNavigationRouteOverlayLayers() {
      clearNavigationRouteAccessLine();
      clearNavigationRouteDestinationAccessLine();
      clearNavigationRouteTurnArrows();
      if (state.navigationRouteCoreLine && state.map) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.navigationRouteCoreLine);
      }
      state.navigationRouteCoreLine = null;
      if (state.navigationRouteCasingLine && state.map) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.navigationRouteCasingLine);
      }
      state.navigationRouteCasingLine = null;
      state.routeLine = null;
    }

    function resetNavigationRouteOverlayState() {
      removeNavigationRouteOverlayLayers();
      state.navigationRouteTrimPendingLatLng = null;
      state.navigationRouteCoords = [];
      state.navigationRouteCumulativeMeters = [];
      state.navigationRouteBaselineCoords = [];
      state.navigationRouteBaselineCumulative = [];
      state.navigationRouteProgressArcMeters = 0;
      state.navigationLiveSnapToPositionActive = false;
      state.navigationLiveSnapLastActiveAtMs = 0;
      state.navigationPrevWrongWayLatLng = null;
      state.navigationRouteLastBaselineArcMeters = null;
      state.navigationRouteTotalMeters = 0;
      state.navigationRouteStart = null;
      state.navigationRouteDestination = null;
      state.navigationRouteTransportMode = null;
      state.navigationRouteWaypointsSnapshot = [];
      state.activeNavigationRouteCacheKey = '';
      state.navigationOffRouteConsecutiveTickCount = 0;
      state.navigationRerouteInFlight = false;
      clearNavigationRouteLivePolling();
    }

    function clearNavigationRouteLivePolling() {
      if (state.navigationRouteLiveTimerId !== null) {
        clearInterval(state.navigationRouteLiveTimerId);
        state.navigationRouteLiveTimerId = null;
      }
    }

    function beginNavigationRouteLivePolling() {
      clearNavigationRouteLivePolling();
      if (!navigationRouteIsActive() || !state.navigationRouteDestination) return;
      state.navigationRouteLiveTimerId = window.setInterval(function () {
        if (!navigationRouteIsActive() || !state.navigationRouteDestination) {
          clearNavigationRouteLivePolling();
          return;
        }
        fetchLastPositionRecord().then(function (positionRecord) {
          if (positionRecord) processNavigationRouteLiveUpdate(positionRecord);
        }).catch(function () { /* ignore */ });
      }, NAV_ROUTE_LIVE_POLL_MS);
    }

    function getNavigationStartLatLng(fallbackLat, fallbackLon) {
      if (navigationMapDockControlsMap()) {
        return [fallbackLat, fallbackLon];
      }
      if (state.currentMarker && typeof state.currentMarker.getLatLng === 'function') {
        const markerLatLng = state.currentMarker.getLatLng();
        if (markerLatLng && Number.isFinite(markerLatLng.lat) && Number.isFinite(markerLatLng.lng)) {
          return [markerLatLng.lat, markerLatLng.lng];
        }
      }
      return [fallbackLat, fallbackLon];
    }

    function projectOntoRouteCoords(coords, cumulative, targetLat, targetLon) {
      if (!Array.isArray(coords) || coords.length < 2) {
        return null;
      }
      const latitudeToMeters = 111320;
      let bestPerpendicularSqMeters = Infinity;
      let bestSegmentIndex = 0;
      let bestSegmentParameter = 0;
      let bestProjectedLat = coords[0][0];
      let bestProjectedLon = coords[0][1];
      for (let segmentIndex = 0; segmentIndex < coords.length - 1; segmentIndex += 1) {
        const startCoord = coords[segmentIndex];
        const endCoord = coords[segmentIndex + 1];
        const averageLatRadians = ((startCoord[0] + endCoord[0]) / 2) * Math.PI / 180;
        const longitudeToMeters = 111320 * Math.cos(averageLatRadians);
        const startX = startCoord[1] * longitudeToMeters;
        const startY = startCoord[0] * latitudeToMeters;
        const endX = endCoord[1] * longitudeToMeters;
        const endY = endCoord[0] * latitudeToMeters;
        const targetX = targetLon * longitudeToMeters;
        const targetY = targetLat * latitudeToMeters;
        const segmentDx = endX - startX;
        const segmentDy = endY - startY;
        const segmentLengthSq = segmentDx * segmentDx + segmentDy * segmentDy;
        let parameter = 0;
        if (segmentLengthSq > 0) {
          parameter = ((targetX - startX) * segmentDx + (targetY - startY) * segmentDy) / segmentLengthSq;
          if (parameter < 0) parameter = 0;
          else if (parameter > 1) parameter = 1;
        }
        const projectedX = startX + parameter * segmentDx;
        const projectedY = startY + parameter * segmentDy;
        const deltaX = targetX - projectedX;
        const deltaY = targetY - projectedY;
        const perpendicularSq = deltaX * deltaX + deltaY * deltaY;
        if (perpendicularSq < bestPerpendicularSqMeters) {
          bestPerpendicularSqMeters = perpendicularSq;
          bestSegmentIndex = segmentIndex;
          bestSegmentParameter = parameter;
          bestProjectedLon = projectedX / longitudeToMeters;
          bestProjectedLat = projectedY / latitudeToMeters;
        }
      }
      const segmentLengthMeters = (cumulative[bestSegmentIndex + 1] || 0) - (cumulative[bestSegmentIndex] || 0);
      const arcMeters = (cumulative[bestSegmentIndex] || 0) + bestSegmentParameter * segmentLengthMeters;
      return {
        projectedLatLng: [bestProjectedLat, bestProjectedLon],
        segmentIndex: bestSegmentIndex,
        segmentParameter: bestSegmentParameter,
        perpendicularMeters: Math.sqrt(bestPerpendicularSqMeters),
        arcMeters: arcMeters
      };
    }

    function projectLatLngOntoNavigationRoute(targetLat, targetLon) {
      return projectOntoRouteCoords(
        state.navigationRouteCoords,
        state.navigationRouteCumulativeMeters,
        targetLat,
        targetLon
      );
    }

    function projectLatLngOntoNavigationBaseline(targetLat, targetLon) {
      return projectOntoRouteCoords(
        state.navigationRouteBaselineCoords,
        state.navigationRouteBaselineCumulative,
        targetLat,
        targetLon
      );
    }

    function routeBearingForCoordsAtSegment(coords, segmentIndex) {
      if (!Array.isArray(coords) || segmentIndex < 0 || segmentIndex >= coords.length - 1) return null;
      return bearingBetweenLatLngs(coords[segmentIndex], coords[segmentIndex + 1]);
    }

    function getPositionFusionRouteSnapMaxMeters(positionRecord) {
      const mode = state.navigationRouteTransportMode || getSelectedTransportModeFromDom();
      const baseMeters = mode === 'walking' ? 12 : (mode === 'cycling' ? 18 : NAV_ROUTE_LIVE_SNAP_TO_POSITION_MAX_M);
      const accuracyMeters = Number(positionRecord && positionRecord.accuracy);
      return Math.max(baseMeters, Math.min(NAV_REROUTE_OFF_ROUTE_M - 1, Number.isFinite(accuracyMeters) ? accuracyMeters * 1.5 : baseMeters));
    }

    function shouldUseRouteMatchedPosition(positionRecord, projection, fusionState) {
      if (!projection || !Number.isFinite(projection.perpendicularMeters)) return false;
      if (projection.perpendicularMeters > getPositionFusionRouteSnapMaxMeters(positionRecord)) return false;
      if (fusionState && Number.isFinite(fusionState.lastRouteArcMeters) &&
        projection.arcMeters < fusionState.lastRouteArcMeters - NAV_REROUTE_BACKTRACK_M) return false;
      const speedKmh = navigationSpeedKmhFromPositionRecord(positionRecord);
      const heading = normalizeHeadingDegrees(positionRecord && positionRecord.heading);
      if (heading !== null && speedKmh !== null && speedKmh >= NAV_REROUTE_MIN_SPEED_KMH) {
        const routeBearing = routeBearingForCoordsAtSegment(state.navigationRouteBaselineCoords, projection.segmentIndex);
        if (routeBearing !== null && circularBearingDifferenceDegrees(heading, routeBearing) > 115) return false;
      }
      return true;
    }

    function fusePositionForMap(positionRecord, options) {
      if (!positionRecord || typeof positionRecord.lat !== 'number' || typeof positionRecord.lon !== 'number') return positionRecord;
      const rawLat = Number.isFinite(Number(positionRecord.rawLat)) ? Number(positionRecord.rawLat) : positionRecord.lat;
      const rawLon = Number.isFinite(Number(positionRecord.rawLon)) ? Number(positionRecord.rawLon) : positionRecord.lon;
      if (!Number.isFinite(rawLat) || !Number.isFinite(rawLon)) return positionRecord;
      const deviceKey = positionEntryDeviceKey(positionRecord) || getSelectedDeviceKey() || '_current';
      const fusionState = state.positionFusionByDeviceKey[deviceKey] || (state.positionFusionByDeviceKey[deviceKey] = {});
      const routeFingerprint = Array.isArray(state.navigationRouteBaselineCoords)
        ? state.navigationRouteBaselineCoords.length + ':' + Math.round(state.navigationRouteTotalMeters || 0)
        : '';
      if (fusionState.routeFingerprint !== routeFingerprint) {
        fusionState.routeFingerprint = routeFingerprint;
        fusionState.lastRouteArcMeters = null;
      }
      let fusedLat = rawLat;
      let fusedLon = rawLon;
      let fusedAccuracy = positionRecord.accuracy;
      let fusedSpeed = positionRecord.speed;
      let fusedHeading = positionRecord.heading;
      let reason = 'raw';
      let projection = null;
      const profileFilters = positionRecord.filters || {};
      const profileNumber = function (key, fallback, min, max) {
        const value = Number(profileFilters[key]);
        return Number.isFinite(value) ? Math.min(max, Math.max(min, value)) : fallback;
      };
      const minMoveMeters = profileNumber('minMoveM', 1, 0.2, 20);
      const walkingSpeedKmh = profileNumber('walkingSpeedKmh', POSITION_FUSION_WALKING_SPEED_KMH, 0.5, 8);
      let movingSpeedKmh = profileNumber('movingSpeedKmh', 3, 1, 30);
      if (movingSpeedKmh < walkingSpeedKmh) movingSpeedKmh = walkingSpeedKmh;
      const stationaryBaseMeters = profileNumber('stationaryRadiusM', POSITION_FUSION_STATIONARY_RADIUS_M, 3, 80);
      const stationaryMaxMeters = Math.max(stationaryBaseMeters, profileNumber('stationaryMaxRadiusM', POSITION_FUSION_STATIONARY_MAX_RADIUS_M, 3, 150));
      const confirmPoints = Math.round(profileNumber('confirmPoints', POSITION_FUSION_STATIONARY_EXIT_CONFIRM_POINTS, 1, 8));
      const walkingMoveMeters = Math.min(minMoveMeters, POSITION_FUSION_WALKING_MOVE_M);
      const allowRouteSnap = !options || options.allowRouteSnap !== false;
      const allowStationaryHold = !options || options.allowStationaryHold !== false;
      if (allowRouteSnap && state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive && state.navigationRouteStart &&
        state.navigationRouteStart.kind === 'currentLocation' && navigationRouteIsActive()) {
        projection = projectLatLngOntoNavigationBaseline(rawLat, rawLon);
        if (shouldUseRouteMatchedPosition(positionRecord, projection, fusionState)) {
          fusedLat = projection.projectedLatLng[0];
          fusedLon = projection.projectedLatLng[1];
          reason = 'route';
        }
      }
      const previousRaw = fusionState.lastRawLatLng;
      const previousFused = fusionState.lastFusedLatLng;
      const rawMoveMeters = previousRaw ? haversineKilometers(previousRaw[0], previousRaw[1], rawLat, rawLon) * 1000 : Infinity;
      const fusedMoveMeters = previousFused ? haversineKilometers(previousFused[0], previousFused[1], rawLat, rawLon) * 1000 : Infinity;
      const motionMoveMeters = Math.max(rawMoveMeters, fusedMoveMeters);
      const speedKmh = navigationSpeedKmhFromPositionRecord(positionRecord);
      const accuracyMeters = Number(positionRecord.accuracy);
      const stationaryRadiusMeters = Math.max(stationaryBaseMeters, Math.min(stationaryMaxMeters, Number.isFinite(accuracyMeters) ? accuracyMeters * 1.5 : stationaryBaseMeters));
      const routeProgressMeters = projection && Number.isFinite(projection.arcMeters) && Number.isFinite(fusionState.lastRouteArcMeters)
        ? projection.arcMeters - fusionState.lastRouteArcMeters
        : Infinity;
      if (previousFused && fusedMoveMeters <= stationaryRadiusMeters) fusionState.stationaryExitCount = 0;
      const noSpeedShouldHoldStill = speedKmh === null && previousFused && fusedMoveMeters > stationaryRadiusMeters &&
        (fusionState.stationaryExitCount = (fusionState.stationaryExitCount || 0) + 1) < confirmPoints;
      const gpsMotionCandidate = speedKmh !== null &&
        ((speedKmh >= movingSpeedKmh && motionMoveMeters >= Math.max(minMoveMeters, 1.5)) ||
          (speedKmh >= walkingSpeedKmh && motionMoveMeters >= walkingMoveMeters));
      const gpsMotionConfirmed = gpsMotionCandidate && (motionMoveMeters > Math.max(35, stationaryRadiusMeters * 1.5) ||
        (fusionState.motionConfirmCount = (fusionState.motionConfirmCount || 0) + 1) >= confirmPoints);
      if (!gpsMotionCandidate) fusionState.motionConfirmCount = 0;
      const shouldHoldStill = previousFused && (
        gpsMotionConfirmed ? false : speedKmh !== null
          ? speedKmh < walkingSpeedKmh || rawMoveMeters <= stationaryRadiusMeters
          : (fusedMoveMeters <= stationaryRadiusMeters || noSpeedShouldHoldStill)
      );
      if (previousFused && allowStationaryHold && shouldHoldStill &&
        (!Number.isFinite(routeProgressMeters) || routeProgressMeters < NAV_ROUTE_LIVE_SNAP_MIN_PROGRESS_M)) {
        fusedLat = previousFused[0];
        fusedLon = previousFused[1];
        fusedAccuracy = fusionState.lastFusedAccuracy != null ? fusionState.lastFusedAccuracy : positionRecord.accuracy;
        fusedSpeed = speedKmh !== null && speedKmh >= walkingSpeedKmh ? speedKmh : 0;
        fusedHeading = normalizeHeadingDegrees(positionRecord.heading) !== null ? positionRecord.heading : fusionState.lastFusedHeading;
        reason = reason === 'route' ? 'route-stationary' : 'stationary';
      } else {
        fusionState.stationaryExitCount = 0;
        fusionState.motionConfirmCount = 0;
      }
      if (previousFused && reason !== 'stationary' && reason !== 'route-stationary') {
        const headingMoveMeters = haversineKilometers(previousFused[0], previousFused[1], fusedLat, fusedLon) * 1000;
        if (headingMoveMeters >= walkingMoveMeters) {
          const moveHeading = inferHeadingDegreesFromMovement(previousFused[0], previousFused[1], fusedLat, fusedLon);
          if (normalizeHeadingDegrees(moveHeading) !== null &&
              (speedKmh === null || speedKmh >= walkingSpeedKmh || normalizeHeadingDegrees(fusedHeading) === null)) {
            fusedHeading = moveHeading;
          }
        }
      }
      if (projection && reason.indexOf('route') === 0) {
        fusionState.lastRouteArcMeters = Math.max(fusionState.lastRouteArcMeters || 0, projection.arcMeters);
      }
      fusionState.lastRawLatLng = [rawLat, rawLon];
      fusionState.lastFusedLatLng = [fusedLat, fusedLon];
      fusionState.lastFusedAccuracy = fusedAccuracy;
      fusionState.lastFusedHeading = fusedHeading;
      return Object.assign({}, positionRecord, {
        rawLat: rawLat,
        rawLon: rawLon,
        lat: fusedLat,
        lon: fusedLon,
        accuracy: fusedAccuracy,
        speed: fusedSpeed,
        heading: fusedHeading,
        mapLat: fusedLat,
        mapLon: fusedLon,
        mapMatchReason: reason,
        mapMatchPerpendicularMeters: projection ? projection.perpendicularMeters : null
      });
    }

    function mapTrackingPointEntryForDisplay(pointEntry) {
      if (!pointEntry || typeof pointEntry.lat !== 'number' || typeof pointEntry.lon !== 'number') return pointEntry;
      if (!state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive || !navigationRouteIsActive()) return pointEntry;
      const projection = projectLatLngOntoNavigationBaseline(pointEntry.lat, pointEntry.lon);
      if (!shouldUseRouteMatchedPosition(pointEntry, projection, null)) return pointEntry;
      return Object.assign({}, pointEntry, {
        rawLat: pointEntry.lat,
        rawLon: pointEntry.lon,
        lat: projection.projectedLatLng[0],
        lon: projection.projectedLatLng[1],
        mapLat: projection.projectedLatLng[0],
        mapLon: projection.projectedLatLng[1]
      });
    }

    function estimateDistanceAlongNavigationRouteToLatLng(targetLat, targetLon, userLat, userLon) {
      if (!navigationRouteIsActive() || !Number.isFinite(targetLat) || !Number.isFinite(targetLon)) {
        return null;
      }
      const userProjection = Number.isFinite(userLat) && Number.isFinite(userLon)
        ? projectLatLngOntoNavigationBaseline(userLat, userLon)
        : projectLatLngOntoNavigationBaseline(getNavigationStartLatLng(targetLat, targetLon)[0], getNavigationStartLatLng(targetLat, targetLon)[1]);
      const targetProjection = projectLatLngOntoNavigationBaseline(targetLat, targetLon);
      if (!userProjection || !targetProjection) {
        return null;
      }
      const progressArcMeters = Number.isFinite(userLat) && Number.isFinite(userLon)
        ? userProjection.arcMeters
        : (typeof state.navigationRouteProgressArcMeters === 'number' &&
          Number.isFinite(state.navigationRouteProgressArcMeters)
          ? state.navigationRouteProgressArcMeters
          : userProjection.arcMeters);
      return Math.max(0, targetProjection.arcMeters - progressArcMeters);
    }

    function computeDistanceToManeuverMeters(userLat, userLon, stepItem) {
      const maneuverLatLng = getManeuverLatLngFromGuidanceStep(stepItem);
      if (!maneuverLatLng) {
        return null;
      }
      const alongRouteMeters = estimateDistanceAlongNavigationRouteToLatLng(
        maneuverLatLng.lat,
        maneuverLatLng.lon,
        userLat,
        userLon
      );
      if (alongRouteMeters !== null && Number.isFinite(alongRouteMeters) && alongRouteMeters > 0) {
        return alongRouteMeters;
      }
      if (!Number.isFinite(userLat) || !Number.isFinite(userLon)) {
        return null;
      }
      return haversineKilometers(userLat, userLon, maneuverLatLng.lat, maneuverLatLng.lon) * 1000;
    }

    function applyNavigationRouteTrim(latitude, longitude, projection, options) {
      if (!projection || !Array.isArray(state.navigationRouteBaselineCoords)) return;
      if (!Number.isFinite(latitude) || !Number.isFinite(longitude)) return;
      const coords = state.navigationRouteBaselineCoords;
      const projectedAnchor = Array.isArray(projection.projectedLatLng) && projection.projectedLatLng.length >= 2
        && Number.isFinite(Number(projection.projectedLatLng[0]))
        && Number.isFinite(Number(projection.projectedLatLng[1]))
        ? [Number(projection.projectedLatLng[0]), Number(projection.projectedLatLng[1])]
        : null;
      const snapToPosition = options && Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(options, 'snapToPosition')
        ? !!options.snapToPosition
        : !!state.navigationLiveSnapToPositionActive;
      const isNearRoute = !projectedAnchor ||
        (snapToPosition &&
          Number.isFinite(projection.perpendicularMeters) &&
          projection.perpendicularMeters < NAV_ROUTE_LIVE_SNAP_TO_POSITION_MAX_M);
      const routeAnchor = isNearRoute ? [latitude, longitude] : projectedAnchor;
      if (isNearRoute) {
        clearNavigationRouteAccessLine();
      } else {
        updateNavigationRouteAccessConnector(latitude, longitude, routeAnchor);
      }
      const remaining = [[routeAnchor[0], routeAnchor[1]]].concat(coords.slice(projection.segmentIndex + 1));
      ['navigationRouteCasingLine', 'navigationRouteCoreLine'].forEach(function (lineKey) {
        if (state[lineKey] && typeof state[lineKey].setLatLngs === 'function') state[lineKey].setLatLngs(remaining);
      });
      syncNavigationRouteTurnArrowsWithProgress(state.navigationRouteProgressArcMeters || 0);
      if (remaining.length < 2) return;
      state.navigationRouteCoords = remaining;
      state.navigationRouteCumulativeMeters = buildCumulativeMetersForCoords(remaining);
    }

    function updateNavigationRouteRemainingForLatLng(latitude, longitude, options) {
      if (!navigationRouteIsActive()) return null;
      if (!Number.isFinite(latitude) || !Number.isFinite(longitude)) return null;
      const projection = projectLatLngOntoNavigationBaseline(latitude, longitude);
      if (!projection) return null;
      state.navigationRouteProgressArcMeters = Math.max(state.navigationRouteProgressArcMeters || 0, projection.arcMeters);
      if (state.map && (state.mapZoomGestureInProgress || state.map._animatingZoom)) {
        state.navigationRouteTrimPendingLatLng = [latitude, longitude];
        return projection;
      }
      state.navigationRouteTrimPendingLatLng = null;
      applyNavigationRouteTrim(latitude, longitude, projection, options);
      return projection;
    }

    function inferHeadingDegreesFromMovement(fromLat, fromLon, toLat, toLon) {
      const startLatRad = fromLat * Math.PI / 180;
      const endLatRad = toLat * Math.PI / 180;
      const lonDeltaRad = (toLon - fromLon) * Math.PI / 180;
      const y = Math.sin(lonDeltaRad) * Math.cos(endLatRad);
      const x = Math.cos(startLatRad) * Math.sin(endLatRad) -
        Math.sin(startLatRad) * Math.cos(endLatRad) * Math.cos(lonDeltaRad);
      return (Math.atan2(y, x) * 180 / Math.PI + 360) % 360;
    }

    function enrichPositionForWrongWayCheck(positionRecord, latitude, longitude) {
      const enriched = Object.assign({}, positionRecord);
      const previousLatLng = state.navigationPrevWrongWayLatLng;
      let moveMeters = 0;
      if (previousLatLng && Array.isArray(previousLatLng) && previousLatLng.length >= 2) {
        moveMeters = haversineKilometers(previousLatLng[0], previousLatLng[1], latitude, longitude) * 1000;
      }
      if (normalizeHeadingDegrees(enriched.heading) === null && moveMeters >= NAV_REROUTE_MIN_MOVE_M) {
        enriched.heading = inferHeadingDegreesFromMovement(
          previousLatLng[0], previousLatLng[1], latitude, longitude
        );
      }
      const speedKmh = typeof enriched.speed === 'number' && Number.isFinite(enriched.speed)
        ? enriched.speed
        : NaN;
      if ((!Number.isFinite(speedKmh) || speedKmh < NAV_REROUTE_MIN_SPEED_KMH) && moveMeters >= NAV_REROUTE_MIN_MOVE_M) {
        enriched.speed = (moveMeters / (NAV_GUIDANCE_COMPACT_POLL_MS / 1000)) * 3.6;
      }
      return enriched;
    }

    function shouldTriggerNavigationReroute(positionRecord, latitude, longitude, projection) {
      if (!projection || !state.navigationRouteDestination) return false;
      const previousLatLng = state.navigationPrevWrongWayLatLng;
      let moveMeters = 0;
      if (previousLatLng && previousLatLng.length >= 2) {
        moveMeters = haversineKilometers(previousLatLng[0], previousLatLng[1], latitude, longitude) * 1000;
      }
      if (moveMeters < NAV_REROUTE_MIN_MOVE_M) return false;

      const nearRouteToleranceMeters = getPositionFusionRouteSnapMaxMeters(positionRecord);
      if (Number.isFinite(projection.perpendicularMeters) &&
        projection.perpendicularMeters < nearRouteToleranceMeters) return false;

      if (projection.perpendicularMeters >= NAV_REROUTE_OFF_ROUTE_M) return true;

      const baselineProjection = projectLatLngOntoNavigationBaseline(latitude, longitude);
      if (baselineProjection) {
        const lastArc = state.navigationRouteLastBaselineArcMeters;
        if (lastArc !== null && baselineProjection.arcMeters < lastArc - NAV_REROUTE_BACKTRACK_M) {
          return true;
        }
        state.navigationRouteLastBaselineArcMeters = Math.max(lastArc || 0, baselineProjection.arcMeters);
      }

      const enrichedRecord = enrichPositionForWrongWayCheck(positionRecord, latitude, longitude);
      const heading = normalizeHeadingDegrees(enrichedRecord.heading);
      const routeBearing = routeBearingAtSegment(projection.segmentIndex);
      if (heading !== null && routeBearing !== null &&
        circularBearingDifferenceDegrees(heading, routeBearing) > NAV_REROUTE_HEADING_DELTA_DEG) {
        return true;
      }
      return false;
    }

    function getNavigationLiveMoveMeters(latitude, longitude) {
      const previousLatLng = state.navigationPrevWrongWayLatLng;
      return previousLatLng && previousLatLng.length >= 2
        ? haversineKilometers(previousLatLng[0], previousLatLng[1], latitude, longitude) * 1000
        : 0;
    }

    function shouldSnapNavigationRouteToLivePosition(positionRecord, latitude, longitude, projection, moveMeters, shouldReroute) {
      if (shouldReroute || !projection || !Number.isFinite(projection.perpendicularMeters) ||
        projection.perpendicularMeters >= NAV_ROUTE_LIVE_SNAP_TO_POSITION_MAX_M) {
        return false;
      }
      const baselineProjection = projectLatLngOntoNavigationBaseline(latitude, longitude);
      if (!baselineProjection || !Number.isFinite(baselineProjection.arcMeters)) {
        return false;
      }
      const previousProgress = Number.isFinite(state.navigationRouteProgressArcMeters)
        ? state.navigationRouteProgressArcMeters
        : 0;
      const speedKmh = navigationSpeedKmhFromPositionRecord(positionRecord);
      const isMoving = moveMeters >= NAV_REROUTE_MIN_MOVE_M ||
        (speedKmh !== null && speedKmh >= NAV_REROUTE_MIN_SPEED_KMH);
      const hasForwardProgress = baselineProjection.arcMeters >= previousProgress + NAV_ROUTE_LIVE_SNAP_MIN_PROGRESS_M;
      const hasFreshSnap = state.navigationLiveSnapToPositionActive &&
        Date.now() - state.navigationLiveSnapLastActiveAtMs < NAV_ROUTE_LIVE_SNAP_GRACE_MS;
      return (isMoving && hasForwardProgress) ||
        (hasFreshSnap && baselineProjection.arcMeters >= previousProgress - NAV_ROUTE_LIVE_SNAP_MIN_PROGRESS_M);
    }

    function processNavigationRouteLiveUpdate(positionRecord) {
      if (!state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive) {
        return;
      }
      if (state.navigationRouteStart && state.navigationRouteStart.kind !== 'currentLocation') {
        return;
      }
      if (!positionRecord || typeof positionRecord.lat !== 'number' || typeof positionRecord.lon !== 'number') {
        return;
      }
      const latitude = Number.isFinite(positionRecord.rawLat) ? positionRecord.rawLat : positionRecord.lat;
      const longitude = Number.isFinite(positionRecord.rawLon) ? positionRecord.rawLon : positionRecord.lon;
      const startLatLng = getNavigationStartLatLng(latitude, longitude);
      const projection = projectLatLngOntoNavigationRoute(latitude, longitude);
      if (!navigationRouteIsActive() || !state.navigationRouteDestination) {
        state.navigationPrevWrongWayLatLng = [latitude, longitude];
        return;
      }
      const moveMeters = getNavigationLiveMoveMeters(latitude, longitude);
      const shouldReroute = shouldTriggerNavigationReroute(positionRecord, latitude, longitude, projection);
      const shouldSnapToPosition = shouldSnapNavigationRouteToLivePosition(
        positionRecord,
        latitude,
        longitude,
        projection,
        moveMeters,
        shouldReroute
      );
      state.navigationLiveSnapToPositionActive = shouldSnapToPosition;
      if (shouldSnapToPosition) {
        state.navigationLiveSnapLastActiveAtMs = Date.now();
      }
      const previousWrongWayLatLng = state.navigationPrevWrongWayLatLng;
      const rerouteHeading = previousWrongWayLatLng && previousWrongWayLatLng.length >= 2 &&
        moveMeters >= NAV_REROUTE_MIN_MOVE_M
        ? inferHeadingDegreesFromMovement(previousWrongWayLatLng[0], previousWrongWayLatLng[1], latitude, longitude)
        : normalizeHeadingDegrees(positionRecord.heading);
      const trimProjection = navigationMapDockControlsMap() && state.autoFollowEnabled
        ? projection
        : updateNavigationRouteRemainingForLatLng(startLatLng[0], startLatLng[1], {
          snapToPosition: shouldSnapToPosition
        });
      if (shouldReroute) {
        state.navigationOffRouteConsecutiveTickCount += 1;
      } else {
        state.navigationOffRouteConsecutiveTickCount = 0;
      }
      state.navigationPrevWrongWayLatLng = [latitude, longitude];
      if (state.navigationOffRouteConsecutiveTickCount >= NAV_REROUTE_CONFIRM_TICKS) {
        state.navigationOffRouteConsecutiveTickCount = 0;
        recomputeActiveNavigationRouteFrom(startLatLng[0], startLatLng[1], rerouteHeading).catch(function () {
          /* ignore */
        });
      }
    }

    function routeBearingAtSegment(segmentIndex) {
      const coords = state.navigationRouteCoords;
      if (!Array.isArray(coords) || segmentIndex < 0 || segmentIndex >= coords.length - 1) {
        return null;
      }
      const startLatRad = coords[segmentIndex][0] * Math.PI / 180;
      const endLatRad = coords[segmentIndex + 1][0] * Math.PI / 180;
      const lonDeltaRad = (coords[segmentIndex + 1][1] - coords[segmentIndex][1]) * Math.PI / 180;
      const y = Math.sin(lonDeltaRad) * Math.cos(endLatRad);
      const x = Math.cos(startLatRad) * Math.sin(endLatRad) -
        Math.sin(startLatRad) * Math.cos(endLatRad) * Math.cos(lonDeltaRad);
      const bearingDeg = Math.atan2(y, x) * 180 / Math.PI;
      return (bearingDeg + 360) % 360;
    }

    function circularBearingDifferenceDegrees(bearingA, bearingB) {
      const delta = Math.abs(bearingA - bearingB) % 360;
      return delta > 180 ? 360 - delta : delta;
    }

    function latLngAheadByBearing(latitude, longitude, bearingDegrees, distanceMeters) {
      const radiusMeters = 6371000;
      const distanceRatio = distanceMeters / radiusMeters;
      const bearingRad = bearingDegrees * Math.PI / 180;
      const latRad = latitude * Math.PI / 180;
      const lonRad = longitude * Math.PI / 180;
      const nextLatRad = Math.asin(Math.sin(latRad) * Math.cos(distanceRatio) +
        Math.cos(latRad) * Math.sin(distanceRatio) * Math.cos(bearingRad));
      const nextLonRad = lonRad + Math.atan2(
        Math.sin(bearingRad) * Math.sin(distanceRatio) * Math.cos(latRad),
        Math.cos(distanceRatio) - Math.sin(latRad) * Math.sin(nextLatRad)
      );
      return { lat: nextLatRad * 180 / Math.PI, lon: nextLonRad * 180 / Math.PI };
    }

    function filterRemainingWaypointsByArc(userArcMeters) {
      const snapshot = Array.isArray(state.navigationRouteWaypointsSnapshot)
        ? state.navigationRouteWaypointsSnapshot
        : [];
      if (snapshot.length === 0) return [];
      const remaining = [];
      snapshot.forEach(function (waypointItem) {
        const waypointProjection = projectLatLngOntoNavigationBaseline(waypointItem.lat, waypointItem.lon);
        if (!waypointProjection || waypointProjection.arcMeters > userArcMeters + NAV_ROUTE_WAYPOINT_PASSED_BUFFER_M) {
          remaining.push(waypointItem);
        }
      });
      return remaining;
    }

    async function recomputeActiveNavigationRouteFrom(userLat, userLon, rerouteHeading) {
      if (state.navigationRerouteInFlight) return;
      if (Date.now() - state.navigationLastRerouteAtMs < NAV_REROUTE_MIN_INTERVAL_MS) return;
      const destination = state.navigationRouteDestination;
      if (!destination || typeof destination.lat !== 'number' || typeof destination.lon !== 'number') return;
      const startLatLng = getNavigationStartLatLng(userLat, userLon);
      const transportMode = state.navigationRouteTransportMode || getSelectedTransportModeFromDom();
      const userArcMeters = state.navigationRouteProgressArcMeters || 0;
      const remainingWaypoints = filterRemainingWaypointsByArc(userArcMeters);
      const safeRerouteHeading = normalizeHeadingDegrees(rerouteHeading);
      if (transportMode === 'driving' && safeRerouteHeading === null) return;
      const forwardWaypoint = transportMode === 'driving'
        ? latLngAheadByBearing(startLatLng[0], startLatLng[1], safeRerouteHeading, NAV_REROUTE_FORWARD_WAYPOINT_M)
        : null;
      if (forwardWaypoint) forwardWaypoint.bearing = safeRerouteHeading;
      state.navigationRerouteInFlight = true;
      try {
        const routeResult = await fetchRouteGeometry(
          startLatLng[0],
          startLatLng[1],
          destination.lat,
          destination.lon,
          transportMode,
          remainingWaypoints,
          transportMode === 'driving' && safeRerouteHeading !== null
            ? { startBearing: safeRerouteHeading, forwardWaypoint: forwardWaypoint, preventUTurn: true }
            : null
        );
        state.selectedWaypoints = remainingWaypoints.slice();
        state.navigationGuidanceStepIndex = 0;
        applyRouteOnMap(routeResult, destination, {
          transportMode: transportMode,
          waypoints: remainingWaypoints,
          actualStart: {
            lat: startLatLng[0],
            lon: startLatLng[1],
            label: state.navigationRouteStart && state.navigationRouteStart.label
              ? state.navigationRouteStart.label
              : 'Mein Standort',
            kind: 'currentLocation'
          },
          preserveCompactNavigation: true
        });
      } catch (rerouteError) {
        console.error('Reroute fehlgeschlagen:', rerouteError);
        if (!browserSeemsOnline()) {
          setNavigationInlineHint('Offline: lokales Rerouting nicht verfuegbar, bestehende Navigation laeuft weiter.');
        }
      } finally {
        state.navigationLastRerouteAtMs = Date.now();
        state.navigationRerouteInFlight = false;
      }
    }

    function hideRouteSuggestions() {
      const routeSuggestionsElement = byId('routeSuggestions');
      if (!routeSuggestionsElement) {
        return;
      }
      routeSuggestionsElement.classList.remove('open');
      routeSuggestionsElement.innerHTML = '';
      state.routeSuggestions = [];
      state.renderedRouteSuggestionCount = 0;
    }

    function hideWaypointSuggestions() {
      const waypointSuggestionsElement = byId('waypointSuggestions');
      if (!waypointSuggestionsElement) {
        return;
      }
      waypointSuggestionsElement.classList.remove('open');
      waypointSuggestionsElement.innerHTML = '';
      state.waypointSuggestions = [];
    }

    function escapeHtmlForDisplay(rawText) {
      return String(rawText == null ? '' : rawText)
        .replace(/&/g, '&')
        .replace(/</g, '<')
        .replace(/>/g, '>')
        .replace(/"/g, '"')
        .replace(/'/g, ''');
    }

    function buildFlexibleQueryRegexSource(queryText) {
      const trimmedQueryText = String(queryText || '').trim();
      if (!trimmedQueryText) {
        return '';
      }
      const escapedRegexSource = trimmedQueryText.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&');
      return escapedRegexSource.replace(/[\s\-]+/g, '[\\s\\-]+');
    }

    function buildHighlightedLabelHtml(labelText, queryText) {
      const safeLabel = escapeHtmlForDisplay(labelText);
      const flexibleSource = buildFlexibleQueryRegexSource(queryText);
      if (!flexibleSource) {
        return safeLabel;
      }
      const highlightRegex = new RegExp('(' + flexibleSource + ')', 'gi');
      return safeLabel.replace(highlightRegex, '<mark>$1</mark>');
    }

    function labelContainsQuery(labelText, queryText) {
      const flexibleSource = buildFlexibleQueryRegexSource(queryText);
      if (!flexibleSource) {
        return true;
      }
      const matchRegex = new RegExp(flexibleSource, 'i');
      return matchRegex.test(String(labelText || ''));
    }

    function buildSearchQueryVariants(trimmedQuery) {
      const queryVariantSet = new Set();
      if (!trimmedQuery) {
        return [];
      }
      queryVariantSet.add(trimmedQuery);
      const streetSuffixRegex = /(\S+)\s+(stra(?:ße|sse)|str\.?|platz|weg|allee|gasse|ring|damm|ufer|brücke|bruecke)\b/gi;
      const combinedVariant = trimmedQuery.replace(streetSuffixRegex, '$1$2');
      if (combinedVariant !== trimmedQuery) {
        queryVariantSet.add(combinedVariant);
      }
      const hyphenatedVariant = trimmedQuery.replace(streetSuffixRegex, '$1-$2');
      if (hyphenatedVariant !== trimmedQuery) {
        queryVariantSet.add(hyphenatedVariant);
      }
      if (trimmedQuery.indexOf('ß') !== -1) {
        queryVariantSet.add(trimmedQuery.replace(/ß/g, 'ss'));
      }
      if (/[äöüÄÖÜ]/.test(trimmedQuery)) {
        const umlautExpanded = trimmedQuery
          .replace(/ä/g, 'ae').replace(/ö/g, 'oe').replace(/ü/g, 'ue')
          .replace(/Ä/g, 'Ae').replace(/Ö/g, 'Oe').replace(/Ü/g, 'Ue');
        if (umlautExpanded !== trimmedQuery) {
          queryVariantSet.add(umlautExpanded);
        }
      }
      return Array.from(queryVariantSet).slice(0, 4);
    }

    function renderWaypointSuggestions() {
      const waypointSuggestionsElement = byId('waypointSuggestions');
      if (!waypointSuggestionsElement) {
        return;
      }
      waypointSuggestionsElement.innerHTML = '';
      if (!Array.isArray(state.waypointSuggestions) || state.waypointSuggestions.length === 0) {
        waypointSuggestionsElement.classList.remove('open');
        return;
      }
      const activeWaypointRowIdForQuery = state.waypointSuggestionTargetRowId || state.activeWaypointRowId;
      const activeWaypointInputElement = activeWaypointRowIdForQuery
        ? document.querySelector('input[data-waypoint-row-id="' + activeWaypointRowIdForQuery + '"]')
        : null;
      const currentWaypointQuery = activeWaypointInputElement ? activeWaypointInputElement.value : '';
      const matchingWaypointSuggestions = state.waypointSuggestions.filter(function (suggestionItem) {
        return suggestionItem && labelContainsQuery(suggestionItem.label, currentWaypointQuery);
      });
      if (matchingWaypointSuggestions.length === 0) {
        waypointSuggestionsElement.classList.remove('open');
        return;
      }
      matchingWaypointSuggestions.slice(0, 10).forEach(function (suggestionItem) {
        const suggestionElement = document.createElement('div');
        suggestionElement.className = 'suggestion-item';
        suggestionElement.innerHTML = buildHighlightedLabelHtml(suggestionItem.label, currentWaypointQuery);
        suggestionElement.addEventListener('click', function (clickEvent) {
          stopEventPropagation(clickEvent);
          const targetRowId = state.waypointSuggestionTargetRowId || state.activeWaypointRowId;
          const targetRowIndex = findWaypointRowIndexById(targetRowId);
          if (targetRowIndex < 0) {
            hideWaypointSuggestions();
            return;
          }
          const targetRowEntry = state.waypointEditorRows[targetRowIndex];
          targetRowEntry.suggestion = {
            lat: suggestionItem.lat,
            lon: suggestionItem.lon,
            label: suggestionItem.label
          };
          state.selectedWaypointSuggestion = null;
          state.awaitingWaypointPick = false;
          hideWaypointSuggestions();
          syncSelectedWaypointsFromEditorRows();
          renderWaypointDynamicRows();
          renderWaypointMarkers();
          updateWaypointButtonState();
          fitMapToRoutePoints();
        });
        waypointSuggestionsElement.appendChild(suggestionElement);
      });
      waypointSuggestionsElement.classList.add('open');
    }

    function appendSuggestionBatchToList() {
      const routeSuggestionsElement = byId('routeSuggestions');
      if (!routeSuggestionsElement) {
        return;
      }
      if (!Array.isArray(state.routeSuggestions) || state.routeSuggestions.length === 0) {
        return;
      }

      const currentRouteQuery = getActiveRouteSuggestionQuery();
      const fragment = document.createDocumentFragment();
      const renderEndIndex = Math.min(
        state.routeSuggestions.length,
        state.renderedRouteSuggestionCount + state.suggestionRenderBatchSize
      );
      for (let suggestionIndex = state.renderedRouteSuggestionCount; suggestionIndex < renderEndIndex; suggestionIndex += 1) {
        const suggestion = state.routeSuggestions[suggestionIndex];
        if (!suggestion) {
          continue;
        }
        const isMyLocationEntry = suggestion.source === 'myLocation';
        if (!isMyLocationEntry && !labelContainsQuery(suggestion.label, currentRouteQuery)) {
          continue;
        }
        const suggestionElement = document.createElement('div');
        const cssClassParts = ['suggestion-item'];
        if (suggestion.source === 'recent') {
          cssClassParts.push('is-recent');
        }
        if (isMyLocationEntry) {
          cssClassParts.push('is-my-location');
        }
        suggestionElement.className = cssClassParts.join(' ');
        suggestionElement.innerHTML = isMyLocationEntry
          ? '<span>Mein Standort</span>'
          : buildHighlightedLabelHtml(suggestion.label, currentRouteQuery);
        suggestionElement.addEventListener('click', function (clickEvent) {
          stopEventPropagation(clickEvent);
          selectSuggestionAndShow(suggestion).catch(function (error) {
            console.error('Fehler beim Anzeigen des Suchtreffers:', error);
          });
        });
        fragment.appendChild(suggestionElement);
      }
      routeSuggestionsElement.appendChild(fragment);
      state.renderedRouteSuggestionCount = renderEndIndex;
    }

    function renderRouteSuggestions(resetList) {
      const routeSuggestionsElement = byId('routeSuggestions');
      if (!routeSuggestionsElement) {
        return;
      }
      if (!Array.isArray(state.routeSuggestions) || state.routeSuggestions.length === 0) {
        routeSuggestionsElement.classList.remove('open');
        routeSuggestionsElement.innerHTML = '';
        state.renderedRouteSuggestionCount = 0;
        return;
      }
      if (resetList) {
        routeSuggestionsElement.innerHTML = '';
        state.renderedRouteSuggestionCount = 0;
      }
      appendSuggestionBatchToList();
      routeSuggestionsElement.classList.add('open');
    }

    function maybeRenderMoreSuggestionsOnScroll() {
      const routeSuggestionsElement = byId('routeSuggestions');
      if (!routeSuggestionsElement || !Array.isArray(state.routeSuggestions)) {
        return;
      }
      if (state.renderedRouteSuggestionCount >= state.routeSuggestions.length) {
        return;
      }
      const remainingScrollPixels = routeSuggestionsElement.scrollHeight -
        routeSuggestionsElement.scrollTop - routeSuggestionsElement.clientHeight;
      if (remainingScrollPixels <= 24) {
        appendSuggestionBatchToList();
      }
    }

    function clearRouteVisualization(keepMarkers, clearOptions) {
      resetNavigationRouteOverlayState();
      const keepNavigationSheet = !!(clearOptions && clearOptions.keepNavigationSheet);
      if (!keepNavigationSheet && state.placeSheetContentKind === 'navigation') {
        closePlaceSheet();
      }
      if (!keepMarkers) {
        const keepStartInput = !!(clearOptions && clearOptions.keepStartInput);
        if (state.destinationMarker) {
          state.map.removeLayer(state.destinationMarker);
          state.destinationMarker = null;
        }
        if (!keepStartInput && state.startMarker) {
          state.map.removeLayer(state.startMarker);
          state.startMarker = null;
        }
        if (Array.isArray(state.waypointMarkers)) {
          state.waypointMarkers.forEach(function (waypointMarkerEntry) {
            state.map.removeLayer(waypointMarkerEntry);
          });
        }
        state.waypointMarkers = [];
        state.selectedWaypoints = [];
        state.waypointEditorRows = [];
        state.activeWaypointRowId = null;
        state.waypointSuggestionTargetRowId = null;
        state.pendingFocusWaypointRowId = null;
        state.selectedWaypointSuggestion = null;
        state.awaitingWaypointPick = false;
        if (!keepStartInput) {
          state.selectedRouteStart = null;
          const routeStartQueryElement = byId('routeStartQuery');
          if (routeStartQueryElement) {
            routeStartQueryElement.value = '';
          }
          updateStartInlineClearButtonVisibility();
        }
        setRouteInlineInfo('-', '-');
        updateWaypointButtonState();
        renderWaypointDynamicRows();
        updateRouteActionVisibility();
      }
      updateRouteLetterBadgesVisibility();
    }

    function pauseMapFollowForRoutePlanning() {
      clearAutoFollowResumeTimer();
      clearNavigationManualViewResumeTimer();
      clearNavigationPostCloseZoomTimer();
      clearNavigationDockFollowAnimation();
      setNavigationMapDockActive(false);
      disableHeadingUpBearingByUserInteraction();
      state.userHasInteractedWithMap = true;
      state.autoFollowEnabled = state.navigationAutoViewEnabled = state.navigationAdaptiveZoomArmed = state.shouldAutoFitTrackLine = false;
    }

    function normalizeSuggestionItem(rawItem) {
      if (!rawItem) {
        return null;
      }
      const latitude = Number(rawItem.lat);
      const longitude = Number(rawItem.lon);
      const labelText = String(rawItem.label || '').trim();
      if (!Number.isFinite(latitude) || !Number.isFinite(longitude) || !labelText) {
        return null;
      }
      return {
        lat: latitude,
        lon: longitude,
        label: labelText,
        source: rawItem.source || 'unknown'
      };
    }

    function haversineKilometers(latA, lonA, latB, lonB) {
      const earthRadiusKm = 6371;
      const toRadians = function (degreeValue) { return degreeValue * Math.PI / 180; };
      const latDelta = toRadians(latB - latA);
      const lonDelta = toRadians(lonB - lonA);
      const a = Math.sin(latDelta / 2) * Math.sin(latDelta / 2) +
        Math.cos(toRadians(latA)) * Math.cos(toRadians(latB)) *
        Math.sin(lonDelta / 2) * Math.sin(lonDelta / 2);
      return 2 * earthRadiusKm * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1 - a));
    }

    function rankSuggestions(searchQuery, suggestions, currentPosition) {
      const normalizedQuery = String(searchQuery || '').trim().toLowerCase();
      return suggestions
        .map(function (suggestionItem) {
          const normalizedLabel = suggestionItem.label.toLowerCase();
          let rankingScore = 0;
          if (normalizedLabel.startsWith(normalizedQuery)) {
            rankingScore += 120;
          } else if (normalizedLabel.includes(normalizedQuery)) {
            rankingScore += 40;
          }
          const queryTokens = normalizedQuery.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
          queryTokens.forEach(function (queryToken) {
            if (normalizedLabel.startsWith(queryToken)) {
              rankingScore += 16;
            } else if (normalizedLabel.includes(queryToken)) {
              rankingScore += 8;
            }
          });
          if (currentPosition) {
            const distanceKm = haversineKilometers(currentPosition.lat, currentPosition.lon, suggestionItem.lat, suggestionItem.lon);
            rankingScore += Math.max(0, 80 - Math.min(80, distanceKm));
          }
          if (suggestionItem.source === 'nominatim') {
            rankingScore += 5;
          }
          return Object.assign({}, suggestionItem, { score: rankingScore });
        })
        .sort(function (leftItem, rightItem) {
          return rightItem.score - leftItem.score;
        });
    }

    function deduplicateSuggestions(suggestions) {
      const seenSuggestionKeySet = {};
      const uniqueSuggestionList = [];
      suggestions.forEach(function (suggestionEntry) {
        const suggestionKey = suggestionEntry.label.toLowerCase() + '|' +
          suggestionEntry.lat.toFixed(5) + '|' + suggestionEntry.lon.toFixed(5);
        if (!seenSuggestionKeySet[suggestionKey]) {
          seenSuggestionKeySet[suggestionKey] = true;
          uniqueSuggestionList.push(suggestionEntry);
        }
      });
      return uniqueSuggestionList;
    }

    function buildLastPositionApiUrl(deviceKey) {
      const trimmedKey = deviceKey && typeof deviceKey === 'string' ? deviceKey.trim() : '';
      return trimmedKey
        ? '/api/last-position?deviceKey=' + encodeURIComponent(trimmedKey)
        : '/api/last-position';
    }

    function localPositionRecordForSelectedDevice() {
      const selectedDeviceKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      let localRecord = null;
      if (selectedDeviceKey && isNativeAppContext() && isNativePhoneDeviceKey(selectedDeviceKey)) {
        localRecord = getLastNativeBridgePositionEntry() || state.devicesByKey[selectedDeviceKey] || null;
      } else if (selectedDeviceKey && state.devicesByKey[selectedDeviceKey]) {
        localRecord = state.devicesByKey[selectedDeviceKey];
      }
      if (!localRecord && state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng && state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng.length >= 2) {
        localRecord = {
          key: selectedDeviceKey || '',
          lat: state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng[0],
          lon: state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng[1],
          heading: state.latestHeadingDegrees,
          timestamp: Date.now()
        };
      }
      if (!localRecord || typeof localRecord.lat !== 'number' || typeof localRecord.lon !== 'number' ||
        !Number.isFinite(localRecord.lat) || !Number.isFinite(localRecord.lon)) {
        return null;
      }
      return localRecord;
    }

    async function fetchCurrentPosition() {
      const selectedDeviceKeyForPosition = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      const localPosition = localPositionRecordForSelectedDevice();
      if (isNativePhoneDeviceKey(selectedDeviceKeyForPosition) && localPosition) {
        const localMapPosition = preparePositionEntryForMapDisplay(localPosition) || localPosition;
        return {
          lat: localMapPosition.lat,
          lon: localMapPosition.lon,
          heading: localPosition.heading,
          speed: localPosition.speed,
          accuracy: localPosition.accuracy
        };
      }
      let lastPosition = null;
      try {
        const lastPositionResponse = await fetchJson(buildLastPositionApiUrl(selectedDeviceKeyForPosition));
        lastPosition = lastPositionResponse && lastPositionResponse.data ? lastPositionResponse.data : null;
      } catch (error) {
        lastPosition = localPosition;
      }
      if (!lastPosition || typeof lastPosition.lat !== 'number' || typeof lastPosition.lon !== 'number') {
        return null;
      }
      const mapPosition = fusePositionForMap(lastPosition, { allowRouteSnap: false }) || lastPosition;
      return {
        lat: mapPosition.lat,
        lon: mapPosition.lon,
        heading: lastPosition.heading,
        speed: lastPosition.speed,
        accuracy: lastPosition.accuracy
      };
    }

    async function fetchDevicesSnapshot() {
      const devicesResponse = await fetchJson('/api/devices');
      return devicesResponse && devicesResponse.data && typeof devicesResponse.data === 'object'
        ? devicesResponse.data
        : {};
    }

    async function fetchLastPositionRecord() {
      const selectedDeviceKeyForLastRecord = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      const localPosition = localPositionRecordForSelectedDevice();
      if (isNativePhoneDeviceKey(selectedDeviceKeyForLastRecord) && localPosition) {
        return localPosition;
      }
      try {
        const lastPositionResponse = await fetchJson(buildLastPositionApiUrl(selectedDeviceKeyForLastRecord));
        return lastPositionResponse && lastPositionResponse.data ? lastPositionResponse.data : localPosition;
      } catch (error) {
        return localPosition;
      }
    }

    async function fetchDevicePositionRecord(deviceTarget) {
      if (!deviceTarget || !deviceTarget.user || !deviceTarget.device) {
        return await fetchLastPositionRecord();
      }
      const devicesSnapshot = await fetchDevicesSnapshot();
      const deviceKey = String(deviceTarget.user) + '/' + String(deviceTarget.device);
      const record = devicesSnapshot && typeof devicesSnapshot === 'object'
        ? devicesSnapshot[deviceKey]
        : null;
      return record && typeof record === 'object' ? record : null;
    }

    function lastPositionReceivedAtMillis(positionEntry) {
      if (!positionEntry || typeof positionEntry !== 'object') {
        return 0;
      }
      const receivedAt = Number(positionEntry.receivedAt || positionEntry.timestamp);
      return Number.isFinite(receivedAt) && receivedAt > 0 ? receivedAt : 0;
    }

    function positionEntryIsOwntracksDevice(positionEntry) {
      if (!positionEntry || typeof positionEntry !== 'object') {
        return false;
      }
      if (String(positionEntry.source || '').toLowerCase() === 'owntracks') {
        return true;
      }
      return typeof positionEntry.owntracksTid === 'string' && positionEntry.owntracksTid.trim().length > 0;
    }

    function positionEntryIsOwnAppDevice(positionEntry) {
      if (!positionEntry || typeof positionEntry !== 'object') {
        return false;
      }
