      if (isNativePhoneDeviceKey(positionEntryDeviceKey(positionEntry))) {
        return true;
      }
      var source = String(positionEntry.source || '').toLowerCase();
      return source === 'capacitor' || source === 'mobile_app';
    }

    function nativeBridgeLocationBlocked(bridge) {
      try {
        if (!bridge || typeof bridge.getLocationServiceState !== 'function') return false;
        var info = bridge.getLocationServiceState();
        return !!(info && (info.blocked || info.state === 'disabled' || info.state === 'prompting'));
      } catch (error) {
        return false;
      }
    }

    async function requestOwnAppLocation(deviceTarget, options) {
      options = options || {};
      const firstFix = !!options.firstFix;
      const hardRefresh = !!options.hardRefresh;
      logPerfTraceMaplogik('MaplogikGeoRequest', [
        'caller=requestOwnAppLocation',
        'action=enter',
        'hardRefresh=' + String(hardRefresh),
        'firstFix=' + String(firstFix)
      ], 'requestOwnAppLocation:enter:' + String(hardRefresh) + ':' + String(firstFix));
      const selectedDeviceKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      const selectedDeviceEntry = selectedDeviceKey && state.devicesByKey[selectedDeviceKey]
        ? state.devicesByKey[selectedDeviceKey]
        : null;
      if (selectedDeviceKey && isNativeAppContext() && isNativePhoneDeviceKey(selectedDeviceKey)) {
        const bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
        if (bridge && typeof bridge.requestLocationNow === 'function') {
          const cachedPoint = typeof bridge.getLastLocalPoint === 'function' ? bridge.getLastLocalPoint() : null;
          const cachedAt = cachedPoint ? Number(cachedPoint.receivedAt || cachedPoint.timestamp || 0) : 0;
          const cachedRecent = Number.isFinite(cachedAt) && cachedAt > 0 && Date.now() - cachedAt <= 10000;
          if (cachedPoint && typeof cachedPoint.lat === 'number' && typeof cachedPoint.lon === 'number') {
            applyNativeLocalGpsPoint(cachedPoint);
          }
          const useBurst = hardRefresh && typeof bridge.requestLocationBurst === 'function';
          logPerfTraceMaplogik('MaplogikGeoRequest', [
            'caller=requestOwnAppLocation',
            'action=' + (useBurst ? 'requestLocationBurst' : 'requestLocationNow'),
            'reason=' + (cachedPoint ? (hardRefresh ? 'cachedHardRefresh' : 'cachedRefresh') : (hardRefresh ? 'noCachedHardRefresh' : 'noCached')),
            'cachedRecent=' + String(cachedRecent)
          ], 'requestOwnAppLocation:' + (useBurst ? 'burst' : 'now'));
          const point = useBurst
            ? await bridge.requestLocationBurst({
                tracking: state.trackingEnabled,
                localOnly: true,
                samples: firstFix ? 20 : 12,
                maxMs: firstFix ? 14000 : 5000,
                firstFix: firstFix,
                hardRefresh: true,
                requiredAction: 'locateHardRefresh',
                promptReason: 'locateHardRefresh'
              })
            : await bridge.requestLocationNow({
                tracking: state.trackingEnabled,
                localOnly: true,
                firstFix: firstFix,
                requiredAction: 'locateShort',
                promptReason: 'locateShort'
              });
          const fallbackPoint = !point && !nativeBridgeLocationBlocked(bridge) && typeof bridge.getLastLocalPoint === 'function'
            ? (bridge.getLastLocalPoint() || cachedPoint)
            : null;
          const finalPoint = point || fallbackPoint;
          if (!finalPoint || typeof finalPoint.lat !== 'number' || typeof finalPoint.lon !== 'number' ||
            !Number.isFinite(finalPoint.lat) || !Number.isFinite(finalPoint.lon)) {
            throw new Error('GPS sucht noch - bitte Standort aktivieren oder kurz warten.');
          }
          applyNativeLocalGpsPoint(finalPoint);
          return { ok: true, data: { deviceKey: selectedDeviceKey, local: true, point: finalPoint } };
        }
        throw new Error('Lokale GPS-Bridge ist noch nicht bereit.');
      }
      const requestBody = {
        deviceKey: selectedDeviceKey || '',
        hardRefresh: !!(options && options.hardRefresh)
      };
      if (deviceTarget && deviceTarget.user && deviceTarget.device) {
        requestBody.user = deviceTarget.user;
        requestBody.device = deviceTarget.device;
      } else if (selectedDeviceEntry &&
        typeof selectedDeviceEntry.user === 'string' &&
        typeof selectedDeviceEntry.device === 'string' &&
        selectedDeviceEntry.user.trim() &&
        selectedDeviceEntry.device.trim()) {
        requestBody.user = selectedDeviceEntry.user.trim();
        requestBody.device = selectedDeviceEntry.device.trim();
      }
      const requestUrl = resolveServerApiUrl('/mobile/api/request-location');
      const response = await fetch(requestUrl, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify(requestBody),
        cache: 'no-store'
      });
      if (!response.ok) {
        const responseText = await response.text();
        throw new Error('HTTP Fehler ' + response.status + ' bei /mobile/api/request-location: ' + responseText);
      }
      return await response.json();
    }

    function wakeLocationRequestWaitIfAny() {
      if (state.locationRequestWakeResolvers.length === 0) {
        return;
      }
      const pendingDeliverList = state.locationRequestWakeResolvers.slice();
      state.locationRequestWakeResolvers = [];
      pendingDeliverList.forEach(function (deliverWake) {
        deliverWake();
      });
    }

    function locationRequestWaitUntilWakeOrTimeout(intervalMs) {
      return new Promise(function (resolve) {
        let settled = false;
        const timerId = setTimeout(function () {
          if (settled) {
            return;
          }
          settled = true;
          const resolverIndex = state.locationRequestWakeResolvers.indexOf(deliverWake);
          if (resolverIndex >= 0) {
            state.locationRequestWakeResolvers.splice(resolverIndex, 1);
          }
          resolve();
        }, intervalMs);
        function deliverWake() {
          if (settled) {
            return;
          }
          settled = true;
          clearTimeout(timerId);
          const resolverIndex = state.locationRequestWakeResolvers.indexOf(deliverWake);
          if (resolverIndex >= 0) {
            state.locationRequestWakeResolvers.splice(resolverIndex, 1);
          }
          resolve();
        }
        state.locationRequestWakeResolvers.push(deliverWake);
      });
    }

    async function waitForLastPositionNewerThan(minReceivedAtMillis, waitOptions) {
      const options = waitOptions && typeof waitOptions === 'object' ? waitOptions : {};
      const maxWaitMs = typeof options.maxWaitMs === 'number' ? options.maxWaitMs : LOCATION_REQUEST_WAIT_MAX_MS;
      const deviceTarget = options.deviceTarget || null;
      const waitDeadline = Date.now() + maxWaitMs;
      while (Date.now() < waitDeadline) {
        const record = deviceTarget
          ? await fetchDevicePositionRecord(deviceTarget)
          : await fetchLastPositionRecord();
        if (record && typeof record.lat === 'number' && typeof record.lon === 'number') {
          const receivedAt = lastPositionReceivedAtMillis(record);
          if (receivedAt > minReceivedAtMillis) {
            return record;
          }
        }
        await locationRequestWaitUntilWakeOrTimeout(LOCATION_REQUEST_POLL_INTERVAL_MS);
      }
      return null;
    }

    function quickPollOwnTracksLastPosition() {
      const pollDeviceKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      const pollPromise = pollDeviceKey
        ? fetchJson(buildLastPositionApiUrl(pollDeviceKey)).then(function (response) {
          return response && response.data ? response.data : null;
        })
        : fetchLastPositionRecord();
      pollPromise
        .then(function (record) {
          const receivedAtMillis = lastPositionReceivedAtMillis(record);
          if (receivedAtMillis > state.lastQuickPollSeenReceivedAt) {
            state.lastQuickPollSeenReceivedAt = receivedAtMillis;
            if (pollDeviceKey && record && state.devicesByKey[pollDeviceKey]) {
              state.devicesByKey[pollDeviceKey].receivedAt = receivedAtMillis;
              updateSelectedDeviceConnectionChip(pollDeviceKey);
            }
            triggerLiveTrackingUpdate();
          }
        })
        .catch(function () {
          /* leichtes Polling: Fehler ignorieren */
        });
    }

    async function searchDestinationCoordinates(searchQuery) {
      const trimmedQuery = (searchQuery || '').trim();
      if (!trimmedQuery) {
        throw new Error('Bitte ein Ziel eingeben.');
      }
      const suggestionItems = await fetchRouteSuggestions(trimmedQuery, true);
      if (!Array.isArray(suggestionItems) || suggestionItems.length === 0) {
        throw new Error('Ziel wurde nicht gefunden.');
      }
      return suggestionItems[0];
    }

    async function searchDestinationCoordinatesDirect(searchQuery) {
      const trimmedQuery = (searchQuery || '').trim();
      if (!trimmedQuery) {
        throw new Error('Bitte einen Zwischenstopp eingeben.');
      }
      if (!(await isNetworkOnlineForExternalRequests())) {
        logBlockedOfflineNetworkRequest('https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search');
        const localSuggestions = getLocalRouteSuggestionsMatchingQuery(trimmedQuery);
        if (localSuggestions.length) return localSuggestions[0];
        throw new Error('Offline: Zwischenstopp ist nicht im lokalen Verlauf gespeichert.');
      }
      const searchUrl = 'https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search?format=json&limit=1&q=' + encodeURIComponent(trimmedQuery);
      const searchResults = await fetchJson(searchUrl, {
        headers: {
          'Accept': 'application/json'
        }
      });
      if (!Array.isArray(searchResults) || searchResults.length === 0) {
        throw new Error('Zwischenstopp wurde nicht gefunden.');
      }
      return {
        lat: Number(searchResults[0].lat),
        lon: Number(searchResults[0].lon),
        label: searchResults[0].display_name || trimmedQuery
      };
    }

    async function resolveMapClickLabel(latitude, longitude) {
      const fallbackLabel = 'Kartenpunkt: ' + Number(latitude).toFixed(6) + ', ' + Number(longitude).toFixed(6);
      const reverseUrl = 'https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/reverse?format=jsonv2&lat=' +
        encodeURIComponent(String(latitude)) + '&lon=' + encodeURIComponent(String(longitude)) +
        '&zoom=18&addressdetails=1';
      if (!(await isNetworkOnlineForExternalRequests())) {
        logBlockedOfflineNetworkRequest(reverseUrl);
        return fallbackLabel;
      }
      try {
        const reverseResult = await fetchJson(reverseUrl, {
          headers: {
            'Accept': 'application/json'
          }
        });
        if (!reverseResult || typeof reverseResult !== 'object') {
          return fallbackLabel;
        }
        const addressObject = reverseResult.address || {};
        const primaryName = reverseResult.name || addressObject.shop || addressObject.amenity ||
          addressObject.tourism || addressObject.building || addressObject.road || '';
        const displayName = reverseResult.display_name || '';
        if (primaryName && displayName) {
          if (displayName.toLowerCase().indexOf(String(primaryName).toLowerCase()) >= 0) {
            return displayName;
          }
          return String(primaryName) + ', ' + displayName;
        }
        if (displayName) {
          return displayName;
        }
        if (primaryName) {
          return String(primaryName);
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Fehler bei Reverse-Geocoding:', error);
      }
      return fallbackLabel;
    }

    function loadRecentRouteSuggestions() {
      try {
        const storedValue = window.localStorage.getItem(RECENT_SUGGESTIONS_STORAGE_KEY);
        if (!storedValue) {
          state.recentRouteSuggestions = [];
          return;
        }
        const parsedEntries = JSON.parse(storedValue);
        state.recentRouteSuggestions = Array.isArray(parsedEntries)
          ? parsedEntries.filter(function (entry) {
              return entry && typeof entry.lat === 'number' && typeof entry.lon === 'number' && entry.label;
            }).slice(0, RECENT_SUGGESTIONS_MAX_ENTRIES)
          : [];
      } catch (storageError) {
        state.recentRouteSuggestions = [];
      }
    }

    function persistRecentRouteSuggestions() {
      try {
        window.localStorage.setItem(
          RECENT_SUGGESTIONS_STORAGE_KEY,
          JSON.stringify(state.recentRouteSuggestions)
        );
      } catch (storageError) {
        // storage quota / privacy mode -> silent
      }
    }

    function addToRecentRouteSuggestions(suggestion) {
      if (!suggestion || typeof suggestion.lat !== 'number' || typeof suggestion.lon !== 'number' || !suggestion.label) {
        return;
      }
      const normalizedEntry = {
        lat: suggestion.lat,
        lon: suggestion.lon,
        label: suggestion.label,
        source: 'recent'
      };
      const filteredEntries = (Array.isArray(state.recentRouteSuggestions) ? state.recentRouteSuggestions : [])
        .filter(function (entry) {
          return entry && entry.label !== normalizedEntry.label;
        });
      state.recentRouteSuggestions = [normalizedEntry].concat(filteredEntries).slice(0, RECENT_SUGGESTIONS_MAX_ENTRIES);
      state.suggestionCacheByQuery = {};
      persistRecentRouteSuggestions();
    }

    function getRecentSuggestionsMatchingQuery(trimmedQuery) {
      const recentEntries = Array.isArray(state.recentRouteSuggestions) ? state.recentRouteSuggestions : [];
      if (!trimmedQuery) {
        return recentEntries.slice();
      }
      const lowerQuery = trimmedQuery.toLowerCase();
      return recentEntries.filter(function (entry) {
        return entry && entry.label && entry.label.toLowerCase().indexOf(lowerQuery) !== -1;
      });
    }

    function getSavedPlaceSuggestionsMatchingQuery(trimmedQuery) {
      const lowerQuery = String(trimmedQuery || '').trim().toLowerCase();
      let places = Array.isArray(state.savedPlaces) ? state.savedPlaces.slice() : [];
      if (!places.length) {
        try { places = collectLocalSavedItemsForLoad(LOCAL_SAVED_PLACES_STORAGE_KEY); } catch (_) { places = []; }
      }
      return places.map(function (placeEntry) {
        const labelText = String(placeEntry && (placeEntry.label || placeEntry.name || placeEntry.title) || '').trim();
        if (!labelText || (lowerQuery && labelText.toLowerCase().indexOf(lowerQuery) === -1)) return null;
        return normalizeSuggestionItem({
          lat: placeEntry.lat,
          lon: placeEntry.lon,
          label: labelText,
          source: 'saved'
        });
      }).filter(Boolean);
    }

    function getLocalRouteSuggestionsMatchingQuery(trimmedQuery) {
      return deduplicateSuggestions(
        getRecentSuggestionsMatchingQuery(trimmedQuery).concat(getSavedPlaceSuggestionsMatchingQuery(trimmedQuery))
      );
    }

    function offlineBoundsAroundPoint(lat, lon, radiusDegrees) {
      const radius = Number.isFinite(Number(radiusDegrees)) ? Number(radiusDegrees) : 0.04;
      return {
        north: Math.min(85, Number(lat) + radius),
        south: Math.max(-85, Number(lat) - radius),
        east: Math.min(180, Number(lon) + radius),
        west: Math.max(-180, Number(lon) - radius)
      };
    }

    function buildOfflineMapLocalSearchResults(trimmedQuery) {
      return getLocalRouteSuggestionsMatchingQuery(trimmedQuery).map(function (suggestion) {
        const title = String(suggestion.label || '').split(',')[0].trim() || suggestion.label;
        return {
          title: title,
          label: suggestion.label,
          source: suggestion.source || 'local',
          bounds: offlineBoundsAroundPoint(suggestion.lat, suggestion.lon, suggestion.source === 'saved' ? 0.035 : 0.05)
        };
      });
    }

    function buildMyLocationSuggestionEntry() {
      return {
        lat: NaN,
        lon: NaN,
        label: 'Mein Standort',
        source: 'myLocation'
      };
    }

    function prependMyLocationSuggestion(entries) {
      const list = Array.isArray(entries) ? entries.slice() : [];
      const myLocationEntry = buildMyLocationSuggestionEntry();
      const filteredList = list.filter(function (entry) {
        return !(entry && entry.source === 'myLocation');
      });
      return [myLocationEntry].concat(filteredList);
    }

    function showRecentRouteSuggestionsForQuery(trimmedQuery) {
      const matchingRecents = getRecentSuggestionsMatchingQuery(trimmedQuery);
      const includeMyLocation = !state.activeSearchTarget || state.activeSearchTarget.kind !== 'waypoint';
      if (matchingRecents.length === 0 && !includeMyLocation) {
        hideRouteSuggestions();
        return;
      }
      state.routeSuggestions = includeMyLocation
        ? prependMyLocationSuggestion(matchingRecents)
        : matchingRecents;
      renderRouteSuggestions(true);
    }

    function getActiveRouteSuggestionQuery() {
      const targetKind = state.activeSearchTarget && state.activeSearchTarget.kind;
      if (targetKind === 'start') {
        const startInput = byId('routeStartQuery');
        return startInput ? startInput.value : '';
      }
      if (targetKind === 'waypoint') {
        const rowId = state.waypointSuggestionTargetRowId || state.activeWaypointRowId;
        const waypointInput = rowId ? document.querySelector('input[data-waypoint-row-id="' + rowId + '"]') : null;
        return waypointInput ? waypointInput.value : '';
      }
      const destinationInput = byId('routeQuery');
      return destinationInput ? destinationInput.value : '';
    }

    function openRouteSuggestionsForInput(inputElement) {
      const inputText = String(inputElement && inputElement.value || '').trim();
      if (!inputText) {
        showRecentRouteSuggestionsForQuery(inputText);
        return;
      }
      fetchRouteSuggestions(inputText).catch(function (error) {
        if (!error || error.name !== 'AbortError') {
          console.error('Fehler bei SuchvorschlÃ¤gen:', error);
        }
      });
    }

    function openWaypointSuggestionsForInput(inputElement) {
      fetchRouteSuggestions(inputElement ? inputElement.value : '', true).then(function (suggestionList) {
        state.waypointSuggestions = Array.isArray(suggestionList) ? suggestionList : [];
        renderWaypointSuggestions();
      }).catch(function (error) {
        if (!error || error.name !== 'AbortError') {
          console.error('Fehler bei Zwischenstopp-VorschlÃ¤gen:', error);
        }
      });
    }

    async function fetchRouteSuggestions(searchQuery, returnDataOnly) {
      const trimmedQuery = (searchQuery || '').trim();
      if (trimmedQuery.length < 1) {
        if (returnDataOnly) {
          return getRecentSuggestionsMatchingQuery(trimmedQuery);
        } else {
          showRecentRouteSuggestionsForQuery(trimmedQuery);
        }
        return [];
      }

      const queryCacheKey = trimmedQuery.toLowerCase();
      if (state.suggestionCacheByQuery[queryCacheKey]) {
        const cachedRanked = state.suggestionCacheByQuery[queryCacheKey];
        const includeMyLocationCached = !returnDataOnly && (!state.activeSearchTarget || state.activeSearchTarget.kind !== 'waypoint');
        state.routeSuggestions = includeMyLocationCached
          ? prependMyLocationSuggestion(cachedRanked)
          : cachedRanked;
        if (!returnDataOnly) {
          renderRouteSuggestions(true);
        }
        return state.routeSuggestions;
      }

      if (!(await isNetworkOnlineForExternalRequests())) {
        logBlockedOfflineNetworkRequest('https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search');
        logBlockedOfflineNetworkRequest('https://photon.komoot.io/api/');
        const currentPositionOffline = await fetchCurrentPosition().catch(function () { return null; });
        const rankedLocal = rankSuggestions(trimmedQuery, getLocalRouteSuggestionsMatchingQuery(trimmedQuery), currentPositionOffline);
        const includeMyLocationOffline = !returnDataOnly && (!state.activeSearchTarget || state.activeSearchTarget.kind !== 'waypoint');
        state.routeSuggestions = includeMyLocationOffline ? prependMyLocationSuggestion(rankedLocal) : rankedLocal;
        if (!returnDataOnly) renderRouteSuggestions(true);
        return rankedLocal;
      }

      state.routeSuggestRequestToken += 1;
      const activeRequestToken = state.routeSuggestRequestToken;
      if (state.routeSuggestAbortController) {
        state.routeSuggestAbortController.abort();
      }
      state.routeSuggestAbortController = new AbortController();
      const currentPosition = await fetchCurrentPosition();

      const queryVariants = buildSearchQueryVariants(trimmedQuery);
      const providerRequestPromises = [];
      queryVariants.forEach(function (queryVariant) {
        const encodedVariant = encodeURIComponent(queryVariant);
        providerRequestPromises.push(fetchJson(
          'https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search?format=json&addressdetails=1&limit=30&q=' + encodedVariant,
          { headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' }, signal: state.routeSuggestAbortController.signal }
        ).then(function (resultValue) { return { provider: 'nominatim', value: resultValue }; }));
        providerRequestPromises.push(fetchJson(
          'https://photon.komoot.io/api/?lang=de&limit=80&q=' + encodedVariant,
          { headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' }, signal: state.routeSuggestAbortController.signal }
        ).then(function (resultValue) { return { provider: 'photon', value: resultValue }; }));
      });

      const providerResults = await Promise.allSettled(providerRequestPromises);
      if (activeRequestToken !== state.routeSuggestRequestToken) {
        return [];
      }

      const aggregatedSuggestions = [];
      providerResults.forEach(function (settledResult) {
        if (settledResult.status !== 'fulfilled' || !settledResult.value) {
          return;
        }
        const providerName = settledResult.value.provider;
        const providerPayload = settledResult.value.value;
        if (providerName === 'nominatim' && Array.isArray(providerPayload)) {
          providerPayload.forEach(function (entry) {
            const normalized = normalizeSuggestionItem({
              lat: entry.lat,
              lon: entry.lon,
              label: entry.display_name,
              source: 'nominatim'
            });
            if (normalized) aggregatedSuggestions.push(normalized);
          });
        } else if (providerName === 'photon' && providerPayload && Array.isArray(providerPayload.features)) {
          providerPayload.features.forEach(function (featureEntry) {
            const coordinates = featureEntry && featureEntry.geometry && Array.isArray(featureEntry.geometry.coordinates)
              ? featureEntry.geometry.coordinates
              : [];
            const featureProperties = featureEntry && featureEntry.properties ? featureEntry.properties : {};
            const labelParts = [
              featureProperties.name,
              featureProperties.city,
              featureProperties.state,
              featureProperties.country
            ].filter(function (labelPart) { return labelPart && String(labelPart).trim(); });
            const normalized = normalizeSuggestionItem({
              lat: coordinates[1],
              lon: coordinates[0],
              label: labelParts.join(', '),
              source: 'photon'
            });
            if (normalized) aggregatedSuggestions.push(normalized);
          });
        }
      });

      const allSuggestions = deduplicateSuggestions(getRecentSuggestionsMatchingQuery(trimmedQuery).concat(aggregatedSuggestions));
      const rankedSuggestions = rankSuggestions(trimmedQuery, allSuggestions, currentPosition);
      const includeMyLocation = !returnDataOnly && (!state.activeSearchTarget || state.activeSearchTarget.kind !== 'waypoint');
      const finalSuggestions = includeMyLocation
        ? prependMyLocationSuggestion(rankedSuggestions)
        : rankedSuggestions;
      state.routeSuggestions = finalSuggestions;
      state.suggestionCacheByQuery[queryCacheKey] = rankedSuggestions;
      if (!returnDataOnly) {
        renderRouteSuggestions(true);
      }
      return rankedSuggestions;
    }

    function getTransportModeLabel(transportMode) {
      if (transportMode === 'walking') {
        return 'Fuß';
      }
      if (transportMode === 'cycling') {
        return 'Fahrrad';
      }
      return 'Auto';
    }

    function routeStartsInAllowedBearing(routeObject, expectedBearing) {
      const safeExpectedBearing = normalizeHeadingDegrees(expectedBearing);
      if (safeExpectedBearing === null) return true;
      const routeCoords = extractLatLngCoordsFromRouteGeometry(routeObject && routeObject.geometry);
      if (routeCoords.length < 2) return false;
      const cumulativeMeters = buildCumulativeMetersForCoords(routeCoords);
      const checkArcMeters = Math.min(NAV_REROUTE_FORWARD_WAYPOINT_M, cumulativeMeters[cumulativeMeters.length - 1] || 0);
      if (checkArcMeters < NAV_REROUTE_MIN_MOVE_M) return true;
      const checkLatLng = latLngAtRouteArc(routeCoords, cumulativeMeters, checkArcMeters);
      return circularBearingDifferenceDegrees(
        bearingBetweenLatLngs(routeCoords[0], checkLatLng),
        safeExpectedBearing
      ) <= NAV_REROUTE_ACCEPT_START_HEADING_DELTA_DEG;
    }

    function buildRouteServiceCandidates(transportMode) {
      if (transportMode === 'walking') {
        return [
          { baseUrl: 'https://routing.openstreetmap.de/routed-foot', profile: 'foot', modeLabel: 'Fuß' },
          { baseUrl: 'https://routing.openstreetmap.de/routed-foot', profile: 'walking', modeLabel: 'Fuß' },
          { baseUrl: 'https://router.project-osrm.org', profile: 'walking', modeLabel: 'Fuß' }
        ];
      }
      if (transportMode === 'cycling') {
        return [
          { baseUrl: 'https://routing.openstreetmap.de/routed-bike', profile: 'bike', modeLabel: 'Fahrrad' },
          { baseUrl: 'https://routing.openstreetmap.de/routed-bike', profile: 'cycling', modeLabel: 'Fahrrad' },
          { baseUrl: 'https://router.project-osrm.org', profile: 'cycling', modeLabel: 'Fahrrad' }
        ];
      }
      return [
        { baseUrl: 'https://routing.openstreetmap.de/routed-car', profile: 'driving', modeLabel: 'Auto' },
        { baseUrl: 'https://router.project-osrm.org', profile: 'driving', modeLabel: 'Auto' }
      ];
    }

    function roundedRouteCoord(value) {
      const numericValue = Number(value);
      return Number.isFinite(numericValue) ? (Math.round(numericValue * 100000) / 100000).toFixed(5) : '';
    }

    function normalizedRouteCacheWaypoints(waypoints) {
      return (Array.isArray(waypoints) ? waypoints : []).filter(function (waypointItem) {
        return waypointItem && Number.isFinite(Number(waypointItem.lat)) && Number.isFinite(Number(waypointItem.lon));
      }).map(function (waypointItem) {
        return roundedRouteCoord(waypointItem.lat) + ',' + roundedRouteCoord(waypointItem.lon);
      }).join('|');
    }

    function routeCacheOptionsKey(routeOptions) {
      if (!routeOptions) return '';
      const parts = [];
      if (Number.isFinite(Number(routeOptions.startBearing))) {
        parts.push('b' + String(Math.round(Number(routeOptions.startBearing) / 10) * 10));
      }
      if (routeOptions.preventUTurn) parts.push('no-uturn');
      if (routeOptions.forwardWaypoint &&
        Number.isFinite(Number(routeOptions.forwardWaypoint.lat)) &&
        Number.isFinite(Number(routeOptions.forwardWaypoint.lon))) {
        parts.push('fw' + roundedRouteCoord(routeOptions.forwardWaypoint.lat) + ',' + roundedRouteCoord(routeOptions.forwardWaypoint.lon));
      }
      return parts.join('|');
    }

    function routeCacheKey(startLat, startLon, endLat, endLon, transportMode, waypoints, routeOptions) {
      return [
        transportMode || 'driving',
        roundedRouteCoord(startLat) + ',' + roundedRouteCoord(startLon),
        roundedRouteCoord(endLat) + ',' + roundedRouteCoord(endLon),
        normalizedRouteCacheWaypoints(waypoints),
        routeCacheOptionsKey(routeOptions)
      ].join('::');
    }

    function readNavigationRouteCache() {
      try {
        const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(NAV_ROUTE_CACHE_STORAGE_KEY);
        const parsed = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : {};
        return parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' ? parsed : {};
      } catch (error) {
        return {};
      }
    }

    function writeNavigationRouteCache(cacheMap) {
      try {
        const entries = Object.keys(cacheMap || {}).map(function (cacheKey) {
          return { key: cacheKey, value: cacheMap[cacheKey] };
        }).sort(function (leftEntry, rightEntry) {
          return Number(rightEntry.value && rightEntry.value.updatedAt || 0) -
            Number(leftEntry.value && leftEntry.value.updatedAt || 0);
        }).slice(0, 24);
        const compact = {};
        entries.forEach(function (entry) { compact[entry.key] = entry.value; });
        window.localStorage.setItem(NAV_ROUTE_CACHE_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(compact));
      } catch (error) {}
    }

    function cachedRouteGeometry(startLat, startLon, endLat, endLon, transportMode, waypoints, routeOptions) {
      const cache = readNavigationRouteCache();
      const key = routeCacheKey(startLat, startLon, endLat, endLon, transportMode, waypoints, routeOptions);
      const entry = cache[key];
      if (!entry || !entry.route || !entry.route.geometry) return null;
      return {
        route: entry.route,
        usedModeLabel: entry.usedModeLabel || getTransportModeLabel(transportMode),
        usedServiceLabel: 'Lokaler Routencache',
        cacheKey: key,
        offlineCorridorRegionId: entry.offlineCorridorRegionId || ''
      };
    }

    function cacheRouteGeometry(startLat, startLon, endLat, endLon, transportMode, waypoints, routeOptions, routeResult) {
      if (!routeResult || !routeResult.route || !routeResult.route.geometry) return;
      const cache = readNavigationRouteCache();
      const key = routeCacheKey(startLat, startLon, endLat, endLon, transportMode, waypoints, routeOptions);
      cache[key] = {
        route: routeResult.route,
        usedModeLabel: routeResult.usedModeLabel || getTransportModeLabel(transportMode),
        updatedAt: Date.now()
      };
      writeNavigationRouteCache(cache);
      routeResult.cacheKey = key;
      return key;
    }

    function attachOfflineCorridorToRouteCache(cacheKey, corridorRecord) {
      if (!cacheKey || !corridorRecord || !corridorRecord.id) return;
      const cache = readNavigationRouteCache();
      const entry = cache[cacheKey];
      if (!entry) return;
      entry.offlineCorridorRegionId = corridorRecord.id;
      entry.offlineCorridorStatus = corridorRecord.status || 'bereit';
      entry.offlineCorridorUpdatedAt = Date.now();
      cache[cacheKey] = entry;
      writeNavigationRouteCache(cache);
    }

    async function fetchRouteGeometry(startLat, startLon, endLat, endLon, transportMode, waypoints, routeOptions) {
      if (![startLat, startLon, endLat, endLon].every(function (value) { return Number.isFinite(Number(value)); })) {
        throw new Error('Route kann nicht berechnet werden, weil Start oder Ziel ungültige Koordinaten hat.');
      }
      const localCachedRoute = cachedRouteGeometry(startLat, startLon, endLat, endLon, transportMode, waypoints, routeOptions);
      if (localCachedRoute) {
        return localCachedRoute;
      }
      if (!browserSeemsOnline()) {
        throw new Error('Offline: keine lokal gespeicherte Route fuer diese Start-/Ziel-Kombination gefunden.');
      }
      const routeServiceCandidates = buildRouteServiceCandidates(transportMode);
      let lastRouteErrorMessage = '';
      for (let candidateIndex = 0; candidateIndex < routeServiceCandidates.length; candidateIndex += 1) {
        const routeServiceCandidate = routeServiceCandidates[candidateIndex];
        const safeWaypoints = (Array.isArray(waypoints) ? waypoints : []).filter(function (waypointItem) {
          return waypointItem && Number.isFinite(Number(waypointItem.lat)) && Number.isFinite(Number(waypointItem.lon));
        });
        const routeWaypoints = routeOptions && routeOptions.forwardWaypoint &&
          Number.isFinite(Number(routeOptions.forwardWaypoint.lat)) &&
          Number.isFinite(Number(routeOptions.forwardWaypoint.lon))
          ? [routeOptions.forwardWaypoint].concat(safeWaypoints)
          : safeWaypoints;
        const coordinateParts = [
          encodeURIComponent(String(startLon)) + ',' + encodeURIComponent(String(startLat))
        ];
        routeWaypoints.forEach(function (waypointItem) {
          coordinateParts.push(
            encodeURIComponent(String(waypointItem.lon)) + ',' + encodeURIComponent(String(waypointItem.lat))
          );
        });
        coordinateParts.push(
          encodeURIComponent(String(endLon)) + ',' + encodeURIComponent(String(endLat))
        );
        const routeUrl = routeServiceCandidate.baseUrl + '/route/v1/' + routeServiceCandidate.profile + '/' +
          coordinateParts.join(';') +
          '?overview=full&geometries=geojson&steps=true' +
          (routeOptions && Number.isFinite(routeOptions.startBearing)
            ? '&bearings=' + [String(Math.round(routeOptions.startBearing)) + ',' + NAV_REROUTE_START_BEARING_RANGE_DEG]
              .concat(routeWaypoints.map(function (waypointItem) {
                return Number.isFinite(waypointItem.bearing)
                  ? String(Math.round(waypointItem.bearing)) + ',' + NAV_REROUTE_START_BEARING_RANGE_DEG
                  : '';
              }), ['']).join(';')
            : '') +
          (routeOptions && routeOptions.preventUTurn ? '&continue_straight=true' : '');
        try {
          const routeResponse = await fetchJson(routeUrl);
          if (routeResponse && Array.isArray(routeResponse.routes) && routeResponse.routes.length > 0) {
            if (routeOptions && routeOptions.preventUTurn &&
              !routeStartsInAllowedBearing(routeResponse.routes[0], routeOptions.startBearing)) {
              lastRouteErrorMessage = 'Reroute entgegen der Fahrtrichtung verworfen.';
              continue;
            }
            const routeResult = {
              route: routeResponse.routes[0],
              usedModeLabel: routeServiceCandidate.modeLabel || getTransportModeLabel(transportMode),
              usedServiceLabel: routeServiceCandidate.baseUrl + ' [' + routeServiceCandidate.profile + ']'
            };
            cacheRouteGeometry(startLat, startLon, endLat, endLon, transportMode, waypoints, routeOptions, routeResult);
            return routeResult;
          }
          lastRouteErrorMessage = 'Leere Routenantwort vom Routing-Dienst.';
        } catch (routeServiceError) {
          lastRouteErrorMessage = routeServiceError && routeServiceError.message
            ? routeServiceError.message
            : 'Routing-Dienst nicht erreichbar.';
        }
      }
      throw new Error('Route für "' + getTransportModeLabel(transportMode) + '" konnte nicht berechnet werden. ' + lastRouteErrorMessage);
    }

    function getSelectedTransportModeFromDom() {
      const transportModeElement = byId('transportMode');
      return transportModeElement ? transportModeElement.value : 'driving';
    }

    async function applyRouteWithKnownStartPosition(startPosition, destination) {
      pauseMapFollowForRoutePlanning();
      const transportMode = getSelectedTransportModeFromDom();
      const waypoints = Array.isArray(state.selectedWaypoints) ? state.selectedWaypoints.slice() : [];
      const startHeading = startPosition.kind === 'currentLocation'
        ? normalizeHeadingDegrees(startPosition.heading)
        : null;
      const routeResult = await fetchRouteGeometry(
        startPosition.lat,
        startPosition.lon,
        destination.lat,
        destination.lon,
        transportMode,
        waypoints,
        startHeading !== null && transportMode === 'driving'
          ? { startBearing: startHeading, preventUTurn: true }
          : null
      );
      applyRouteOnMap(routeResult, destination, {
        transportMode: transportMode,
        waypoints: waypoints,
        actualStart: { lat: startPosition.lat, lon: startPosition.lon, label: startPosition.label, kind: startPosition.kind }
      });
    }

    async function applyRouteFromCurrentServerPositionToDestinationIfAvailable(destination) {
      const startPosition = await resolveRouteStartPosition();
      if (!startPosition) {
        return false;
      }
      await applyRouteWithKnownStartPosition(startPosition, destination);
      return true;
    }

    async function resolveRouteStartPosition() {
      const routeStartQueryElement = byId('routeStartQuery');
      const startQueryText = routeStartQueryElement
        ? String(routeStartQueryElement.value || '').trim()
        : '';
      if (!startQueryText) {
        return null;
      }
      if (startQueryText !== 'Mein Standort') {
        pauseMapFollowForRoutePlanning();
      }
      if (state.selectedRouteStart &&
        typeof state.selectedRouteStart.lat === 'number' &&
        typeof state.selectedRouteStart.lon === 'number' &&
        Number.isFinite(state.selectedRouteStart.lat) &&
        Number.isFinite(state.selectedRouteStart.lon) &&
        String(state.selectedRouteStart.label || '').trim() === startQueryText) {
        return {
          lat: state.selectedRouteStart.lat,
          lon: state.selectedRouteStart.lon,
          label: state.selectedRouteStart.label || startQueryText,
          kind: state.selectedRouteStart.kind || 'place'
        };
      }
      if (startQueryText === 'Mein Standort') {
        const currentPosition = await fetchCurrentPosition();
        if (!currentPosition) {
          return null;
        }
        return {
          lat: currentPosition.lat,
          lon: currentPosition.lon,
          heading: currentPosition.heading,
          speed: currentPosition.speed,
          accuracy: currentPosition.accuracy,
          label: 'Mein Standort',
          kind: 'currentLocation'
        };
      }
      const resolvedStart = await searchDestinationCoordinates(startQueryText);
      if (!resolvedStart ||
        typeof resolvedStart.lat !== 'number' ||
        typeof resolvedStart.lon !== 'number' ||
        !Number.isFinite(resolvedStart.lat) ||
        !Number.isFinite(resolvedStart.lon)) {
        return null;
      }
      state.selectedRouteStart = {
        lat: resolvedStart.lat,
        lon: resolvedStart.lon,
        label: resolvedStart.label || startQueryText,
        kind: 'place'
      };
      if (routeStartQueryElement) {
        routeStartQueryElement.value = state.selectedRouteStart.label;
      }
      renderRouteStartMarker({ skipMapViewUpdate: true });
      return {
        lat: resolvedStart.lat,
        lon: resolvedStart.lon,
        label: resolvedStart.label || startQueryText,
        kind: 'place'
      };
    }

    function syncRouteSearchStartMarkerForView() {
      if (!state.map) {
        return;
      }
      const hasExplicitStart = state.selectedRouteStart &&
        typeof state.selectedRouteStart.lat === 'number' &&
        typeof state.selectedRouteStart.lon === 'number' &&
        Number.isFinite(state.selectedRouteStart.lat) &&
        Number.isFinite(state.selectedRouteStart.lon);
      if (hasExplicitStart) {
        renderRouteStartMarker({ skipMapViewUpdate: true });
        return;
      }
      if (state.startMarker) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.startMarker);
        state.startMarker = null;
      }
    }

    async function updateMapViewForRouteSearchEndpoints() {
      if (!state.map) {
        return;
      }
      const startPosition = await resolveRouteStartPosition();
      syncRouteSearchStartMarkerForView();
      const startPoint = startPosition;
      const hasNumericStart = startPoint &&
        typeof startPoint.lat === 'number' &&
        typeof startPoint.lon === 'number' &&
        Number.isFinite(startPoint.lat) &&
        Number.isFinite(startPoint.lon);

      let destinationLatitude = NaN;
      let destinationLongitude = NaN;
      if (state.destinationMarker && typeof state.destinationMarker.getLatLng === 'function') {
        const destinationLatLng = state.destinationMarker.getLatLng();
        destinationLatitude = destinationLatLng.lat;
        destinationLongitude = destinationLatLng.lng;
      }
      const hasNumericDestination = Number.isFinite(destinationLatitude) && Number.isFinite(destinationLongitude);

      if (typeof state.map.invalidateSize === 'function') {
        state.map.invalidateSize(false);
      }
      const endpointFitOptions = {
        padding: [90, 280],
        maxZoom: 10,
        duration: NAV_ROUTE_OVERVIEW_FLY_DURATION_SEC,
        easeLinearity: 0.2
      };
      if (hasNumericStart && hasNumericDestination) {
        const routeSearchBounds = L.latLngBounds(
          [startPoint.lat, startPoint.lon],
          [destinationLatitude, destinationLongitude]
        );
        const southWestCorner = routeSearchBounds.getSouthWest();
        const northEastCorner = routeSearchBounds.getNorthEast();
        const startAndDestinationCoincide =
          Math.abs(southWestCorner.lat - northEastCorner.lat) < 1e-9 &&
          Math.abs(southWestCorner.lng - northEastCorner.lng) < 1e-9;
        if (startAndDestinationCoincide) {
          state.map.setView([startPoint.lat, startPoint.lon], 13, { animate: true });
        } else if (typeof state.map.flyToBounds === 'function') {
          state.map.flyToBounds(routeSearchBounds, endpointFitOptions);
        } else {
          state.map.fitBounds(routeSearchBounds, Object.assign({ animate: true }, endpointFitOptions));
        }
        return;
      }
      if (hasNumericDestination) {
        state.map.setView([destinationLatitude, destinationLongitude], 13, { animate: true });
        return;
      }
      if (hasNumericStart) {
        const preservedZoom = typeof state.map.getZoom === 'function' ? state.map.getZoom() : 15;
        state.map.setView([startPoint.lat, startPoint.lon], Math.max(preservedZoom, 14), { animate: true });
      }
    }

    function renderRouteStartMarker(routeStartMarkerOptions) {
      if (!state.map) {
        return;
      }
      const startEntry = state.selectedRouteStart;
      if (!startEntry || typeof startEntry.lat !== 'number' || typeof startEntry.lon !== 'number') {
        if (state.startMarker) {
          state.map.removeLayer(state.startMarker);
          state.startMarker = null;
        }
        return;
      }
      if (state.startMarker) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.startMarker);
      }
      state.startMarker = L.marker([startEntry.lat, startEntry.lon], {
        icon: createRouteLabelIcon('S', 'route-label-marker-a')
      }).addTo(state.map);
      state.startMarker.bindPopup('S (Start): ' + (startEntry.label || ''));
      if (!routeStartMarkerOptions || !routeStartMarkerOptions.skipMapViewUpdate) {
        updateMapViewForRouteSearchEndpoints();
      }
    }

    function updateStartInlineClearButtonVisibility() {
      const clearStartInlineButton = byId('clearStartInlineBtn');
      const routeStartQueryElement = byId('routeStartQuery');
      if (!clearStartInlineButton || !routeStartQueryElement) {
        return;
      }
      const hasInputText = String(routeStartQueryElement.value || '').trim().length > 0;
      clearStartInlineButton.classList.toggle('visible', hasInputText);
    }

    function formatDistanceMeters(distanceMeters) {
      if (typeof distanceMeters !== 'number' || Number.isNaN(distanceMeters)) {
        return '-';
      }
      if (distanceMeters >= 1000) {
        return (distanceMeters / 1000).toFixed(2) + ' km';
      }
      return Math.round(distanceMeters) + ' m';
    }

    function formatDurationSeconds(durationSeconds) {
      if (typeof durationSeconds !== 'number' || Number.isNaN(durationSeconds)) {
        return '-';
      }
      const totalMinutes = Math.round(durationSeconds / 60);
      const hours = Math.floor(totalMinutes / 60);
      const minutes = totalMinutes % 60;
      if (hours > 0) {
        return hours + ' h ' + minutes + ' min';
      }
      return minutes + ' min';
    }

    function createRouteLabelIcon(markerLabel, markerCssClass) {
      return L.divIcon({
        className: '',
        html: '<div class="route-label-marker ' + markerCssClass + '">' + markerLabel + '</div>',
        iconSize: [30, 30],
        iconAnchor: [15, 30],
        popupAnchor: [0, -26]
      });
    }

    function getCurrentMapBearingDegrees() {
      if (!state.map || typeof state.map.getBearing !== 'function') {
        return 0;
      }
      const rawBearing = state.map.getBearing();
      if (typeof rawBearing !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(rawBearing)) {
        return 0;
      }
      return rawBearing;
    }

    function isMapLockedFacingPositionMarker(targetMarker) {
      if (!targetMarker || !targetMarker.options || !targetMarker.options.icon) {
        return false;
      }
      const iconOptions = targetMarker.options.icon.options;
      const iconClassName = iconOptions && iconOptions.className;
      return iconClassName === 'device-facing-marker-layer';
    }

    function applyCounterRotationToSingleMarker(targetMarker, counterRotationRadians) {
      if (!targetMarker || typeof targetMarker !== 'object') {
        return;
      }
      if (!targetMarker.options) {
        return;
      }
      if (isMapLockedFacingPositionMarker(targetMarker)) {
        targetMarker.options.rotateWithView = facingMarkerRotateWithViewOption();
        targetMarker.options.rotation = 0;
        if (typeof targetMarker.update === 'function' && targetMarker._map) {
          targetMarker.update();
        }
        return;
      }
      targetMarker.options.rotation = counterRotationRadians;
      if (typeof targetMarker.update === 'function' && targetMarker._map) {
        targetMarker.update();
      }
    }

    function applyCounterRotationToAllPositionMarkers(counterRotationRadians) {
      if (state.currentMarker) {
        applyCounterRotationToSingleMarker(state.currentMarker, counterRotationRadians);
      }
      if (state.currentHeadingMarker) {
        applyCounterRotationToSingleMarker(state.currentHeadingMarker, counterRotationRadians);
      }
      if (state.allDeviceMarkersByKey && typeof state.allDeviceMarkersByKey === 'object') {
        Object.keys(state.allDeviceMarkersByKey).forEach(function (deviceKey) {
          applyCounterRotationToSingleMarker(state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[deviceKey], counterRotationRadians);
        });
      }
    }

    let mapBearingAnimationRafId = 0;
    let mapBearingAnimTargetWrapped = 0;
    let mapBearingAnimLastFrameMs = 0;

    function cancelMapBearingAnimation() {
      if (mapBearingAnimationRafId && typeof window !== 'undefined' && typeof window.cancelAnimationFrame === 'function') {
        window.cancelAnimationFrame(mapBearingAnimationRafId);
      }
      mapBearingAnimationRafId = 0;
      mapBearingAnimLastFrameMs = 0;
    }

    function wrapHeadingDegreesForMap(deg) {
      if (typeof deg !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(deg)) {
        return 0;
      }
      let wrappedHeading = deg % 360;
      if (wrappedHeading < 0) {
        wrappedHeading += 360;
      }
      if (wrappedHeading >= 360) {
        wrappedHeading -= 360;
      }
      return wrappedHeading;
    }

    function shortestSignedBearingDeltaDegrees(fromDeg, toDeg) {
      const wrappedFrom = wrapHeadingDegreesForMap(fromDeg);
      const wrappedTo = wrapHeadingDegreesForMap(toDeg);
      let deltaDegrees = wrappedTo - wrappedFrom;
      if (deltaDegrees > 180) {
        deltaDegrees -= 360;
      }
      if (deltaDegrees < -180) {
        deltaDegrees += 360;
      }
      return deltaDegrees;
    }

    let lastHeadingTurnSign = 0;
    let lastHeadingIncMs = 0;
    let lastHeadingTurnRateDegPerSec = 0;
    let mapRotationUiRefreshMs = 0;
    let persistHeadingsTimer = 0;

    let pendingBearingSyncFrameId = 0;
    function scheduleBearingMarkerSync() {
      // Follow-Loop dreht die Karte; Marker liegen in der Kartenebene (rotateWithView).
      if (state.locateFollowActive) {
        return;
      }
      if (pendingBearingSyncFrameId) {
        return;
      }
      pendingBearingSyncFrameId = (typeof window !== 'undefined' && typeof window.requestAnimationFrame === 'function')
        ? window.requestAnimationFrame(performBearingSyncNow)
        : setTimeout(performBearingSyncNow, 0);
    }

    function performBearingSyncNow() {
      pendingBearingSyncFrameId = 0;
      if (!state.map || typeof state.map.getBearing !== 'function') {
        return;
      }
      const bearingDegrees = getCurrentMapBearingDegrees();
      const counterRotationRadians = -bearingDegrees * Math.PI / 180;
      applyCounterRotationToAllPositionMarkers(counterRotationRadians);
    }

    function isHeadingUpBearingControlActive() {
      return !!state.headingUpBearingEnabled && !state.showAllDevicesOnMap;
    }

    function facingMarkerRotateWithViewOption() {
      // true => der Marker liegt in der Kartenebene (pitch/rotation 'map') und
      // kippt mit der Kamera mit. Zusammen mit der angehobenen Deckflaeche
      // (siehe CSS translateZ) wirkt er beim Neigen wie eine flache 3D-Tablette;
      // von oben sieht man nur den Kreis. Der Pfeil dreht geografisch und kann
      // dadurch nie die Fahrtrichtung verlieren.
      return true;
    }

    function enableHeadingUpBearingControl() {
      // Drehung in Fahrtrichtung freigeben (Glaettung kommt aus der
      // Einstellung auto/manuell, schaltet die Drehung aber nicht ab).
      state.headingUpBearingEnabled = true;
    }

    function disableHeadingUpBearingByUserInteraction() {
      if (!state.headingUpBearingEnabled) return;
      state.headingUpBearingEnabled = false;
      cancelMapBearingAnimation();
      state.suppressMapInteractionForAutoBearing = false;
      if (state.currentMarker && typeof state.currentMarker.setIcon === 'function') {
        const dk = getSelectedDeviceKey();
        state.currentMarker.setIcon(createCurrentPositionIcon(dk, effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(dk, state.latestHeadingDegrees)));
        if (state.currentHeadingMarker && typeof state.currentHeadingMarker.setIcon === 'function') {
          state.currentHeadingMarker.setIcon(createCurrentPositionIcon(dk, effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(dk, state.latestHeadingDegrees)));
        }
      }
    }

    function setProgrammaticMapBearingImmediate(bearingDegrees) {
      cancelMapBearingAnimation();
      if (!state.map || typeof state.map.setBearing !== 'function') {
        return;
      }
      const theta = typeof bearingDegrees === 'number' && Number.isFinite(bearingDegrees)
        ? wrapHeadingDegreesForMap(bearingDegrees)
        : 0;
      if (state.navigationAdaptiveZoomInProgress) {
        return;
      }
      state.suppressMapInteractionForAutoBearing = true;
      state.map.setBearing(theta);
      const clearSuppress = function () {
        state.suppressMapInteractionForAutoBearing = false;
      };
      if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && typeof window.requestAnimationFrame === 'function') {
        window.requestAnimationFrame(clearSuppress);
      } else {
        setTimeout(clearSuppress, 0);
      }
      scheduleBearingMarkerSync();
    }

    function setProgrammaticMapBearingAnimated(targetBearingDegrees) {
      if (!state.map || typeof state.map.setBearing !== 'function' || typeof state.map.getBearing !== 'function') {
        return;
      }
      if (state.navigationAdaptiveZoomInProgress) {
        return;
      }
      const targetWrapped = typeof targetBearingDegrees === 'number' && Number.isFinite(targetBearingDegrees)
        ? wrapHeadingDegreesForMap(targetBearingDegrees)
        : 0;
      mapBearingAnimTargetWrapped = targetWrapped;
      if (typeof window === 'undefined' || typeof window.requestAnimationFrame !== 'function') {
        setProgrammaticMapBearingImmediate(targetWrapped);
        return;
      }
      const rawStart = state.map.getBearing();
      const startWrapped = typeof rawStart === 'number' && Number.isFinite(rawStart)
        ? wrapHeadingDegreesForMap(rawStart)
        : 0;
      if (!mapBearingAnimationRafId &&
        Math.abs(shortestSignedBearingDeltaDegrees(startWrapped, targetWrapped)) < MAP_BEARING_MIN_ANIMATE_DELTA_DEG) {
        setProgrammaticMapBearingImmediate(targetWrapped);
        return;
      }
      if (mapBearingAnimationRafId) {
        return;
      }
      state.suppressMapInteractionForAutoBearing = true;
      mapBearingAnimLastFrameMs = (typeof performance !== 'undefined' && typeof performance.now === 'function')
        ? performance.now()
        : Date.now();

      function stepMapBearingAnimation(frameTimeMs) {
        if (!state.map || typeof state.map.setBearing !== 'function') {
          mapBearingAnimationRafId = 0;
          mapBearingAnimLastFrameMs = 0;
          state.suppressMapInteractionForAutoBearing = false;
          return;
        }
        const lastMs = mapBearingAnimLastFrameMs || frameTimeMs;
        const dtMs = Math.max(1, Math.min(64, frameTimeMs - lastMs));
        mapBearingAnimLastFrameMs = frameTimeMs;
        const currentWrapped = wrapHeadingDegreesForMap(state.map.getBearing());
        const signedDelta = shortestSignedBearingDeltaDegrees(currentWrapped, mapBearingAnimTargetWrapped);
        if (Math.abs(signedDelta) < MAP_BEARING_MIN_ANIMATE_DELTA_DEG) {
          state.map.setBearing(mapBearingAnimTargetWrapped);
          scheduleBearingMarkerSync();
          mapBearingAnimationRafId = 0;
          mapBearingAnimLastFrameMs = 0;
          state.suppressMapInteractionForAutoBearing = false;
          return;
        }
        const tauMs = resolveMapRotationTauMs(signedDelta, lastHeadingTurnRateDegPerSec);
        const progress = 1 - Math.exp(-dtMs / tauMs);
        state.map.setBearing(wrapHeadingDegreesForMap(currentWrapped + signedDelta * progress));
        scheduleBearingMarkerSync();
        mapBearingAnimationRafId = window.requestAnimationFrame(stepMapBearingAnimation);
      }

      mapBearingAnimationRafId = window.requestAnimationFrame(stepMapBearingAnimation);
    }

    function syncMapBearingFromHeading(effectiveHeadingDegrees) {
      if (!state.map || typeof state.map.setBearing !== 'function' || typeof state.map.getBearing !== 'function') {
        return;
      }
      if (state.navigationAdaptiveZoomInProgress) {
        return;
      }
      // Waehrend des Standort-Zooms keine Drehung, damit der Zoom nicht
      // durch die Bearing-Animation unterbrochen wird (Zoom zuerst, dann drehen).
      if (state.locateZoomInProgress) {
        return;
      }
      // Das mittige Andocken dreht bereits pro Frame mit (kombinierter
      // Kameraschreibvorgang) -> hier kein zweiter Bearing-Loop.
      if (state.locateFollowActive) {
        return;
      }
      if (!isHeadingUpBearingControlActive()) {
        return;
      }
      const hasFiniteHeading = typeof effectiveHeadingDegrees === 'number' && Number.isFinite(effectiveHeadingDegrees);
      if (hasFiniteHeading) {
        const targetWrapped = wrapHeadingDegreesForMap(-effectiveHeadingDegrees);
        const currentWrapped = wrapHeadingDegreesForMap(state.map.getBearing());
        const deltaFromCurrent = Math.abs(shortestSignedBearingDeltaDegrees(currentWrapped, targetWrapped));
        const mapFilter = getMapHeadingFilterLimits();
        const bearingDeadbandDeg = mapFilter.bearingDeadbandDeg;
        const deltaFromAnimTarget = mapBearingAnimationRafId
          ? Math.abs(shortestSignedBearingDeltaDegrees(
            wrapHeadingDegreesForMap(mapBearingAnimTargetWrapped),
            targetWrapped
          ))
          : deltaFromCurrent;
        if (deltaFromCurrent < bearingDeadbandDeg &&
          deltaFromAnimTarget < bearingDeadbandDeg) {
          return;
        }
        setProgrammaticMapBearingAnimated(-effectiveHeadingDegrees);
        return;
      }
      setProgrammaticMapBearingAnimated(0);
    }

    function buildFacingIconSvg(normalizedHeading, accentHex) {
      // Kreis-Marker als flache 3D-Tablette: eine farbige Basis (Z=0) und eine
      // angehobene Deckflaeche (CSS translateZ). Da der Marker in der Kartenebene
      // liegt, kippt er mit der Kamera -> beim Neigen wird die farbige Dicke
      // sichtbar, von oben deckt die Deckflaeche die Basis und man sieht nur den
      // Kreis. Der Pfeil zeigt geografische Fahrtrichtung (0 = Norden).
      const arrow = normalizedHeading === null ? '' : (
        '<g class="device-facing-arrow" style="transform-origin:28px 28px;transform-box:view-box;transform:rotate(' + normalizedHeading + 'deg)">' +
          '<path d="M28 8.5L38 34L28 26.5L18 34Z" fill="#111"/></g>'
      );
      return '<div class="device-facing-marker">' +
        '<div class="device-facing-marker-base"><svg viewBox="0 0 56 56" width="56" height="56" aria-hidden="true">' +
          '<circle class="device-facing-marker-body" cx="28" cy="28" r="22" fill="' + accentHex + '"/>' +
          '<circle cx="28" cy="28" r="22" fill="none" stroke="rgba(0,0,0,0.22)" stroke-width="1.4"/>' +
        '</svg></div>' +
        '<div class="device-facing-marker-top"><svg viewBox="0 0 56 56" width="56" height="56" aria-hidden="true">' +
          '<circle class="device-facing-marker-pulse-ring" cx="28" cy="28" r="21" fill="none" stroke="' + accentHex + '" stroke-width="3.2"/>' +
          '<circle class="device-facing-marker-ring" cx="28" cy="28" r="20" fill="#fff" stroke="' + accentHex + '" stroke-width="3"/>' +
          '<circle cx="28" cy="28" r="14.5" fill="#fff" stroke="rgba(17,17,17,0.26)" stroke-width="1.1"/>' +
          arrow +
        '</svg></div>' +
      '</div>';
    }

    function createCurrentPositionIcon(deviceKey, normalizedHeading, isSelectedAllMode) {
      return L.divIcon({
        className: 'device-facing-marker-layer' + (isSelectedAllMode ? ' selected-device-pulse' : ''),
        html: buildFacingIconSvg(normalizedHeading, getDeviceAccentColor(deviceKey)),
        iconSize: [56, 56],
        iconAnchor: [28, 28],
        popupAnchor: [0, -30]
      });
    }

    function updateCurrentPositionIcon(marker, deviceKey, normalizedHeading, isSelectedAllMode) {
      if (!marker || typeof marker.setIcon !== 'function') return;
      const element = typeof marker.getElement === 'function' ? marker.getElement() : marker._el;
      if (element && element.classList) {
        element.classList.remove('selected-device-blink');
        element.classList.toggle('selected-device-pulse', !!isSelectedAllMode);
      }
      const arrow = element && element.querySelector ? element.querySelector('.device-facing-arrow') : null;
      const ring = element && element.querySelector ? element.querySelector('.device-facing-marker-ring') : null;
      const pulseRing = element && element.querySelector ? element.querySelector('.device-facing-marker-pulse-ring') : null;
      const body = element && element.querySelector ? element.querySelector('.device-facing-marker-body') : null;
      const accent = getDeviceAccentColor(deviceKey);
      if (ring) ring.setAttribute('stroke', accent);
      if (pulseRing) pulseRing.setAttribute('stroke', accent);
      if (body) body.setAttribute('fill', accent);
      if (arrow && normalizedHeading !== null) {
        arrow.style.transform = 'rotate(' + normalizedHeading + 'deg)';
        return;
      }
      marker.setIcon(createCurrentPositionIcon(deviceKey, normalizedHeading, isSelectedAllMode));
    }

    function areSameRouteDestinationSuggestions(firstSuggestion, secondSuggestion) {
      if (!firstSuggestion || !secondSuggestion) {
        return false;
      }
      if (typeof firstSuggestion.lat !== 'number' || typeof firstSuggestion.lon !== 'number') {
        return false;
      }
      if (typeof secondSuggestion.lat !== 'number' || typeof secondSuggestion.lon !== 'number') {
        return false;
      }
      if (!Number.isFinite(firstSuggestion.lat) || !Number.isFinite(firstSuggestion.lon)) {
        return false;
      }
      if (!Number.isFinite(secondSuggestion.lat) || !Number.isFinite(secondSuggestion.lon)) {
        return false;
      }
      const coordinateEpsilon = 1e-6;
      return (
        Math.abs(firstSuggestion.lat - secondSuggestion.lat) < coordinateEpsilon &&
        Math.abs(firstSuggestion.lon - secondSuggestion.lon) < coordinateEpsilon
      );
    }

    function displayDestination(destination, displayDestinationOptions) {
      if (!destination || typeof destination.lat !== 'number' || typeof destination.lon !== 'number') {
        throw new Error('Suchziel ist ungültig.');
      }
      if (!displayDestinationOptions || !displayDestinationOptions.preserveActiveNavigation) {
        pauseMapFollowForRoutePlanning();
      }
      if (state.destinationMarker) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.destinationMarker);
      }
      state.destinationMarker = L.marker([destination.lat, destination.lon], {
        icon: createRouteLabelIcon('A', 'route-label-marker-a')
      }).addTo(state.map);
      state.destinationMarker.bindPopup('A (Ziel): ' + destination.label);
      renderRouteStartMarker(displayDestinationOptions);
      if (!displayDestinationOptions || !displayDestinationOptions.skipMapViewUpdate) {
        updateMapViewForRouteSearchEndpoints().catch(function (mapViewError) {
          console.error('Kartenansicht für Start und Ziel:', mapViewError);
        });
      }
      updateRouteActionVisibility(); updateInlineClearButtonVisibility();
    }

    function updateWaypointButtonState() {
      const waypointButton = byId('waypointBtn');
      if (waypointButton) {
        waypointButton.classList.toggle('active', state.awaitingWaypointPick);
        const waypointCount = Array.isArray(state.selectedWaypoints) ? state.selectedWaypoints.length : 0;
        waypointButton.textContent = waypointCount > 0
          ? 'Zwischenstopps: ' + waypointCount + '/' + MAX_WAYPOINT_STOPS
          : 'Zwischenstopp';
      }
      const waypointDynamicContainer = byId('waypointDynamicContainer');
      if (waypointDynamicContainer) {
        const rowCount = Array.isArray(state.waypointEditorRows) ? state.waypointEditorRows.length : 0;
        waypointDynamicContainer.classList.toggle('waypoint-dynamic-empty', rowCount === 0);
      }
      updateDialogLayout();
    }

    function newWaypointEditorRowId() {
      return 'w_' + Date.now().toString(36) + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 9);
    }

    function findWaypointRowIndexById(rowId) {
      if (!rowId || !Array.isArray(state.waypointEditorRows)) {
        return -1;
      }
      for (let rowIndex = 0; rowIndex < state.waypointEditorRows.length; rowIndex += 1) {
        if (state.waypointEditorRows[rowIndex].id === rowId) {
          return rowIndex;
        }
      }
      return -1;
    }

    function syncSelectedWaypointsFromEditorRows() {
      if (!Array.isArray(state.waypointEditorRows)) {
        state.waypointEditorRows = [];
      }
      state.selectedWaypoints = [];
      state.waypointEditorRows.forEach(function (rowEntry) {
        const suggestionItem = rowEntry && rowEntry.suggestion;
        if (suggestionItem &&
          typeof suggestionItem.lat === 'number' &&
          Number.isFinite(suggestionItem.lat) &&
          typeof suggestionItem.lon === 'number' &&
          Number.isFinite(suggestionItem.lon)) {
          state.selectedWaypoints.push({
            lat: suggestionItem.lat,
            lon: suggestionItem.lon,
            label: suggestionItem.label || ''
          });
        }
      });
    }

    function renderWaypointDynamicRows() {
      const containerElement = byId('waypointDynamicContainer');
      if (!containerElement) {
        return;
      }
      containerElement.innerHTML = '';
      if (!Array.isArray(state.waypointEditorRows) || state.waypointEditorRows.length === 0) {
        containerElement.classList.add('waypoint-dynamic-empty');
        updateRouteLetterBadgesVisibility();
        updateWaypointButtonState();
        return;
      }
      containerElement.classList.remove('waypoint-dynamic-empty');

      state.waypointEditorRows.forEach(function (rowEntry, rowIndex) {
        const rowWrapElement = document.createElement('div');
        rowWrapElement.className = 'waypoint-dynamic-row waypoint-row-static';

        const inputWrapElement = document.createElement('div');
        inputWrapElement.className = 'search-input-wrap';

        const waypointInputElement = document.createElement('input');
        waypointInputElement.className = 'text-input';
        waypointInputElement.type = 'text';
        waypointInputElement.setAttribute('data-waypoint-row-id', rowEntry.id);
        waypointInputElement.placeholder = 'Zwischenstopp suchen (Adresse oder Ort)';
        waypointInputElement.setAttribute('autocomplete', 'off');
        waypointInputElement.setAttribute('autocorrect', 'off');
        waypointInputElement.setAttribute('autocapitalize', 'off');
        waypointInputElement.setAttribute('spellcheck', 'false');
        waypointInputElement.name = 'mapWaypointQuery';
        waypointInputElement.value = rowEntry.suggestion && rowEntry.suggestion.label
          ? rowEntry.suggestion.label
          : '';

        const clearRowButton = document.createElement('button');
        clearRowButton.type = 'button';
        clearRowButton.className = 'search-clear-btn';
        clearRowButton.title = 'Eingabe leeren';
        clearRowButton.textContent = '×';
        const updateClearRowVisibility = function () {
          const hasInputText = String(waypointInputElement.value || '').trim().length > 0;
          clearRowButton.classList.toggle('visible', hasInputText);
        };
        updateClearRowVisibility();

        clearRowButton.addEventListener('click', function (clickEvent) {
          stopEventPropagation(clickEvent);
          waypointInputElement.value = '';
          rowEntry.suggestion = null;
          state.selectedWaypointSuggestion = null;
          syncSelectedWaypointsFromEditorRows();
          renderWaypointMarkers();
          updateClearRowVisibility();
          hideWaypointSuggestions();
        });

        inputWrapElement.appendChild(waypointInputElement);
        inputWrapElement.appendChild(clearRowButton);

        const waypointLabelElement = document.createElement('div');
        waypointLabelElement.className = 'waypoint-index-badge route-letter-badge';
        waypointLabelElement.textContent = String.fromCharCode(66 + rowIndex);
        waypointLabelElement.title = 'Zwischenstopp ' + (rowIndex + 1);

        const actionsWrapElement = document.createElement('div');
        actionsWrapElement.className = 'waypoint-row-actions';

        const addRowButton = document.createElement('button');
        addRowButton.type = 'button';
        addRowButton.className = 'button button-route waypoint-row-icon-btn';
        addRowButton.title = 'Weiteres Suchfeld';
        addRowButton.textContent = '+';

        const removeRowButton = document.createElement('button');
        removeRowButton.type = 'button';
        removeRowButton.className = 'waypoint-remove-btn';
        removeRowButton.title = 'Zeile entfernen';
        removeRowButton.textContent = '×';

        addRowButton.addEventListener('click', function (clickEvent) {
          stopEventPropagation(clickEvent);
          if (state.waypointEditorRows.length >= MAX_WAYPOINT_STOPS) {
            window.alert('Maximal ' + MAX_WAYPOINT_STOPS + ' Zwischenstopps sind möglich.');
            return;
          }
          const newRowPayload = { id: newWaypointEditorRowId(), suggestion: null };
          state.waypointEditorRows.splice(rowIndex + 1, 0, newRowPayload);
          state.activeWaypointRowId = newRowPayload.id;
          state.waypointSuggestionTargetRowId = newRowPayload.id;
          state.awaitingWaypointPick = true;
          state.pendingFocusWaypointRowId = newRowPayload.id;
          state.selectedWaypointSuggestion = null;
          hideWaypointSuggestions();
          renderWaypointDynamicRows();
          updateWaypointButtonState();
        });

        removeRowButton.addEventListener('click', function (clickEvent) {
          stopEventPropagation(clickEvent);
          state.waypointEditorRows.splice(rowIndex, 1);
          if (state.activeWaypointRowId === rowEntry.id) {
            state.activeWaypointRowId = null;
            state.awaitingWaypointPick = false;
          }
          if (state.waypointSuggestionTargetRowId === rowEntry.id) {
            state.waypointSuggestionTargetRowId = null;
          }
          hideWaypointSuggestions();
          syncSelectedWaypointsFromEditorRows();
          renderWaypointDynamicRows();
          renderWaypointMarkers();
          updateWaypointButtonState();
        });

        waypointInputElement.addEventListener('focus', function () {
          state.activeWaypointRowId = rowEntry.id;
          state.waypointSuggestionTargetRowId = rowEntry.id;
          state.awaitingWaypointPick = true;
          state.activeSearchTarget = { kind: 'waypoint', rowId: rowEntry.id };
          updateWaypointButtonState();
          openWaypointSuggestionsForInput(waypointInputElement);
        });
        waypointInputElement.addEventListener('click', function () {
          state.activeWaypointRowId = rowEntry.id;
          state.waypointSuggestionTargetRowId = rowEntry.id;
          state.awaitingWaypointPick = true;
          state.activeSearchTarget = { kind: 'waypoint', rowId: rowEntry.id };
          updateWaypointButtonState();
          openWaypointSuggestionsForInput(waypointInputElement);
        });
        waypointInputElement.addEventListener('input', function () {
          const previousLabel = rowEntry.suggestion && rowEntry.suggestion.label
            ? String(rowEntry.suggestion.label)
            : '';
          if (String(waypointInputElement.value || '').trim() !== previousLabel.trim()) {
            rowEntry.suggestion = null;
          }
          state.selectedWaypointSuggestion = null;
          syncSelectedWaypointsFromEditorRows();
          renderWaypointMarkers();
          updateClearRowVisibility();
          if (state.waypointSuggestTimer) {
            clearTimeout(state.waypointSuggestTimer);
          }
          state.waypointSuggestionTargetRowId = rowEntry.id;
          state.waypointSuggestTimer = setTimeout(function () {
            fetchRouteSuggestions(waypointInputElement.value, true).then(function (suggestionList) {
              state.waypointSuggestions = Array.isArray(suggestionList) ? suggestionList : [];
              renderWaypointSuggestions();
            }).catch(function (error) {
              if (error && error.name === 'AbortError') {
                return;
              }
              console.error('Fehler bei Zwischenstopp-Vorschlägen:', error);
              hideWaypointSuggestions();
            });
          }, ROUTE_INPUT_DEBOUNCE_MS);
        });
        waypointInputElement.addEventListener('keydown', function (keyboardEvent) {
          if (keyboardEvent.key === 'Enter') {
            keyboardEvent.preventDefault();
            handleWaypointRowEnterCommit(rowEntry.id).catch(function (error) {
              console.error('Fehler bei Zwischenstopp-Suche:', error);
              window.alert(getErrorMessageOrFallback(error, 'Zwischenstopp konnte nicht gesetzt werden.'));
            });
          }
        });

        if (state.waypointEditorRows.length < MAX_WAYPOINT_STOPS) {
          actionsWrapElement.appendChild(addRowButton);
        }
        actionsWrapElement.appendChild(removeRowButton);

        rowWrapElement.appendChild(waypointLabelElement);
        rowWrapElement.appendChild(inputWrapElement);
        rowWrapElement.appendChild(actionsWrapElement);
        containerElement.appendChild(rowWrapElement);
      });

      if (state.pendingFocusWaypointRowId) {
        const focusRowId = state.pendingFocusWaypointRowId;
        state.pendingFocusWaypointRowId = null;
        const focusInputElement = containerElement.querySelector('input[data-waypoint-row-id="' + focusRowId + '"]');
        if (focusInputElement && typeof focusInputElement.focus === 'function') {
          setTimeout(function () {
            focusInputElement.focus();
          }, 0);
        }
      }

      updateRouteLetterBadgesVisibility();
      updateWaypointButtonState();
    }

    function appendWaypointEditorRowAfterDestinationSearch() {
      if (!state.selectedRouteSuggestion) {
        return;
      }
      if (state.waypointEditorRows.length >= MAX_WAYPOINT_STOPS) {
        window.alert('Maximal ' + MAX_WAYPOINT_STOPS + ' Zwischenstopps sind möglich.');
        return;
      }
      const lastRowEntry = state.waypointEditorRows.length > 0
        ? state.waypointEditorRows[state.waypointEditorRows.length - 1]
        : null;
      if (lastRowEntry && !lastRowEntry.suggestion) {
        state.activeWaypointRowId = lastRowEntry.id;
        state.waypointSuggestionTargetRowId = lastRowEntry.id;
        state.awaitingWaypointPick = true;
        state.pendingFocusWaypointRowId = lastRowEntry.id;
        state.selectedWaypointSuggestion = null;
        hideWaypointSuggestions();
        renderWaypointDynamicRows();
        updateWaypointButtonState();
        return;
      }
      const newRowPayload = { id: newWaypointEditorRowId(), suggestion: null };
      state.waypointEditorRows.push(newRowPayload);
      state.activeWaypointRowId = newRowPayload.id;
      state.waypointSuggestionTargetRowId = newRowPayload.id;
      state.awaitingWaypointPick = true;
      state.pendingFocusWaypointRowId = newRowPayload.id;
      state.selectedWaypointSuggestion = null;
      hideWaypointSuggestions();
      renderWaypointDynamicRows();
      updateWaypointButtonState();
    }

    async function recalculateRouteForSelectedDestination() {
      if (!state.selectedRouteSuggestion) {
        return;
      }
      await applyRouteFromCurrentServerPositionToDestinationIfAvailable(state.selectedRouteSuggestion);
    }

    function renderWaypointMarkers() {
      if (Array.isArray(state.waypointMarkers)) {
        state.waypointMarkers.forEach(function (waypointMarkerEntry) {
          state.map.removeLayer(waypointMarkerEntry);
        });
      }
      state.waypointMarkers = [];
      (Array.isArray(state.selectedWaypoints) ? state.selectedWaypoints : []).forEach(function (waypointItem, waypointIndex) {
        if (!waypointItem || typeof waypointItem.lat !== 'number' || typeof waypointItem.lon !== 'number') {
          return;
        }
        const markerLetter = String.fromCharCode(66 + waypointIndex);
        const waypointMarker = L.marker([waypointItem.lat, waypointItem.lon], {
          icon: createRouteLabelIcon(markerLetter, 'route-label-marker-b')
        }).addTo(state.map);
        waypointMarker.bindPopup(markerLetter + ' (Zwischenstopp): ' + (waypointItem.label || 'Punkt'));
        state.waypointMarkers.push(waypointMarker);
      });
    }

    function fitMapToRoutePoints() {
      if (!state.map) {
        return;
      }
      const routePointLatLngs = [];
      if (state.destinationMarker) {
        routePointLatLngs.push(state.destinationMarker.getLatLng());
      }
      if (Array.isArray(state.waypointMarkers)) {
        state.waypointMarkers.forEach(function (waypointMarkerEntry) {
          if (waypointMarkerEntry) {
            routePointLatLngs.push(waypointMarkerEntry.getLatLng());
          }
        });
      }
      if (state.currentMarker) {
        routePointLatLngs.push(state.currentMarker.getLatLng());
      }
      if (routePointLatLngs.length === 0) {
        return;
      }
      if (routePointLatLngs.length === 1) {
        state.map.setView(routePointLatLngs[0], Math.min(state.map.getZoom(), 15), { animate: true });
        return;
      }
      const routeBounds = L.latLngBounds(routePointLatLngs);
      state.map.fitBounds(routeBounds, { padding: [60, 60], maxZoom: 16, animate: true });
    }

    function fitMapToVisibleSavedRoutesAndPlaces() {
      if (!state.map) return;
      let bounds = null;
      function addPoint(latLng) {
        if (!latLng) return;
        bounds = bounds ? bounds.extend(latLng) : L.latLngBounds(latLng, latLng);
      }
      Object.keys(state.visibleSavedRouteLayers).forEach(function (routeId) {
        const layer = state.visibleSavedRouteLayers[routeId];
        if (!layer || !layer.line) return;
        (layer.line.getLatLngs() || []).forEach(addPoint);
        addPoint(layer.startMarker && layer.startMarker.getLatLng());
        addPoint(layer.endMarker && layer.endMarker.getLatLng());
      });
      Object.keys(state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers).forEach(function (placeId) {
        addPoint(state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers[placeId] && state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers[placeId].getLatLng());
      });
      if (!bounds || !bounds.isValid()) return;
      disableAutoFollowTemporarilyByUserInteraction();
      state.userHasInteractedWithMap = true;
      state.shouldAutoFitTrackLine = false;
      if (state.map.stop) state.map.stop();
      if (state.map.invalidateSize) state.map.invalidateSize(false);
      disableHeadingUpBearingByUserInteraction();
      setProgrammaticMapBearingImmediate(0);
      const southWest = bounds.getSouthWest();
      const northEast = bounds.getNorthEast();
      const fitOptions = {
        padding: [80, 80],
        maxZoom: 16,
        duration: NAV_ROUTE_OVERVIEW_FLY_DURATION_SEC,
        easeLinearity: 0.2
      };
      const singlePoint = Math.abs(southWest.lat - northEast.lat) < 1e-9 &&
        Math.abs(southWest.lng - northEast.lng) < 1e-9;
      if (singlePoint) {
        state.map.flyTo([southWest.lat, southWest.lng], 14, fitOptions);
        return;
      }
      if (state.map.flyToBounds) state.map.flyToBounds(bounds, fitOptions);
      else state.map.fitBounds(bounds, Object.assign({ animate: true }, fitOptions));
    }

    async function handleWaypointRowEnterCommit(rowId) {
      if (!state.selectedRouteSuggestion) {
        throw new Error('Bitte zuerst ein Ziel auswählen.');
      }
      const rowIndex = findWaypointRowIndexById(rowId);
      if (rowIndex < 0) {
        return;
      }
      const containerElement = byId('waypointDynamicContainer');
      const inputElement = containerElement
        ? containerElement.querySelector('input[data-waypoint-row-id="' + rowId + '"]')
        : null;
      const waypointQuery = inputElement ? inputElement.value : '';
      const rowEntry = state.waypointEditorRows[rowIndex];
      const waypoint = state.selectedWaypointSuggestion && waypointQuery && state.selectedWaypointSuggestion.label === waypointQuery
        ? state.selectedWaypointSuggestion
        : await searchDestinationCoordinatesDirect(waypointQuery);
      hideWaypointSuggestions();
      rowEntry.suggestion = {
        lat: waypoint.lat,
        lon: waypoint.lon,
        label: waypoint.label
      };
      state.selectedWaypointSuggestion = null;
      syncSelectedWaypointsFromEditorRows();
      renderWaypointDynamicRows();
      renderWaypointMarkers();
      updateWaypointButtonState();
