          if (state.currentHeadingMarker) {
            state.map.removeLayer(state.currentHeadingMarker);
            state.currentHeadingMarker = null;
          }
          updateCurrentPositionIcon(state.currentMarker, dk, eff);
          return;
        }

        if (state.showAllDevicesOnMap && dk && state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[dk] &&
          typeof state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[dk].setIcon === 'function') {
          if (state.currentHeadingMarker) {
            state.map.removeLayer(state.currentHeadingMarker);
            state.currentHeadingMarker = null;
          }
          updateCurrentPositionIcon(state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[dk], dk, eff, dk === getSelectedDeviceKey());
          return;
        }
        if (state.showAllDevicesOnMap) return;

        const hi = createCurrentPositionIcon(dk, eff);
        if (!state.currentHeadingMarker) {
          state.currentHeadingMarker = L.marker(currentLatLng, {
            icon: hi,
            interactive: false,
            keyboard: false,
            zIndexOffset: 2500,
            rotateWithView: facingMarkerRotateWithViewOption(),
            rotation: 0
          }).addTo(state.map);
        } else {
          state.currentHeadingMarker.setLatLng(currentLatLng);
          state.currentHeadingMarker.setIcon(hi);
        }
      } finally {
        syncMapBearingFromHeading(eff);
        if (!state.locateFollowActive) {
          performBearingSyncNow();
        }
      }
    }

    function resolveMarkerMoveDurationMs(pointTimestamp, fallbackDurationMs, motionState, updateTimeKey, nativeLiveMove) {
      const durationMs = resolveSmoothMarkerMoveDurationMs(
        pointTimestamp,
        fallbackDurationMs,
        motionState,
        updateTimeKey
      );
      if (!nativeLiveMove) {
        return durationMs;
      }
      return Math.max(
        MARKER_MOVE_NATIVE_MIN_DURATION_MS,
        Math.min(MARKER_MOVE_NATIVE_MAX_DURATION_MS, Math.round(durationMs * 0.55))
      );
    }

    function animateMapDeviceMarkerTo(marker, nextLatLng, pointTimestamp, animationState, animationFrameKey, onFrame, nativeLiveMove) {
      if (!marker || !nextLatLng) {
        return;
      }
      const previousLatLng = typeof marker.getLatLng === 'function' ? marker.getLatLng() : null;
      if (previousLatLng && Number.isFinite(previousLatLng.lat) && Number.isFinite(previousLatLng.lng)) {
        const stepMeters = haversineKilometers(
          previousLatLng.lat,
          previousLatLng.lng,
          nextLatLng[0],
          nextLatLng[1]
        ) * 1000;
        if (stepMeters < MARKER_MOVE_SKIP_DISTANCE_M) {
          marker.setLatLng(nextLatLng);
          if (typeof onFrame === 'function') {
            onFrame(nextLatLng[0], nextLatLng[1]);
          }
          return;
        }
      }
      const motionState = animationState || marker;
      const frameKey = animationFrameKey || '_moveAnimationFrame';
      const motionTimeKey = frameKey === 'currentMarkerAnimationFrame'
        ? 'markerMotionLastUpdateAtMs'
        : '_markerMotionLastUpdateAtMs';
      animateMarkerLatLng(
        marker,
        nextLatLng,
        resolveMarkerMoveDurationMs(
          pointTimestamp,
          MARKER_MOVE_MIN_DURATION_MS,
          motionState,
          motionTimeKey,
          nativeLiveMove
        ),
        motionState,
        frameKey,
        onFrame
      );
    }

    function animateMarkerLatLng(marker, nextLatLng, durationMs, animationState, animationFrameKey, onFrame) {
      if (!marker) return;
      const previousLatLng = marker.getLatLng();
      if (!previousLatLng) {
        marker.setLatLng(nextLatLng);
        return;
      }

      if (animationState && animationState[animationFrameKey]) cancelAnimationFrame(animationState[animationFrameKey]);
      const targetLat = nextLatLng[0];
      const targetLng = nextLatLng[1];
      const startLat = previousLatLng.lat;
      const startLng = previousLatLng.lng;
      const animationDurationMs = typeof durationMs === 'number' && Number.isFinite(durationMs) && durationMs > 0
        ? durationMs
        : MARKER_MOVE_MIN_DURATION_MS;
      const animationStartMs = performance.now();

      function stepMarkerAnimation(frameTimeMs) {
        const elapsedMs = frameTimeMs - animationStartMs;
        const progress = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, elapsedMs / animationDurationMs));
        const easedProgress = progress;
        const interpolatedLat = startLat + (targetLat - startLat) * easedProgress;
        const interpolatedLng = startLng + (targetLng - startLng) * easedProgress;
        marker.setLatLng([interpolatedLat, interpolatedLng]);
        if (typeof onFrame === 'function') onFrame(interpolatedLat, interpolatedLng);
        if (animationState) animationState[animationFrameKey] = progress < 1 ? requestAnimationFrame(stepMarkerAnimation) : null;
      }

      if (animationState) animationState[animationFrameKey] = requestAnimationFrame(stepMarkerAnimation);
    }

    function resolveLocalLiveMotionTargetLatLng(nextLatLng, pointTimestamp, nativeLiveMove, positionEntry) {
      if (!nativeLiveMove || !Array.isArray(nextLatLng) || !positionEntry) {
        return nextLatLng;
      }
      const speedKmh = Number(positionEntry.speed);
      if (!Number.isFinite(speedKmh) || speedKmh < LOCAL_LIVE_LOOKAHEAD_MIN_SPEED_KMH) {
        return nextLatLng;
      }
      let heading = normalizeHeadingDegrees(positionEntry.heading);
      if (heading === null) {
        heading = effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(getSelectedDeviceKey(), state.latestHeadingDegrees);
      }
      if (heading === null) {
        return nextLatLng;
      }
      const timestampMs = Number(pointTimestamp || positionEntry.timestamp);
      const ageMs = Number.isFinite(timestampMs) && timestampMs > 0
        ? Math.max(0, Date.now() - timestampMs)
        : 0;
      if (ageMs > LOCAL_LIVE_LOOKAHEAD_STALE_MAX_MS) {
        return nextLatLng;
      }
      const leadMs = Math.min(LOCAL_LIVE_LOOKAHEAD_STALE_MAX_MS, ageMs + LOCAL_LIVE_LOOKAHEAD_MS);
      const lookAheadMeters = Math.min(
        LOCAL_LIVE_LOOKAHEAD_MAX_METERS,
        Math.max(0, speedKmh / 3.6 * (leadMs / 1000))
      );
      if (lookAheadMeters < 0.25) {
        return nextLatLng;
      }
      const ahead = latLngAheadByBearing(nextLatLng[0], nextLatLng[1], heading, lookAheadMeters);
      return ahead && coordinatesArePlausibleForMap(ahead.lat, ahead.lon)
        ? [ahead.lat, ahead.lon]
        : nextLatLng;
    }

    function animateCurrentMarkerTo(nextLatLng, pointTimestamp, nativeLiveMove, positionEntry) {
      if (!state.currentMarker) return;
      if (navigationMapDockControlsMap() && state.autoFollowEnabled) {
        animateNavigationMapDockFollow(
          nextLatLng[0],
          nextLatLng[1],
          state.map.getZoom(),
          false,
          pointTimestamp
        );
        return;
      }
      // Beim mittigen Andocken besitzt der Follow-Loop die Bewegung: er zieht
      // Marker UND Kamera in EINER geglaetteten Bewegung zum Ziel. Hier wird
      // daher KEINE zweite Marker-Animation gestartet (sonst zwei Quellen ->
      // Frame-Versatz, Ruckeln, haengende Drehung). Nur das Ziel uebergeben.
      if (locateFollowControlsMap()) {
        setLocateFollowTarget(resolveLocalLiveMotionTargetLatLng(
          nextLatLng,
          pointTimestamp,
          nativeLiveMove,
          positionEntry
        ));
        return;
      }
      animateMapDeviceMarkerTo(
        state.currentMarker,
        nextLatLng,
        pointTimestamp,
        state,
        'currentMarkerAnimationFrame',
        function (interpolatedLat, interpolatedLng) {
          if (state.currentHeadingMarker) {
            state.currentHeadingMarker.setLatLng([interpolatedLat, interpolatedLng]);
          }
          updateLatestTrackingRouteTailVisualToLatLng(getSelectedDeviceKey(), interpolatedLat, interpolatedLng);
          updateNavigationRouteRemainingForLatLng(interpolatedLat, interpolatedLng);
        },
        !!nativeLiveMove
      );
    }

    function stopLiveTrackingChannel() {
      state.liveTrackingSocketClosedByApp = true;
      clearAutoFollowResumeTimer();
      if (state.liveTrackingReconnectTimer) {
        clearTimeout(state.liveTrackingReconnectTimer);
        state.liveTrackingReconnectTimer = null;
      }
      if (state.liveTrackingSocket) {
        try {
          state.liveTrackingSocket.close();
        } catch (socketCloseError) {
          console.error('Fehler beim Schließen des Live-Tracking-Sockets:', socketCloseError);
        } finally {
          state.liveTrackingSocket = null;
        }
      }
      state.liveTrackingUpdatePending = false;
      if (state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame) {
        cancelAnimationFrame(state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame);
        state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame = null;
      }
      clearNavigationDockFollowAnimation();
      if (state.currentHeadingMarker) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.currentHeadingMarker);
        state.currentHeadingMarker = null;
      }
    }

    function isCapacitorNativeApp() {
      if (typeof window.__isCapacitorNative === 'function') return window.__isCapacitorNative();
      var cap = window.Capacitor;
      if (!cap) return false;
      if (typeof cap.isNativePlatform === 'function' && cap.isNativePlatform()) return true;
      if (typeof cap.getPlatform === 'function') {
        var platform = String(cap.getPlatform() || '').toLowerCase();
        return platform === 'android' || platform === 'ios';
      }
      return false;
    }

    function isNativeAppContext() {
      return isCapacitorNativeApp() || document.documentElement.classList.contains('native-app');
    }

    var nativeProfileUiBound = false;
    var nativeManualRefreshInFlight = false;
    var serverUploadButtonEnabled = null;
    var serverUploadToggleInFlight = false;
    var toolbarPullStart = null;

    function syncToolbarButtonIcons() {
      var panelButton = byId('panelToggleBtn');
      var profileButton = byId('nativeProfileBtn');
      if (panelButton) panelButton.innerHTML = '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 12c2.76 0 5-2.24 5-5s-2.24-5-5-5-5 2.24-5 5 2.24 5 5 5zm0 2c-3.33 0-10 1.67-10 5v2h20v-2c0-3.33-6.67-5-10-5z"/></svg>';
      if (profileButton) profileButton.innerHTML = '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M4 7h10"/><path d="M18 7h2"/><circle cx="16" cy="7" r="2"/><path d="M4 17h2"/><path d="M10 17h10"/><circle cx="8" cy="17" r="2"/></svg>';
    }

    function setServerUploadButtonState(enabled, source) {
      var active = !!enabled;
      serverUploadButtonEnabled = active;
      var button = byId('serverUploadToggleBtn');
      if (button) {
        var label = active ? 'Punkte an Server senden: ein' : 'Punkte an Server senden: aus';
        button.classList.toggle('active', active);
        button.setAttribute('aria-pressed', active ? 'true' : 'false');
        button.setAttribute('aria-label', label);
        button.title = label;
        button.disabled = !!serverUploadToggleInFlight;
      }
      var profileServerUpload = byId('nativeProfileServerUpload');
      if (profileServerUpload) profileServerUpload.checked = active;
      logPerfTraceMaplogik('ServerUploadButton', [
        'action=state',
        'enabled=' + String(active),
        'source=' + String(source || 'unknown')
      ], 'serverUploadButton:state:' + String(source || 'unknown') + ':' + String(active));
    }

    async function syncServerUploadButtonFromBridge(source) {
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (!bridge || typeof bridge.getProfileSettings !== 'function') {
        setServerUploadButtonState(readNativeProfileDefaults().serverUploadEnabled !== false, source || 'localDefault');
        return false;
      }
      var data = await bridge.getProfileSettings();
      setServerUploadButtonState(!data || data.serverUploadEnabled !== false, source || 'profile');
      return true;
    }

    function playServerUploadToggleFeedback(enabled, source) {
      var active = !!enabled;
      try {
        var cap = window.Capacitor;
        var nativeUpload = cap && cap.Plugins && cap.Plugins.NativeGpsUpload;
        if (nativeUpload && typeof nativeUpload.playServerUploadToggleFeedback === 'function') {
          logPerfTraceMaplogik('ServerUploadFeedback', [
            'action=play',
            'enabled=' + String(active),
            'source=' + String(source || 'toggleResult')
          ], 'serverUploadFeedback:play:' + String(active) + ':' + String(source || 'toggleResult'), 0);
          Promise.resolve(nativeUpload.playServerUploadToggleFeedback({ enabled: active })).catch(function () {});
          return;
        }
      } catch (error) {}
      if (typeof navigator !== 'undefined' && typeof navigator.vibrate === 'function') {
        try {
          navigator.vibrate(25);
          logPerfTraceMaplogik('ServerUploadFeedback', [
            'action=skip',
            'reason=nativeUnavailable',
            'fallback=vibrate'
          ], 'serverUploadFeedback:skip:nativeUnavailable:vibrate', 0);
          return;
        } catch (error) {}
      }
      logPerfTraceMaplogik('ServerUploadFeedback', [
        'action=skip',
        'reason=nativeUnavailable'
      ], 'serverUploadFeedback:skip:nativeUnavailable', 0);
    }

    async function toggleServerUploadFromButton() {
      if (serverUploadToggleInFlight) return;
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (!bridge || typeof bridge.setServerUploadEnabled !== 'function') {
        await syncServerUploadButtonFromBridge('bridgeUnavailable');
        throw new Error('GPS-Bridge nicht geladen. Bitte App neu starten.');
      }
      var requested = serverUploadButtonEnabled !== true;
      logPerfTraceMaplogik('ServerUploadButton', [
        'action=toggle',
        'requested=' + String(requested)
      ], 'serverUploadButton:toggle:' + String(requested), 0);
      serverUploadToggleInFlight = true;
      var button = byId('serverUploadToggleBtn');
      if (button) button.disabled = true;
      try {
        var result = await bridge.setServerUploadEnabled(requested);
        setServerUploadButtonState(!!result, 'toggleResult');
        playServerUploadToggleFeedback(!!result, 'toggleResult');
      } catch (error) {
        await syncServerUploadButtonFromBridge('toggleFailed').catch(function () {});
        throw error;
      } finally {
        serverUploadToggleInFlight = false;
        if (button) button.disabled = false;
      }
    }

    function setMapToolbarCollapsed(collapsed) {
      document.documentElement.classList.toggle('map-toolbar-collapsed', !!collapsed);
      var button = byId('mapToolbarCollapseBtn');
      if (button) button.textContent = collapsed ? '>' : '<';
      if (collapsed) {
        closeAuxiliaryDialogsForNavigationStart();
      } else {
        updateDialogLayout();
      }
    }

    async function refreshNativeMobileAppOnce() {
      if (nativeManualRefreshInFlight) return;
      nativeManualRefreshInFlight = true;
      showLocateLoadingBadge('Aktualisiere…');
      try {
        var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
        if (bridge && bridge.refreshNow) await bridge.refreshNow();
        await Promise.all([
          syncTrackingStateFromServer().catch(function () {}),
          loadTracking().catch(function () {}),
          loadSavedPlaces().catch(function () {}),
          loadSavedRoutes().catch(function () {})
        ]);
        triggerLiveTrackingUpdate();
        updateDeviceSwitcherUi();
        syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();
      } finally {
        setTimeout(hideLocateLoadingBadge, 500);
        nativeManualRefreshInFlight = false;
      }
    }

    function initToolbarPullRefresh() {
      if (window.__mapToolbarPullRefreshBound) return;
      window.__mapToolbarPullRefreshBound = true;
      window.addEventListener('touchstart', function (event) {
        if (!isNativeAppContext() || !event.touches || event.touches.length !== 1) return;
        var target = event.target;
        if (target && target.closest && target.closest('.native-profile-sheet,#placeBottomSheet,#cameraFloatingPanel,.search-panel,.panel')) return;
        var touch = event.touches[0];
        if (touch.clientY > measureMapUiToolbarBottomPx() + 12) return;
        toolbarPullStart = { x: touch.clientX, y: touch.clientY };
      }, { passive: true });
      window.addEventListener('touchmove', function (event) {
        if (!toolbarPullStart || !event.touches || event.touches.length !== 1) return;
        var touch = event.touches[0], dy = touch.clientY - toolbarPullStart.y, dx = Math.abs(touch.clientX - toolbarPullStart.x);
        if (dy > 72 && dx < 56) {
          toolbarPullStart = null;
          refreshNativeMobileAppOnce().catch(function (error) {
            handleAsyncActionError(error, 'Fehler beim Aktualisieren:', 'Aktualisieren fehlgeschlagen.');
          });
        }
      }, { passive: true });
      window.addEventListener('touchend', function () { toolbarPullStart = null; }, { passive: true });
      window.addEventListener('touchcancel', function () { toolbarPullStart = null; }, { passive: true });
    }

    function closeAuxiliaryDialogsForNavigationStart() {
      ['settingsPanel', 'owntracksPanel', 'searchPanel', 'placesLegend'].forEach(function (id) {
        var element = byId(id);
        if (element) element.classList.remove('open');
      });
      var controlPanel = byId('controlPanel');
      if (controlPanel) controlPanel.classList.add('hidden');
      var cameraPanel = byId('cameraFloatingPanel');
      if (cameraPanel) cameraPanel.classList.remove('open');
      var cameraButton = byId('cameraToggleBtn');
      if (cameraButton) cameraButton.classList.remove('active');
      closeNativeProfileSheet();
      hideRouteSuggestions();
      updateDialogLayout();
    }

    function initNativeAppChrome() {
      if (!isNativeAppContext()) return;
      syncToolbarButtonIcons();
      initToolbarPullRefresh();
      var cap = window.Capacitor;
      var statusBar = cap && cap.Plugins && cap.Plugins.StatusBar;
      if (statusBar) {
        Promise.resolve()
          .then(function () { return statusBar.setOverlaysWebView({ overlay: true }); })
          .then(function () { return statusBar.setBackgroundColor({ color: '#00000000' }); })
          .then(function () { return statusBar.setStyle({ style: 'LIGHT' }); })
          .catch(function () {});
      }
    }

    window.__getLeafletMap = function () {
      return state.map || null;
    };
    window.__getMapLibreNativeMap = function () {
      return (state.map && state.map._native) || null;
    };
    window.__getCurrentBaseMapStyleId = function () {
      return state.currentBaseMapStyle || null;
    };
    window.__getCurrentBaseMapStyleConfig = function () {
      const config = BASE_MAP_STYLES[state.currentBaseMapStyle] || BASE_MAP_STYLES[DEFAULT_BASE_MAP_STYLE_ID];
      return config ? Object.assign({}, config) : null;
    };
    window.__listBaseMapStyles = function () {
      return BASE_MAP_STYLE_ORDER.map(function (styleId) {
        const cfg = BASE_MAP_STYLES[styleId];
        return cfg ? { id: cfg.id, label: cfg.label, mapId: cfg.mapId } : null;
      }).filter(Boolean);
    };

    window.__capacitorSelectDevice = function (deviceKey, options) {
      options = options || {};
      if (!deviceKey) return;
      var registerOnly = !!options.registerOnly;
      var force = !!options.force;
      if (state.orderedDeviceKeys.indexOf(deviceKey) < 0) {
        state.orderedDeviceKeys.push(deviceKey);
      }
      state.devicesByKey[deviceKey] = state.devicesByKey[deviceKey] || {
        user: deviceKey.split('/')[0] || 'mobile',
        device: deviceKey.split('/').slice(1).join('/') || 'phone',
        key: deviceKey,
        lat: null,
        lon: null
      };
      if (!state.selectedDeviceKey || (force && !state.userSelectedDeviceKey)) {
        state.selectedDeviceKey = deviceKey;
        if (isNativePhoneDeviceKey(deviceKey)) {
          state.userSelectedDeviceKey = false;
        }
      }
      syncOrderedDeviceKeysFromKnownDevices();
      if (registerOnly) {
        updateDeviceSwitcherUi();
        updateTrackingRouteButtonLabel();
        syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();
        return;
      }
      if (state.userSelectedDeviceKey && !force) {
        return;
      }
      state.selectedDeviceKey = deviceKey;
      updateDeviceSwitcherUi();
      updateTrackingRouteButtonLabel();
      syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();
      loadTracking().catch(function () {});
    };

    function syncNativeTrackingBridge(active, deviceKey) {
      if (!window.CapacitorMobileBridge || !window.CapacitorMobileBridge.setTrackingActive) return Promise.resolve(false);
      const nativeKey = getNativePhoneDeviceKey();
      const targetKey = deviceKey || getSelectedDeviceKey();
      if (!nativeKey || targetKey !== nativeKey) return Promise.resolve(false);
      return window.CapacitorMobileBridge.setTrackingActive(!!active, nativeKey).catch(function () { return false; });
    }

    function handleNativeProfileDeviceKeyChange(oldDeviceKey, newDeviceKey) {
      if (!newDeviceKey || oldDeviceKey === newDeviceKey) return;
      if (oldDeviceKey) {
        delete state.devicesByKey[oldDeviceKey];
        delete state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice[oldDeviceKey];
        if (state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[oldDeviceKey]) {
          state.map.removeLayer(state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[oldDeviceKey]);
          delete state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[oldDeviceKey];
        }
      }
      state.selectedDeviceKey = newDeviceKey;
      state.userSelectedDeviceKey = false;
      enforceSelectedDeviceKey(newDeviceKey);
      updateSelectedDeviceTextFromState();
      syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();
    }

    function readNativeProfileDefaults() {
      function ls(key, fallback) {
        try {
          var v = localStorage.getItem(key);
          return v != null && v !== '' ? v : fallback;
        } catch (e) {
          return fallback;
        }
      }
      var key = ls('gpsTrackingDeviceKey', '');
      var parts = key ? key.split('/') : [];
      return {
        user: ls('gpsTrackingUser', parts[0] || 'mobile'),
        deviceName: ls('gpsTrackingDeviceName', parts.length > 1 ? parts.slice(1).join('/') : ''),
        deviceKey: key,
        idleSec: Number(ls('gpsPointIdleSec', '3')) || 3,
        movingSec: Number(ls('gpsPointMovingSec', '1')) || 1,
        intervalMin: Number(ls('gpsPointIntervalMin', '0')) || 0,
        minMoveM: Number(ls('gpsMinMoveM', '0.2')) || 0.2,
        maxAccuracyM: Number(ls('gpsMaxAccuracyM', '10')) || 10,
        walkingSpeedKmh: Number(ls('gpsWalkingSpeedKmh', '0.5')) || 0.5,
        movingSpeedKmh: Number(ls('gpsMovingSpeedKmh', '1')) || 1,
        stationaryRadiusM: Number(ls('gpsStationaryRadiusM', '3')) || 3,
        stationaryMaxRadiusM: Number(ls('gpsStationaryMaxRadiusM', '5')) || 5,
        confirmPoints: Number(ls('gpsConfirmPoints', '3')) || 3,
        speedJumpKmh: Number(ls('gpsSpeedJumpKmh', '3')) || 3,
        headingFilterPreset: ls('gpsHeadingFilterPreset', 'responsive'),
        headingFilterMaxJumpDeg: Number(ls('gpsHeadingFilterMaxJumpDeg', '55')) || 55,
        headingFilterDeadbandDeg: Number(ls('gpsHeadingFilterDeadbandDeg', '1.5')) || 1.5,
        headingFilterSmoothLevel: Number(ls('gpsHeadingFilterSmoothLevel', '7')) || 7,
        headingFilterSampleMax: Number(ls('gpsHeadingFilterSampleMax', '5')) || 5,
        headingFilterTurnConfirmSamples: Number(ls('gpsHeadingFilterTurnConfirm', '2')) || 2,
        headingFilterMapSpikeRejectDeg: Number(ls('gpsHeadingFilterMapSpikeRejectDeg', '60')) || 60,
        headingFilterMapBearingDeadbandDeg: Number(ls('gpsHeadingFilterMapBearingDeadbandDeg', '2')) || 2,
        mapRotationAuto: ls('gpsMapRotationAuto', '1') !== '0',
        mapRotationSec: Number(ls('gpsMapRotationSec', '0.35')) || 0.35,
        serverHost: readStoredServerConfigDefaults().serverHost,
        restPort: readStoredServerConfigDefaults().restPort,
        mqttTcpPort: readStoredServerConfigDefaults().mqttTcpPort,
        serverUrl: serverBaseUrlFromParts(readStoredServerConfigDefaults().serverHost, readStoredServerConfigDefaults().restPort),
        backgroundUploadEnabled: ls('gpsBackgroundUploadEnabled', '1') !== '0',
        serverUploadEnabled: ls('gpsServerUploadEnabled', '1') !== '0'
      };
    }

    function saveHeadingFilterPrefsFromForm() {
      var filter = readNativeProfileHeadingFilterFromForm();
      try {
        localStorage.setItem('gpsHeadingFilterPreset', filter.headingFilterPreset || 'responsive');
        localStorage.setItem('gpsHeadingFilterMaxJumpDeg', String(filter.headingFilterMaxJumpDeg));

        localStorage.setItem('gpsHeadingFilterSmoothLevel', String(filter.headingFilterSmoothLevel));
        localStorage.setItem('gpsHeadingFilterSampleMax', String(filter.headingFilterSampleMax));

        localStorage.setItem('gpsHeadingFilterMapBearingDeadbandDeg', String(filter.headingFilterMapBearingDeadbandDeg));
      } catch (e) {}
    }

    function formatHeadingFilterDegrees(value) {
      return typeof value === 'number' && Number.isFinite(value) ? (Math.round(value * 10) / 10) + '°' : '-';
    }

    function updateHeadingFilterLivePanel(detail) {
      var rawEl = byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterRaw');
      var filteredEl = byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterFiltered');
      var effectiveEl = byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterEffective');
      var modeEl = byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterMode');
      var driveEl = byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterDrive');
      var rejectEl = byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterReject');
      if (!rawEl || !filteredEl) return;
      var compass = detail && detail.compass ? detail.compass : detail;
      rawEl.textContent = formatHeadingFilterDegrees(detail && detail.raw != null ? detail.raw : (compass && compass.raw));
      filteredEl.textContent = formatHeadingFilterDegrees(
        detail && detail.filtered != null ? detail.filtered : (compass && (compass.filtered != null ? compass.filtered : compass.stable))
      );
      if (effectiveEl) {
        var effective = detail && detail.effective ? detail.effective : null;
        effectiveEl.textContent = effective && effective.value != null
          ? formatHeadingFilterDegrees(effective.value) + (effective.source ? ' / ' + effective.source : '')
          : '-';
      }
      if (modeEl) {
        var effectiveMode = detail && detail.effective && detail.effective.mode ? detail.effective.mode : '-';
        modeEl.textContent = effectiveMode;
      }
      if (driveEl) {
        driveEl.textContent = detail && detail.driveModeActive ? 'ja' : 'nein';
      }
      if (!rejectEl) return;
      var rejected = detail && detail.lastRejectedRaw;
      var rejectedMs = detail && detail.lastRejectedMs;
      if (typeof rejected === 'number' && Number.isFinite(rejected) && rejectedMs && Date.now() - rejectedMs < 4000) {
        rejectEl.textContent = 'Letzter Sprung verworfen: ' + formatHeadingFilterDegrees(rejected);
        rejectEl.classList.remove('hidden');
      } else {
        rejectEl.textContent = '';
        rejectEl.classList.add('hidden');
      }
    }

    function stopHeadingFilterLivePreview() {
      if (nativeProfileHeadingFilterPreviewTimer) {
        clearInterval(nativeProfileHeadingFilterPreviewTimer);
        nativeProfileHeadingFilterPreviewTimer = null;
      }
    }

    function startHeadingFilterLivePreview() {
      stopHeadingFilterLivePreview();
      var bodyEl = byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterBody');
      if (!bodyEl || bodyEl.classList.contains('hidden')) return;
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      nativeProfileHeadingFilterPreviewTimer = setInterval(function () {
        if (bridge && bridge.getHeadingFilterDebug) {
          updateHeadingFilterLivePanel(bridge.getHeadingFilterDebug());
          return;
        }
        updateHeadingFilterLivePanel(null);
      }, 400);
    }

    function toggleNativeProfileHeadingFilterSection(forceOpen) {
      var toggleEl = byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterToggle');
      var bodyEl = byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterBody');
      if (!toggleEl || !bodyEl) return;
      var shouldOpen = typeof forceOpen === 'boolean' ? forceOpen : bodyEl.classList.contains('hidden');
      bodyEl.classList.toggle('hidden', !shouldOpen);
      toggleEl.setAttribute('aria-expanded', shouldOpen ? 'true' : 'false');
      if (shouldOpen) startHeadingFilterLivePreview();
      else stopHeadingFilterLivePreview();
    }

    function previewHeadingFilterFromForm() {
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      var filter = readNativeProfileHeadingFilterFromForm();
      if (bridge && bridge.applyHeadingFilterPreview) {
        bridge.applyHeadingFilterPreview(filter);
      }
      saveHeadingFilterPrefsFromForm();
      if (bridge && bridge.getHeadingFilterDebug) {
        applyNativeFilteredHeadingFromBridge(bridge.getHeadingFilterDebug());
      }
      var bodyEl = byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterBody');
      if (bodyEl && !bodyEl.classList.contains('hidden') && bridge && bridge.getHeadingFilterDebug) {
        updateHeadingFilterLivePanel(bridge.getHeadingFilterDebug());
      }
    }

    function saveMapRotationPrefsFromForm() {
      try {
        localStorage.setItem('gpsMapRotationAuto', byId('nativeProfileMapRotationAuto').checked ? '1' : '0');
        localStorage.setItem('gpsMapRotationSec', String(Number(byId('nativeProfileMapRotationSec').value) || 0.35));
      } catch (e) {}
    }

    function applyMapRotationAutoRuntimeState() {
      if (!state.map) return;
      // Drehung ist in beiden Modi (auto/manuell) aktiv - es unterscheidet sich
      // nur die Glaettung (wird live aus readMapRotationSmoothSec gelesen). Hier
      // nur die aktuelle Fahrtrichtung uebernehmen, wenn gefolgt wird.
      if (state.autoFollowEnabled && !state.userHasInteractedWithMap) {
        enableHeadingUpBearingControl();
        var eff = effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(getSelectedDeviceKey(), state.latestHeadingDegrees);
        if (eff !== null) syncMapBearingFromHeading(eff);
      }
    }

    function nativeProfileFactoryResetValues() {
      var current = readNativeProfileDefaults();
      var identity = {
        user: byId('nativeProfileUser') ? byId('nativeProfileUser').value : current.user,
        deviceName: byId('nativeProfileDevice') ? byId('nativeProfileDevice').value : current.deviceName,
        deviceKey: current.deviceKey,
        serverHost: byId('nativeProfileServerHost') ? byId('nativeProfileServerHost').value : current.serverHost,
        restPort: byId('nativeProfileRestPort') ? byId('nativeProfileRestPort').value : current.restPort,
        mqttTcpPort: byId('nativeProfileMqttTcpPort') ? byId('nativeProfileMqttTcpPort').value : current.mqttTcpPort,
        backgroundUploadEnabled: current.backgroundUploadEnabled,
        serverUploadEnabled: current.serverUploadEnabled
      };
      return Object.assign({}, current, nativeStableProfileValues(), identity);
    }

    var nativeProfileFilterDraft = { display: null, upload: null };
    var nativeProfileActiveFilterMode = 'display';

    function readNativeProfilePositionFields() {
      return {
        maxAccuracyM: Number(byId('nativeProfileMaxAccuracyM').value),
        minMoveM: Number(byId('nativeProfileMinMoveM').value),
        walkingSpeedKmh: Number(byId('nativeProfileWalkingSpeedKmh').value),
        movingSpeedKmh: Number(byId('nativeProfileMovingSpeedKmh').value),
        confirmPoints: Number(byId('nativeProfileConfirmPoints').value),
        speedJumpKmh: Number(byId('nativeProfileSpeedJumpKmh').value),
        stationaryRadiusM: Number(byId('nativeProfileStationaryRadiusM').value),
        stationaryMaxRadiusM: Number(byId('nativeProfileStationaryMaxRadiusM').value)
      };
    }

    function fillNativeProfilePositionFields(source) {
      if (!source) return;
      byId('nativeProfileMaxAccuracyM').value = String(source.maxAccuracyM != null ? source.maxAccuracyM : 10);
      byId('nativeProfileMinMoveM').value = String(source.minMoveM != null ? source.minMoveM : 0.2);
      byId('nativeProfileWalkingSpeedKmh').value = String(source.walkingSpeedKmh != null ? source.walkingSpeedKmh : 0.5);
      byId('nativeProfileMovingSpeedKmh').value = String(source.movingSpeedKmh != null ? source.movingSpeedKmh : 1);
      byId('nativeProfileConfirmPoints').value = String(source.confirmPoints != null ? source.confirmPoints : 3);
      byId('nativeProfileSpeedJumpKmh').value = String(source.speedJumpKmh != null ? source.speedJumpKmh : 3);
      byId('nativeProfileStationaryRadiusM').value = String(source.stationaryRadiusM != null ? source.stationaryRadiusM : 3);
      byId('nativeProfileStationaryMaxRadiusM').value = String(source.stationaryMaxRadiusM != null ? source.stationaryMaxRadiusM : 5);
    }

    function readNativeProfileUploadFields() {
      return {
        idleSec: Number(byId('nativeProfileIdleSec').value),
        movingSec: Number(byId('nativeProfileMovingSec').value),
        intervalMin: Number(byId('nativeProfileIntervalMin').value)
      };
    }

    function fillNativeProfileUploadFields(source) {
      if (!source) return;
      byId('nativeProfileIdleSec').value = String(source.idleSec != null ? source.idleSec : 3);
      byId('nativeProfileMovingSec').value = String(source.movingSec != null ? source.movingSec : 1);
      byId('nativeProfileIntervalMin').value = String(source.intervalMin != null ? source.intervalMin : 0);
    }

    function storeNativeProfileFilterDraftFromForm() {
      var pos = readNativeProfilePositionFields();
      if (nativeProfileActiveFilterMode === 'upload') {
        nativeProfileFilterDraft.upload = Object.assign({}, nativeProfileFilterDraft.upload || {}, readNativeProfileUploadFields());
      } else {
        nativeProfileFilterDraft.display = Object.assign({}, nativeProfileFilterDraft.display || {}, pos, readNativeProfileHeadingFilterFromForm());
      }
    }

    function setNativeProfileFilterMode(nextMode) {
      var mode = nextMode === 'upload' ? 'upload' : 'display';
      if (mode === nativeProfileActiveFilterMode) return;
      storeNativeProfileFilterDraftFromForm();
      nativeProfileActiveFilterMode = mode;
      syncNativeProfileFilterModeUi();
    }

    function syncNativeProfileFilterModeUi() {
      var online = nativeProfileActiveFilterMode === 'upload';
      var offlineBtn = byId('nativeProfileFilterModeOffline');
      var onlineBtn = byId('nativeProfileFilterModeOnline');
      var sharedSection = byId('nativeProfileSharedPositionFields');
      var displaySection = byId('nativeProfileDisplayFilterSection');
      var uploadSection = byId('nativeProfileUploadFilterSection');
      var backgroundSection = byId('nativeProfileBackgroundUploadSection');
      var legendEl = byId('nativeProfileSharedPositionLegend');
      var hintEl = byId('nativeProfileFilterModeHint');
      if (offlineBtn) {
        offlineBtn.classList.toggle('active', !online);
        offlineBtn.setAttribute('aria-selected', online ? 'false' : 'true');
      }
      if (onlineBtn) {
        onlineBtn.classList.toggle('active', online);
        onlineBtn.setAttribute('aria-selected', online ? 'true' : 'false');
      }
      if (sharedSection) sharedSection.classList.toggle('hidden', online);
      if (displaySection) displaySection.classList.toggle('hidden', online);
      if (uploadSection) uploadSection.classList.toggle('hidden', !online);
      if (backgroundSection) backgroundSection.classList.toggle('hidden', !online);
      if (legendEl) legendEl.textContent = 'Anzeige-Filter';
      if (hintEl) {
        hintEl.textContent = online
          ? 'Online: steuert wann gesendet wird. Position kommt immer aus dem Anzeige-Filter (Offline).'
          : 'Offline: Filter fuer die live Anzeige auf dem Handy.';
      }
      if (!online) fillNativeProfilePositionFields(nativeProfileFilterDraft.display || {});
      if (online) fillNativeProfileUploadFields(nativeProfileFilterDraft.upload || {});
      markNativeProfileRanges();
    }

    function nativeProfilePayload(overrides) {
      storeNativeProfileFilterDraftFromForm();
      var display = Object.assign({}, nativeProfileFilterDraft.display || readNativeProfilePositionFields(), readNativeProfileHeadingFilterFromForm());
      var upload = Object.assign({}, nativeProfileFilterDraft.upload || {}, readNativeProfileUploadFields());
      return Object.assign({
        user: byId('nativeProfileUser').value,
        deviceName: byId('nativeProfileDevice').value,
        display: display,
        upload: upload,
        serverHost: byId('nativeProfileServerHost') ? byId('nativeProfileServerHost').value : '',
        restPort: byId('nativeProfileRestPort') ? Number(byId('nativeProfileRestPort').value) : 1880,
        mqttTcpPort: byId('nativeProfileMqttTcpPort') ? Number(byId('nativeProfileMqttTcpPort').value) : 1883,
        backgroundUploadEnabled: !!(byId('nativeProfileBackgroundUpload') && byId('nativeProfileBackgroundUpload').checked),
        serverUploadEnabled: !!(byId('nativeProfileServerUpload') && byId('nativeProfileServerUpload').checked)
      }, overrides || {});
    }

    async function saveNativeProfilePayload(payload) {
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (!bridge || !bridge.saveProfileSettings) {
        window.alert('GPS-Bridge nicht geladen. Bitte flows.json auf dem Pi deployen und App neu starten.');
        return null;
      }
      var data = await bridge.saveProfileSettings(payload);
      if (data && data.deviceKey) {
        handleNativeProfileDeviceKeyChange(data.oldDeviceKey, data.deviceKey);
        byId('nativeProfileDeviceKey').textContent = data.deviceKey;
      }
      fillNativeProfileForm(data || payload);
      await refreshNativeMobileAppOnce();
      return data;
    }

    var nativeProfileRules = {
      nativeProfileIdleSec: [1, 3600, 's', 'empfohlen 2-10'],
      nativeProfileMovingSec: [0.2, 60, 's', 'empfohlen 0.3-1'],
      nativeProfileIntervalMin: [0, 1440, 'min', '0 = Sekunden-Modus'],
      nativeProfileMaxAccuracyM: [5, 100, 'm', 'streng 10, stabil 15-25'],
      nativeProfileMinMoveM: [0.2, 20, 'm', 'empfohlen 0.8'],
      nativeProfileWalkingSpeedKmh: [0.5, 8, 'km/h', 'empfohlen 1.2'],
      nativeProfileMovingSpeedKmh: [1, 30, 'km/h', 'muss >= Fussgaenger sein'],
      nativeProfileConfirmPoints: [1, 8, 'Punkte', 'empfohlen 2'],
      nativeProfileSpeedJumpKmh: [2, 60, 'km/h', 'empfohlen 10'],
      nativeProfileStationaryRadiusM: [3, 80, 'm', 'empfohlen 10'],
      nativeProfileStationaryMaxRadiusM: [3, 150, 'm', 'empfohlen 35'],
      nativeProfileHeadingFilterMaxJumpDeg: [15, 60, 'Grad', 'Ruhig ~28'],
      nativeProfileHeadingFilterDeadbandDeg: [1, 8, 'Grad', 'Ruhig ~5'],
      nativeProfileHeadingFilterSmoothLevel: [1, 10, 'Stufe', '1 ruhig, 10 reaktiv'],
      nativeProfileHeadingFilterSampleMax: [5, 13, 'Samples', 'Ruhig ~11'],
      nativeProfileHeadingFilterTurnConfirm: [2, 6, 'Samples', 'Ruhig ~4'],
      nativeProfileHeadingFilterMapSpikeDeg: [20, 70, 'Grad', 'Karten-Spike'],
      nativeProfileHeadingFilterMapBearingDeg: [1, 10, 'Grad', 'Karten-Totband'],
      nativeProfileMapRotationSec: [0.15, 5, 's', 'Glaettung der Kartendrehung'],
      nativeProfileRestPort: [1, 65535, '', 'Standard 1880'],
      nativeProfileMqttTcpPort: [1, 65535, '', 'Standard 1883'],
    };

    function markNativeProfileRanges() {
      Object.keys(nativeProfileRules).forEach(function (id) {
        var el = byId(id), rule = nativeProfileRules[id];
        if (!el) return;
        var hint = el.nextElementSibling && el.nextElementSibling.classList.contains('native-profile-range')
          ? el.nextElementSibling
          : document.createElement('span');
        if (!hint.parentNode) {
          hint.className = 'native-profile-range';
          el.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', hint);
        }
        var n = Number(el.value), invalid = !Number.isFinite(n) || n < rule[0] || n > rule[1];
        if (id === 'nativeProfileMovingSpeedKmh') invalid = invalid || n < Number(byId('nativeProfileWalkingSpeedKmh').value);
        if (id === 'nativeProfileStationaryMaxRadiusM') invalid = invalid || n < Number(byId('nativeProfileStationaryRadiusM').value);
        el.classList.toggle('invalid', invalid);
        hint.className = 'native-profile-range' + (invalid ? ' invalid' : '');
        hint.textContent = 'Gueltig: ' + rule[0] + '-' + rule[1] + ' ' + rule[2] + ' · ' + rule[3];
      });
    }

    function fillNativeProfileForm(data) {
      data = data || readNativeProfileDefaults();
      if (data.mapRotationAuto == null || data.mapRotationSec == null) {
        var rotStored = readNativeProfileDefaults();
        if (data.mapRotationAuto == null) data.mapRotationAuto = rotStored.mapRotationAuto;
        if (data.mapRotationSec == null) data.mapRotationSec = rotStored.mapRotationSec;
      }
      nativeProfileFilterDraft.display = data.display || {
        maxAccuracyM: data.maxAccuracyM,
        minMoveM: data.minMoveM,
        walkingSpeedKmh: data.walkingSpeedKmh,
        movingSpeedKmh: data.movingSpeedKmh,
        confirmPoints: data.confirmPoints,
        speedJumpKmh: data.speedJumpKmh,
        stationaryRadiusM: data.stationaryRadiusM,
        stationaryMaxRadiusM: data.stationaryMaxRadiusM,
        headingFilterPreset: data.headingFilterPreset,
        headingFilterMaxJumpDeg: data.headingFilterMaxJumpDeg,
        headingFilterDeadbandDeg: data.headingFilterDeadbandDeg,
        headingFilterSmoothLevel: data.headingFilterSmoothLevel,
        headingFilterSampleMax: data.headingFilterSampleMax,
        headingFilterTurnConfirmSamples: data.headingFilterTurnConfirmSamples,
        headingFilterMapSpikeRejectDeg: data.headingFilterMapSpikeRejectDeg,
        headingFilterMapBearingDeadbandDeg: data.headingFilterMapBearingDeadbandDeg
      };
      nativeProfileFilterDraft.upload = data.upload || {
        idleSec: data.idleSec,
        movingSec: data.movingSec,
        intervalMin: data.intervalMin
      };
      byId('nativeProfileUser').value = data.user || 'mobile';
      byId('nativeProfileDevice').value = data.deviceName || '';
      var serverInput = data.serverHost || data.serverUrl || '';
      if (!serverInput && data.mqttWebSocketUrl) serverInput = parseServerConfigAddress(data.mqttWebSocketUrl).host;
      var serverFields = deriveServerConfigFromInput(serverInput, data.restPort, data.mqttTcpPort, readStoredServerConfigDefaults());
      if (byId('nativeProfileServerHost')) byId('nativeProfileServerHost').value = serverFields.serverHost || '';
      if (byId('nativeProfileRestPort')) byId('nativeProfileRestPort').value = String(serverFields.restPort || 1880);
      if (byId('nativeProfileMqttTcpPort')) byId('nativeProfileMqttTcpPort').value = String(serverFields.mqttTcpPort || 1883);
      var filterPreset = nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterPreset != null
        ? nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterPreset : 'responsive';
      byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterPreset').value = filterPreset;
      byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterMaxJumpDeg').value = String(nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterMaxJumpDeg != null ? nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterMaxJumpDeg : 55);
      byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterDeadbandDeg').value = String(nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterDeadbandDeg != null ? nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterDeadbandDeg : 1.5);
      byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterSmoothLevel').value = String(nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterSmoothLevel != null ? nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterSmoothLevel : 7);
      byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterSampleMax').value = String(nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterSampleMax != null ? nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterSampleMax : 5);
      byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterTurnConfirm').value = String(nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterTurnConfirmSamples != null ? nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterTurnConfirmSamples : 2);
      byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterMapSpikeDeg').value = String(nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterMapSpikeRejectDeg != null ? nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterMapSpikeRejectDeg : 60);
      byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterMapBearingDeg').value = String(nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterMapBearingDeadbandDeg != null ? nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterMapBearingDeadbandDeg : 2);
      syncHeadingFilterFormUi();
      var rotAutoEl = byId('nativeProfileMapRotationAuto');
      var rotSecEl = byId('nativeProfileMapRotationSec');
      if (rotAutoEl) rotAutoEl.checked = !!data.mapRotationAuto;
      if (rotSecEl) rotSecEl.value = String(data.mapRotationSec != null ? data.mapRotationSec : 0.35);
      syncMapRotationFormUi();
      byId('nativeProfileDeviceKey').textContent = data.deviceKey || '-';
      var bgUploadEl = byId('nativeProfileBackgroundUpload');
      if (bgUploadEl) bgUploadEl.checked = data.backgroundUploadEnabled !== false;
      var serverUploadEl = byId('nativeProfileServerUpload');
      if (serverUploadEl) serverUploadEl.checked = data.serverUploadEnabled !== false;
      setServerUploadButtonState(data.serverUploadEnabled !== false, 'profileForm');
      nativeProfileActiveFilterMode = 'display';
      syncNativeProfileFilterModeUi();
    }

    function showNativeProfileSheet(data) {
      fillNativeProfileForm(data);
      var sheet = byId('nativeProfileSheet');
      sheet.classList.remove('hidden');
      sheet.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
    }

    function openNativeProfileSheet() {
      var sheet = byId('nativeProfileSheet');
      if (sheet && !sheet.classList.contains('hidden')) {
        closeNativeProfileSheet();
        return;
      }
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (bridge && bridge.getProfileSettings) {
        bridge.getProfileSettings().then(showNativeProfileSheet).catch(function () {
          showNativeProfileSheet();
        });
        return;
      }
      showNativeProfileSheet();
    }

    function closeNativeProfileSheet() {
      var sheet = byId('nativeProfileSheet');
      if (!sheet || sheet.classList.contains('hidden')) return;
      stopHeadingFilterLivePreview();
      sheet.classList.add('hidden');
      sheet.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
      updateDialogLayout();
    }

    var offlineMapDownloadAbortController = null;
    var offlineMapDownloadInFlight = false;
    var offlineMapPlannedRegions = [];
    var offlineMapPlannedPreviewLayers = {};
    var offlineMapSearchAbortController = null;
    var offlineMapSearchDebounceTimer = null;
    var offlineMapSearchToken = 0;
    var offlineMapEstimateToken = 0;
    var offlineMapRouteEstimateToken = 0;
    var offlineMapSearchEstimateToken = 0;
    var offlineMapSearchHistory = [];
    var offlineMapActiveMode = 'view';
    var OFFLINE_MAP_PLANNED_COLORS = ['#1f78d1', '#16a34a', '#dc2626', '#f59e0b', '#9333ea', '#0891b2', '#e11d48', '#65a30d'];

    function loadOfflineMapSearchHistory() {
      try {
        var raw = localStorage.getItem('offlineMapSearchHistory');
        if (!raw) return [];
        var parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
        return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed.slice(0, 10) : [];
      } catch (_) { return []; }
    }
    function saveOfflineMapSearchHistory(entry) {
      if (!entry || typeof entry !== 'string') return;
      var trimmed = entry.trim();
      if (!trimmed) return;
      offlineMapSearchHistory = [trimmed].concat(offlineMapSearchHistory.filter(function (item) { return item !== trimmed; })).slice(0, 10);
      try { localStorage.setItem('offlineMapSearchHistory', JSON.stringify(offlineMapSearchHistory)); } catch (_) {}
      renderOfflineMapSearchHistoryDatalist();
    }
    function renderOfflineMapSearchHistoryDatalist() {
      var datalist = byId('offlineMapSearchHistory');
      if (!datalist) return;
      datalist.innerHTML = '';
      offlineMapSearchHistory.forEach(function (entry) {
        var opt = document.createElement('option');
        opt.value = entry;
        datalist.appendChild(opt);
      });
    }

    function formatBytesHuman(bytes) {
      var value = Number(bytes);
      if (!Number.isFinite(value) || value <= 0) return '0 B';
      var units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
      var index = 0;
      while (value >= 1024 && index < units.length - 1) {
        value /= 1024;
        index += 1;
      }
      var decimals = value >= 100 || index === 0 ? 0 : 1;
      return value.toFixed(decimals) + ' ' + units[index];
    }

    function approximateTileBytes(tileCount, styleId) {
      var perTileBytes = 28000;
      if (styleId === 'satellite' || styleId === 'hybrid') perTileBytes = 90000;
      else if (styleId === 'outdoor') perTileBytes = 32000;
      return tileCount * perTileBytes;
    }

    function offlineMapProfileValue(selectId) {
      var select = byId(selectId);
      var value = select ? String(select.value || 'standard') : 'standard';
      return value === 'save' || value === 'detail' ? value : 'standard';
    }

    function offlineMapProfileLabel(profile) {
      if (profile === 'save') return 'Speicher sparen';
      if (profile === 'detail') return 'Hohe Details';
      return 'Standard';
    }

    function offlineMapCorridorMetersForProfile(profile) {
      if (profile === 'save') return 1000;
      if (profile === 'detail') return 3000;
      return 2000;
    }

    function resolveOfflineMapZoomRange(kind, bounds, profile) {
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (bridge && typeof bridge.getOfflineZoomProfileRange === 'function') {
        var nativeRange = bridge.getOfflineZoomProfileRange(kind, profile, bounds);
        if (nativeRange && Number.isFinite(Number(nativeRange.zoomMin)) && Number.isFinite(Number(nativeRange.zoomMax))) {
          return { zoomMin: Number(nativeRange.zoomMin), zoomMax: Number(nativeRange.zoomMax) };
        }
      }
      if (kind === 'corridor') return profile === 'detail' ? { zoomMin: 10, zoomMax: 18 } : profile === 'save' ? { zoomMin: 8, zoomMax: 15 } : { zoomMin: 9, zoomMax: 17 };
      if (kind === 'region') return profile === 'detail' ? { zoomMin: 9, zoomMax: 17 } : profile === 'save' ? { zoomMin: 8, zoomMax: 14 } : { zoomMin: 8, zoomMax: 16 };
      return profile === 'detail' ? { zoomMin: 10, zoomMax: 18 } : profile === 'save' ? { zoomMin: 9, zoomMax: 15 } : { zoomMin: 10, zoomMax: 16 };
    }

    function approximateGroundDistanceKm(north, south, east, west) {
      var R = 6371;
      var latMid = ((north + south) / 2) * Math.PI / 180;
      var heightKm = Math.abs(north - south) * Math.PI / 180 * R;
      var widthKm = Math.abs(east - west) * Math.PI / 180 * R * Math.cos(latMid);
      return { widthKm: widthKm, heightKm: heightKm };
    }

    function refreshOfflineMapHeader() {
      var styleConfig = window.__getCurrentBaseMapStyleConfig ? window.__getCurrentBaseMapStyleConfig() : null;
      var styleLabelElement = byId('offlineMapActiveStyleLabel');
      if (styleLabelElement) styleLabelElement.textContent = styleConfig ? styleConfig.label : '-';
      var zoomElement = byId('offlineMapCurrentZoom');
      if (zoomElement) {
        var zoomValue = state.map && typeof state.map.getZoom === 'function' ? state.map.getZoom() : null;
        zoomElement.textContent = Number.isFinite(zoomValue) ? zoomValue.toFixed(1) : '-';
      }
      var areaElement = byId('offlineMapVisibleArea');
      if (areaElement) {
        var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
        var bounds = bridge && bridge.getCurrentMapBounds ? bridge.getCurrentMapBounds() : null;
        if (bounds && Number.isFinite(bounds.north)) {
          var dist = approximateGroundDistanceKm(bounds.north, bounds.south, bounds.east, bounds.west);
          areaElement.textContent = dist.widthKm.toFixed(1) + ' \u00D7 ' + dist.heightKm.toFixed(1) + ' km';
        } else {
          areaElement.textContent = '-';
        }
      }
    }

    function fallbackOfflinePlanEstimate(bounds, zoomMin, zoomMax, styleConfig, routeCoords, profile) {
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      var tilesCount = 0;
      if (routeCoords && bridge && bridge.estimateOfflineRouteCorridorTileCount) {
        tilesCount = bridge.estimateOfflineRouteCorridorTileCount(routeCoords, profile);
      } else if (bounds && bridge && bridge.estimateOfflineRegionTileCount) {
        tilesCount = bridge.estimateOfflineRegionTileCount(bounds, zoomMin, zoomMax);
      }
      return {
        tileTotal: tilesCount,
        totalUrls: tilesCount,
        resourceTotal: 0,
        estimatedBytes: approximateTileBytes(tilesCount, styleConfig && styleConfig.id)
      };
    }

    function normalizeOfflinePlanEstimate(estimate, fallback) {
      var value = estimate || fallback || {};
      var tileTotal = Number(value.tileTotal != null ? value.tileTotal : value.tiles);
      if (!Number.isFinite(tileTotal)) tileTotal = Number(fallback && fallback.tileTotal || 0);
      var estimatedBytes = Number(value.estimatedBytes != null ? value.estimatedBytes : value.estimatedMissingBytes);
      if (!Number.isFinite(estimatedBytes)) estimatedBytes = Number(fallback && fallback.estimatedBytes || 0);
      return {
        tileTotal: Math.max(0, Math.round(tileTotal)),
        totalUrls: Math.max(0, Math.round(Number(value.totalUrls != null ? value.totalUrls : tileTotal) || 0)),
        resourceTotal: Math.max(0, Math.round(Number(value.resourceTotal || 0) || 0)),
        estimatedBytes: Math.max(0, Math.round(estimatedBytes))
      };
    }

    async function resolveOfflinePlanEstimate(options) {
      var opts = options || {};
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      var fallback = fallbackOfflinePlanEstimate(opts.bounds, opts.zoomMin, opts.zoomMax, opts.styleConfig, opts.routeCoords, opts.profile);
      if (bridge && typeof bridge.estimateOfflineRegionDownloadPlan === 'function') {
        try {
          return normalizeOfflinePlanEstimate(await bridge.estimateOfflineRegionDownloadPlan(opts), fallback);
        } catch (error) {
          console.warn('Offline-Schaetzung mit echtem Plan fehlgeschlagen:', error);
        }
      }
      return normalizeOfflinePlanEstimate(fallback, fallback);
    }

    function applyOfflineEstimateToRegion(region, estimate) {
      var normalized = normalizeOfflinePlanEstimate(estimate, null);
      region.estimateTiles = normalized.tileTotal;
      region.estimateBytes = normalized.estimatedBytes;
      region.estimateTotalUrls = normalized.totalUrls;
      region.estimateResourceTotal = normalized.resourceTotal;
      return normalized;
    }

    async function updateOfflineMapEstimate() {
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (!bridge || !bridge.getCurrentMapBounds) return;
      var bounds = bridge.getCurrentMapBounds();
      var tilesElement = byId('offlineMapEstimateTiles');
      var bytesElement = byId('offlineMapEstimateBytes');
      var estimateContainer = bytesElement ? bytesElement.parentElement : null;
      if (!bounds || !tilesElement || !bytesElement) return;
      var profile = offlineMapProfileValue('offlineMapViewProfile');
      var zoomRange = resolveOfflineMapZoomRange('view', bounds, profile);
      var styleConfig = window.__getCurrentBaseMapStyleConfig ? window.__getCurrentBaseMapStyleConfig() : null;
      var token = ++offlineMapEstimateToken;
      tilesElement.textContent = '...';
      bytesElement.textContent = '...';
      var estimate = await resolveOfflinePlanEstimate({
        bounds: bounds,
        zoomMin: zoomRange.zoomMin,
        zoomMax: zoomRange.zoomMax,
        profile: profile,
        downloadKind: 'view',
        styleConfig: styleConfig
      });
      if (token !== offlineMapEstimateToken) return;
      var tilesCount = estimate.tileTotal;
      tilesElement.textContent = tilesCount.toLocaleString('de-DE');
      bytesElement.textContent = formatBytesHuman(estimate.estimatedBytes);
      if (estimateContainer) {
        estimateContainer.classList.toggle('warn', tilesCount > 8000);
      }
    }

    function readOfflineMapSearchZoomValues() {
      var profile = offlineMapProfileValue('offlineMapSearchProfile');
      return Object.assign({ profile: profile }, resolveOfflineMapZoomRange('region', null, profile));
    }

    function readOfflineMapViewZoomValues() {
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      var bounds = bridge && bridge.getCurrentMapBounds ? bridge.getCurrentMapBounds() : null;
      var profile = offlineMapProfileValue('offlineMapViewProfile');
      return Object.assign({ profile: profile }, resolveOfflineMapZoomRange('view', bounds, profile));
    }

    function setOfflineMapMode(mode) {
      var nextMode = mode === 'search' || mode === 'route' ? mode : 'view';
      offlineMapActiveMode = nextMode;
      var viewBtn = byId('offlineMapModeViewBtn');
      var searchBtn = byId('offlineMapModeSearchBtn');
      var routeBtn = byId('offlineMapModeRouteBtn');
      var viewPanel = byId('offlineMapViewPanel');
      var searchPanel = byId('offlineMapSearchPanel');
      var routePanel = byId('offlineMapRoutePanel');
      if (viewBtn) {
        viewBtn.classList.toggle('active', nextMode === 'view');
        viewBtn.setAttribute('aria-selected', nextMode === 'view' ? 'true' : 'false');
      }
      if (searchBtn) {
        searchBtn.classList.toggle('active', nextMode === 'search');
        searchBtn.setAttribute('aria-selected', nextMode === 'search' ? 'true' : 'false');
      }
      if (routeBtn) {
        routeBtn.classList.toggle('active', nextMode === 'route');
        routeBtn.setAttribute('aria-selected', nextMode === 'route' ? 'true' : 'false');
      }
      if (viewPanel) viewPanel.classList.toggle('hidden', nextMode !== 'view');
      if (searchPanel) searchPanel.classList.toggle('hidden', nextMode !== 'search');
      if (routePanel) routePanel.classList.toggle('hidden', nextMode !== 'route');
      if (nextMode === 'view') {
        refreshOfflineMapHeader();
        updateOfflineMapEstimate();
      } else if (nextMode === 'route') {
        refreshOfflineRoutePanel();
      } else {
        clearOfflineMapSearchSuggestions();
      }
      updateDialogLayout();
    }

    function offlineRegionStatusLabel(region) {
      var status = String(region && region.status || (region && region.ready ? 'bereit' : '') || '').toLowerCase();
      if (status === 'ready') status = 'bereit';
      if (status === 'incomplete') status = 'fortsetzbar';
      if (!status && Number(region && region.failed || 0) > 0) status = 'fortsetzbar';
      if (!status) status = 'bereit';
      if (status === 'wird heruntergeladen') return 'wird heruntergeladen';
      if (status === 'beschaedigt' || status === 'beschädigt') return 'beschädigt';
      if (status === 'unvollstaendig' || status === 'unvollständig') return 'unvollständig';
      if (status === 'abgebrochen') return 'fortsetzbar';
      if (status === 'fortsetzbar') return 'fortsetzbar';
      return 'bereit';
    }

    function offlineRegionTypeLabel(region) {
      return region && region.type === 'corridor' ? 'Route-Korridor' : 'Region';
    }

    async function showOfflineRegionDetails(region) {
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (!region || !region.id || !bridge || typeof bridge.getOfflineRegionDetails !== 'function') return;
      var details = await bridge.getOfflineRegionDetails(region.id).catch(function (error) {
        window.alert('Details konnten nicht geladen werden: ' + (error && error.message ? error.message : String(error)));
        return null;
      });
      if (!details) return;
      var verify = details.verify || {};
      window.alert(
        (region.name || 'Offline-Inhalt') + '\n' +
        'Status: ' + offlineRegionStatusLabel(region) + '\n' +
        'Vorhanden: ' + Number(verify.present || 0).toLocaleString('de-DE') + ' / ' + Number(verify.total || 0).toLocaleString('de-DE') + '\n' +
        'Fehlend: ' + Number(verify.missing || 0).toLocaleString('de-DE') + '\n' +
        'Pflicht fehlt: ' + Number(verify.requiredMissing || 0).toLocaleString('de-DE')
      );
    }

    async function resumeOrRepairOfflineRegion(region, repairMode) {
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (!region || !region.id || !bridge) return;
      var fn = repairMode ? bridge.repairOfflineRegion : bridge.resumeOfflineRegion;
      if (typeof fn !== 'function') {
        window.alert('Aktion nur in der Mobile-App verfuegbar.');
        return;
      }
      try {
        await fn.call(bridge, region.id);
        offlineMapDownloadInFlight = true;
        setOfflineMapDownloadingUiState(true);
        syncOfflineMapDownloadStateFromNative();
      } catch (error) {
        window.alert('Aktion fehlgeschlagen: ' + (error && error.message ? error.message : String(error)));
      }
    }

    function isOfflineMapSheetOpen() {
      var sheet = byId('offlineMapSheet');
      return !!(sheet && !sheet.classList.contains('hidden') && sheet.getAttribute('aria-hidden') !== 'true');
    }

    function offlineUiRefreshAllowedReason(options) {
      var opts = options || {};
      if (opts.userOpen === true) return 'userOpen';
      if (opts.mutation === true || opts.forceOverlay === true || opts.force === true) return 'mutation';
      if (opts.downloadEvent === true || offlineMapDownloadInFlight) return 'downloadActive';
      if (isOfflineMapSheetOpen()) return 'sheetOpen';
      return '';
    }

    function logOfflineUiRefresh(action, reason, kind, caller) {
      logPerfTraceMaplogik('OfflineUiRefresh', [
        'action=' + String(action || 'unknown'),
        'reason=' + String(reason || 'unknown').replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_.:-]/g, '_'),
        'kind=' + String(kind || 'unknown'),
        'caller=' + String(caller || 'unknown').replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_.:-]/g, '_')
      ], 'offline-ui:' + String(action || 'unknown') + ':' + String(reason || 'unknown') + ':' + String(kind || 'unknown'));
    }

    function shouldRunOfflineUiRefresh(kind, options, caller) {
      var reason = offlineUiRefreshAllowedReason(options || {});
      if (!reason) {
        logOfflineUiRefresh('skip', 'sheetClosed', kind, caller);
        return false;
      }
      logOfflineUiRefresh('run', reason, kind, caller);
      return true;
    }

    async function refreshOfflineMapList(options) {
      var opts = options || {};
      var traceReason = String(opts.reason || (opts.forceOverlay ? 'forceOverlay' : 'refreshOfflineMapList')).replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_.:-]/g, '_');
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      var listElement = byId('offlineMapList');
      var totalElement = byId('offlineMapStorageTotal');
      var clearAllButton = byId('offlineMapClearAllBtn');
      if (!listElement) return;
      if (!shouldRunOfflineUiRefresh('list', opts, traceReason)) return;
      if (!bridge || !bridge.listOfflineRegions) {
        listElement.innerHTML = '<li class="offline-map-list-empty">Bridge nicht verfügbar.</li>';
        return;
      }
      logPerfTraceMaplogik('MaplogikOfflineRegions', [
        'action=listRegions',
        'caller=refreshOfflineMapList',
        'reason=' + traceReason,
        'forceOverlay=' + String(opts.forceOverlay === true)
      ], 'offlineMapList:' + traceReason + ':' + String(opts.forceOverlay === true));
      var regions = await bridge.listOfflineRegions('refreshOfflineMapList:' + traceReason).catch(function () { return []; });
      var storageInfo = bridge.getOfflineStorageInfo ? await bridge.getOfflineStorageInfo().catch(function () { return null; }) : null;
      listElement.innerHTML = '';
      if (!regions.length) {
        var emptyItem = document.createElement('li');
        emptyItem.className = 'offline-map-list-empty';
        emptyItem.textContent = 'Noch keine Regionen gespeichert.';
        listElement.appendChild(emptyItem);
        if (clearAllButton) clearAllButton.classList.add('hidden');
      } else {
        regions.forEach(function (region) {
          var item = document.createElement('li');
          item.className = 'offline-map-list-item';
          var info = document.createElement('div');
          info.className = 'offline-map-list-item-info';
          var nameElement = document.createElement('span');
          nameElement.className = 'offline-map-list-item-name';
          nameElement.textContent = region.name || 'Region';
          var metaElement = document.createElement('span');
          metaElement.className = 'offline-map-list-item-meta';
          var bytesLabel = formatBytesHuman(region.sizeBytes || 0);
          var tileLabel = (region.tileCount || 0).toLocaleString('de-DE') + ' Kacheln';
          var zoomLabel = 'Zoom ' + (region.zoomMin || '?') + '–' + (region.zoomMax || '?');
          var styleLabel = region.styleLabel || region.styleId || 'Karte';
          var statusMetaLabel = offlineRegionTypeLabel(region) + ' · ' + offlineRegionStatusLabel(region) + ' · ' + styleLabel + ' · ' + tileLabel + ' · ' + bytesLabel;
          metaElement.textContent = styleLabel + ' · ' + tileLabel + ' · ' + bytesLabel + ' · ' + zoomLabel;
          info.appendChild(nameElement);
          metaElement.textContent = statusMetaLabel;
          info.appendChild(metaElement);
          var deleteBtn = document.createElement('button');
          deleteBtn.type = 'button';
          deleteBtn.className = 'offline-map-list-item-delete';
          deleteBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Region löschen');
          deleteBtn.textContent = '\u00D7';
          deleteBtn.addEventListener('click', function () {
            if (!window.confirm('Region "' + (region.name || 'Region') + '" löschen?')) return;
            bridge.deleteOfflineRegion(region.id).then(function () { refreshOfflineMapList({ forceOverlay: true, mutation: true, reason: 'deleteRegion' }); }).catch(function (error) {
              window.alert('Löschen fehlgeschlagen: ' + (error && error.message ? error.message : String(error)));
            });
          });
          item.appendChild(info);
          var detailsBtn = document.createElement('button');
          detailsBtn.type = 'button';
          detailsBtn.className = 'offline-map-list-item-delete';
          detailsBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Details anzeigen');
          detailsBtn.textContent = 'i';
          detailsBtn.addEventListener('click', function () { showOfflineRegionDetails(region); });
          item.appendChild(detailsBtn);
          if (offlineRegionStatusLabel(region) !== 'bereit') {
            var resumeBtn = document.createElement('button');
            resumeBtn.type = 'button';
            resumeBtn.className = 'offline-map-list-item-delete';
            resumeBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Fortsetzen');
            resumeBtn.textContent = '↻';
            resumeBtn.addEventListener('click', function () { resumeOrRepairOfflineRegion(region, false); });
            item.appendChild(resumeBtn);
          }
          var repairBtn = document.createElement('button');
          repairBtn.type = 'button';
          repairBtn.className = 'offline-map-list-item-delete';
          repairBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Pruefen und reparieren');
          repairBtn.textContent = '✓';
          repairBtn.addEventListener('click', function () { resumeOrRepairOfflineRegion(region, true); });
          item.appendChild(repairBtn);
          item.appendChild(deleteBtn);
          listElement.appendChild(item);
        });
        if (clearAllButton) clearAllButton.classList.remove('hidden');
      }
      if (totalElement) {
        if (storageInfo && storageInfo.regionCount) {
          totalElement.textContent = 'Gesamt: ' + formatBytesHuman(storageInfo.totalBytes || 0) + ' · ' + (storageInfo.totalTiles || 0).toLocaleString('de-DE') + ' Kacheln';
        } else {
          totalElement.textContent = '';
        }
      }
      scheduleOfflineRegionOverlayRefresh({ force: opts.forceOverlay === true });
    }

    function setOfflineDebugText(id, value) {
      var el = byId(id);
      if (el) el.textContent = value == null || value === '' ? '-' : String(value);
    }

    function formatOfflineDebugNumber(value) {
      var number = Number(value || 0);
      return Number.isFinite(number) ? number.toLocaleString('de-DE') : '-';
    }

    function formatOfflineDebugErrorTypes(errorDiagnostics) {
      var byType = errorDiagnostics && errorDiagnostics.byType ? errorDiagnostics.byType : {};
      var labels = ['HTTP 429', 'HTTP 403', 'HTTP 404', 'timeout', 'connection reset', 'storage error', 'tile too large', 'empty response', 'unknown'];
      return labels.map(function (label) {
        return label + ': ' + formatOfflineDebugNumber(byType[label] || 0);
      }).join(' | ');
    }

    function formatOfflineDebugLastErrors(errorDiagnostics) {
      var list = errorDiagnostics && Array.isArray(errorDiagnostics.topLastErrors) ? errorDiagnostics.topLastErrors : [];
      if (!list.length) return '-';
      return list.slice(0, 5).map(function (item) {
        return String(item.error || 'unknown') + ' (' + formatOfflineDebugNumber(item.count || 0) + ')';
      }).join(' | ');
    }

    function formatOfflineDebugTimings(timings) {
      if (!timings) return '-';
      var keys = [
        ['httpDownload', 'HTTP'],
        ['fileWrite', 'Write'],
        ['cacheLookup', 'Cache'],
        ['taskPersistence', 'Task'],
        ['verify', 'Verify']
      ];
      return keys.map(function (entry) {
        var item = timings[entry[0]] || {};
        return entry[1] + ': ' + formatOfflineDebugNumber(item.ms || 0) + ' ms';
      }).join(' | ');
    }

    function formatOfflineDebugGlyphRanges(ranges) {
      if (!Array.isArray(ranges) || !ranges.length) return '-';
      var shown = ranges.slice(0, 8).map(function (range) { return String(range || '').trim(); }).filter(Boolean);
      if (!shown.length) return '-';
      return shown.join(' | ') + (ranges.length > shown.length ? ' +' + (ranges.length - shown.length) : '');
    }

    function formatOfflineDebugRuntimeGlyphRanges(ranges) {
      if (!Array.isArray(ranges) || !ranges.length) return '-';
      var shown = ranges.slice(0, 8).map(function (item) {
        if (!item) return '';
        if (typeof item === 'string') return item;
        return String(item.label || item.url || '').trim() + (item.count ? ' (' + formatOfflineDebugNumber(item.count) + ')' : '');
      }).filter(Boolean);
      if (!shown.length) return '-';
      return shown.join(' | ') + (ranges.length > shown.length ? ' +' + (ranges.length - shown.length) : '');
    }

    function renderOfflineDebugInfo(info) {
      info = info || {};
      var queue = info.queueStatus || {};
      var queueParts = [];
      if (queue.queueLength != null) queueParts.push(formatOfflineDebugNumber(queue.queueLength) + ' Queue');
      if (queue.urlsFiles != null) queueParts.push(formatOfflineDebugNumber(queue.urlsFiles) + ' URL-Dateien');
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugRegionsTotal', formatOfflineDebugNumber(info.regionsTotal));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugCorridorsTotal', formatOfflineDebugNumber(info.corridorsTotal));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugDownloadJobs', formatOfflineDebugNumber(info.downloadJobs));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugQueueStatus', queueParts.length ? queueParts.join(' · ') : '-');
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugTilesTotal', formatOfflineDebugNumber(info.tilesTotal));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugTilesPresent', formatOfflineDebugNumber(info.tilesPresent));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugTilesMissing', formatOfflineDebugNumber(info.tilesMissing));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugMissingGlyphs', formatOfflineDebugNumber(info.missingGlyphs));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugPlannedGlyphsMissing', formatOfflineDebugNumber(info.plannedGlyphsMissing != null ? info.plannedGlyphsMissing : info.missingGlyphs));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugRuntimeGlyphMisses', formatOfflineDebugNumber(info.runtimeGlyphMisses));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugGlyphFallbackServed', formatOfflineDebugNumber(info.glyphFallbackServed));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugUnsupportedGlyphRanges', formatOfflineDebugGlyphRanges(info.unsupportedGlyphRanges));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugMissingSprites', formatOfflineDebugNumber(info.missingSprites));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugCacheSize', formatBytesHuman(info.cacheSizeBytes || 0));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugCacheHits', formatOfflineDebugNumber(info.cacheHits));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugCacheMisses', formatOfflineDebugNumber(info.cacheMisses));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugGlyphCacheHits', formatOfflineDebugNumber(info.glyphCacheHits));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugGlyphCacheMisses', formatOfflineDebugNumber(info.glyphCacheMisses));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugBlockedOfflineRequests', formatOfflineDebugNumber(info.blockedOfflineNetworkRequests));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugHttpDownloads', formatOfflineDebugNumber(info.httpDownloads));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugHttpErrors', formatOfflineDebugNumber(info.httpErrors));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugSkippedAlreadyPresent', formatOfflineDebugNumber(info.skippedAlreadyPresent));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugWorkers', formatOfflineDebugNumber(info.currentWorkerCount));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugRateLimit', info.rateLimitedUntil && Number(info.rateLimitedUntil) > Date.now() ? formatTime(Number(info.rateLimitedUntil)) : '-');
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugMissingGlyphRanges', formatOfflineDebugGlyphRanges(info.missingGlyphRanges));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugRuntimeGlyphRanges', formatOfflineDebugRuntimeGlyphRanges(info.topRuntimeGlyphMisses));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugErrorTypes', formatOfflineDebugErrorTypes(info.errorDiagnostics));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugLastErrors', formatOfflineDebugLastErrors(info.errorDiagnostics));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugTiming', formatOfflineDebugTimings(info.timings));
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugVerifyStatus', info.verifyStatus || '-');
      setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugLastVerifyAt', info.lastVerifyAt ? formatTime(Number(info.lastVerifyAt)) : '-');
    }

    async function refreshOfflineDebugInfo(action) {
      var debugAction = typeof action === 'string' ? action : (action && action.action ? String(action.action) : '');
      var opts = action && typeof action === 'object' ? Object.assign({}, action) : {};
      if (!opts.reason) opts.reason = debugAction || 'refreshOfflineDebugInfo';
      if (!shouldRunOfflineUiRefresh('debug', opts, opts.reason)) return;
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (!bridge) return;
      try {
        if (debugAction === 'verify' && typeof bridge.verifyOfflineIntegrity === 'function') {
          renderOfflineDebugInfo(await bridge.verifyOfflineIntegrity());
          await refreshOfflineMapList();
          return;
        }
        if (debugAction === 'repair' && typeof bridge.repairStaleOfflineJobs === 'function') {
          await bridge.repairStaleOfflineJobs();
          await refreshOfflineMapList();
        } else if (debugAction === 'recover' && typeof bridge.recoverOfflineState === 'function') {
          await bridge.recoverOfflineState();
        }
        if (typeof bridge.getOfflineDebugInfo === 'function') {
          renderOfflineDebugInfo(await bridge.getOfflineDebugInfo());
        }
      } catch (error) {
        setOfflineDebugText('offlineDebugVerifyStatus', 'Fehler');
      }
    }

    function openOfflineMapSheet() {
      var sheet = byId('offlineMapSheet');
      if (!sheet) return;
      closeNativeProfileSheet();
      sheet.classList.remove('hidden');
      sheet.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
      setOfflineMapMode(offlineMapActiveMode || 'view');
      refreshOfflineMapHeader();
      updateOfflineMapEstimate();
      refreshOfflineRoutePanel();
      refreshOfflineDebugInfo({ action: 'recover', reason: 'userOpen', userOpen: true })
        .then(function () { refreshOfflineMapList({ reason: 'userOpen', userOpen: true }); })
        .catch(function () { refreshOfflineMapList({ reason: 'userOpen', userOpen: true }); });
      offlineMapSearchHistory = loadOfflineMapSearchHistory();
      renderOfflineMapSearchHistoryDatalist();
      renderOfflineMapPlannedList();
      renderAllOfflineMapPreviews();
      updateDialogLayout();
    }

    function closeOfflineMapSheet() {
      var sheet = byId('offlineMapSheet');
      if (!sheet || sheet.classList.contains('hidden')) return;
      sheet.classList.add('hidden');
      sheet.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
      clearOfflineMapSearchSuggestions();
      updateDialogLayout();
    }

    function setOfflineMapDownloadingUiState(active) {
      var progressWrap = byId('offlineMapProgressWrap');
      var cancelBtn = byId('offlineMapCancelBtn');
      var viewDownloadBtn = byId('offlineMapViewDownloadBtn');
      var searchDownloadBtn = byId('offlineMapSearchDownloadBtn');
      var routeDownloadBtn = byId('offlineMapRouteDownloadBtn');
      var queueLabel = byId('offlineMapQueueLabel');
      if (progressWrap) progressWrap.classList.toggle('hidden', !active);
      if (cancelBtn) cancelBtn.classList.toggle('hidden', !active);
      if (viewDownloadBtn) viewDownloadBtn.disabled = !!active;
      if (searchDownloadBtn) searchDownloadBtn.disabled = !!active || !offlineMapPlannedRegions.length;
      if (routeDownloadBtn) routeDownloadBtn.disabled = !!active || !activeOfflineRoutePayload();
      if (!active && queueLabel) queueLabel.classList.add('hidden');
    }

    function setOfflineMapProgress(progress) {
      var fill = byId('offlineMapProgressFill');
      var label = byId('offlineMapProgressLabel');
      var queueLabel = byId('offlineMapQueueLabel');
      if (!progress) {
        if (fill) fill.style.width = '0%';
        if (label) label.textContent = 'Vorbereiten…';
        if (queueLabel) queueLabel.classList.add('hidden');
        return;
      }
      var phaseLabel = progress.phase === 'tiles' ? 'Kacheln' : (progress.phase === 'region-start' ? 'Region wird vorbereitet' : 'Stil');
      if (label && Number.isFinite(progress.downloaded) && Number.isFinite(progress.total) && progress.total > 0) {
        var successfulTiles = Math.max(0, Number(progress.downloaded || 0));
        var failedTiles = Math.max(0, Number(progress.failed || 0));
        var processedTiles = Number.isFinite(progress.processed) ? Math.max(0, Number(progress.processed || 0)) : (successfulTiles + failedTiles);
        var missingTiles = Number.isFinite(progress.missing) ? Math.max(0, Number(progress.missing || 0)) : Math.max(0, Number(progress.total || 0) - processedTiles);
        label.textContent = phaseLabel + ': ' + processedTiles.toLocaleString('de-DE') + ' / ' + Number(progress.total).toLocaleString('de-DE')
          + ' | erfolgreich: ' + successfulTiles.toLocaleString('de-DE')
          + ' | fehlgeschlagen: ' + failedTiles.toLocaleString('de-DE')
          + ' | fehlend: ' + missingTiles.toLocaleString('de-DE');
        if (fill) fill.style.width = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, (processedTiles / progress.total) * 100)).toFixed(1) + '%';
      } else if (label) {
        label.textContent = phaseLabel + '…';
        if (fill) fill.style.width = '0%';
      }
      if (queueLabel) {
