        var qi = Number.isFinite(progress.queueIndex) ? progress.queueIndex : null;
        var qt = Number.isFinite(progress.queueTotal) ? progress.queueTotal : null;
        if (qi != null && qt && qt > 1) {
          queueLabel.textContent = 'Region ' + (qi + 1) + ' von ' + qt + ' · ' + (progress.regionName || '');
          queueLabel.classList.remove('hidden');
        } else if (qt === 1 && progress.regionName) {
          queueLabel.textContent = progress.regionName;
          queueLabel.classList.remove('hidden');
        } else {
          queueLabel.classList.add('hidden');
        }
      }
    }

    function renderOfflineMapPlannedList() {
      var section = byId('offlineMapPlannedSection');
      var listElement = byId('offlineMapPlannedList');
      var countElement = byId('offlineMapPlannedCount');
      var totalTilesElement = byId('offlineMapPlannedTotalTiles');
      var totalBytesElement = byId('offlineMapPlannedTotalBytes');
      var downloadButton = byId('offlineMapSearchDownloadBtn');
      if (!section || !listElement) return;
      listElement.innerHTML = '';
      if (!offlineMapPlannedRegions.length) {
        section.classList.add('hidden');
        if (countElement) countElement.textContent = '0';
        if (totalTilesElement) totalTilesElement.textContent = '0';
        if (totalBytesElement) totalBytesElement.textContent = '0 B';
        if (downloadButton && !offlineMapDownloadInFlight) {
          downloadButton.disabled = true;
          downloadButton.textContent = 'Ausgewählte Regionen herunterladen';
        }
        return;
      }
      section.classList.remove('hidden');
      var totalTiles = 0;
      var totalBytes = 0;
      offlineMapPlannedRegions.forEach(function (region) {
        totalTiles += region.estimateTiles || 0;
        totalBytes += region.estimateBytes || 0;
        var item = document.createElement('li');
        item.className = 'offline-map-planned-item';
        var colorEl = document.createElement('span');
        colorEl.className = 'offline-map-planned-item-color';
        colorEl.style.background = region.color;
        item.appendChild(colorEl);
        var info = document.createElement('div');
        info.className = 'offline-map-planned-item-info';
        var labelEl = document.createElement('div');
        labelEl.className = 'offline-map-planned-item-label';
        labelEl.textContent = region.name;
        var metaEl = document.createElement('div');
        metaEl.className = 'offline-map-planned-item-meta';
        metaEl.textContent = (region.estimateTiles || 0).toLocaleString('de-DE') + ' Kacheln · ca. ' + formatBytesHuman(region.estimateBytes || 0)
          + ' · Zoom ' + region.zoomMin + '–' + region.zoomMax;
        info.appendChild(labelEl);
        metaEl.textContent = (region.estimateTiles || 0).toLocaleString('de-DE') + ' Kacheln · ca. ' + formatBytesHuman(region.estimateBytes || 0)
          + ' · ' + offlineMapProfileLabel(region.profile || 'standard');
        info.appendChild(metaEl);
        item.appendChild(info);
        if (region.status) {
          var statusEl = document.createElement('span');
          statusEl.className = 'offline-map-planned-item-status ' + region.status;
          statusEl.textContent = region.status === 'done' ? 'Fertig' : region.status === 'pending' ? 'In Bearbeitung' : 'Fehler';
          item.appendChild(statusEl);
        }
        if (!offlineMapDownloadInFlight) {
          var removeBtn = document.createElement('button');
          removeBtn.type = 'button';
          removeBtn.className = 'offline-map-planned-item-remove';
          removeBtn.textContent = '×';
          removeBtn.title = 'Region aus Auswahl entfernen';
          removeBtn.addEventListener('click', function () { removeOfflineMapPlannedRegion(region.localId); });
          item.appendChild(removeBtn);
        }
        listElement.appendChild(item);
      });
      if (countElement) countElement.textContent = String(offlineMapPlannedRegions.length);
      if (totalTilesElement) totalTilesElement.textContent = totalTiles.toLocaleString('de-DE');
      if (totalBytesElement) totalBytesElement.textContent = formatBytesHuman(totalBytes);
      if (downloadButton && !offlineMapDownloadInFlight) {
        downloadButton.disabled = false;
        downloadButton.textContent = offlineMapPlannedRegions.length === 1
          ? '1 Region herunterladen'
          : (offlineMapPlannedRegions.length + ' Regionen herunterladen');
      }
    }

    async function addOfflineMapPlannedRegion(opts) {
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      var bounds = opts && opts.bounds && Number.isFinite(opts.bounds.north) ? opts.bounds : null;
      if (!bounds) {
        window.alert('Region ist ungültig.');
        return;
      }
      var profile = offlineMapProfileValue('offlineMapSearchProfile');
      var zoomValues = resolveOfflineMapZoomRange('region', bounds, profile);
      var zoomMinValue = zoomValues.zoomMin;
      var zoomMaxValue = zoomValues.zoomMax;
      if (!Number.isFinite(zoomMinValue) || !Number.isFinite(zoomMaxValue) || zoomMaxValue < zoomMinValue) {
        window.alert('Bitte gültigen Zoom-Bereich in „Region suchen" angeben.');
        return;
      }
      var styleConfig = window.__getCurrentBaseMapStyleConfig ? window.__getCurrentBaseMapStyleConfig() : null;
      var estimate;
      try {
        estimate = await resolveOfflinePlanEstimate({
          bounds: bounds,
          zoomMin: zoomMinValue,
          zoomMax: zoomMaxValue,
          profile: profile,
          downloadKind: 'region',
          styleConfig: styleConfig
        });
      } catch (error) {
        estimate = fallbackOfflinePlanEstimate(bounds, zoomMinValue, zoomMaxValue, styleConfig, null, profile);
      }
      var estimateTiles = estimate.tileTotal || 0;
      if (estimateTiles > 8000) {
        if (!window.confirm('Diese Region würde ca. ' + estimateTiles.toLocaleString('de-DE') + ' Kacheln laden. Trotzdem hinzufügen?')) return;
      }
      var nameInput = byId('offlineMapSearchRegionName');
      var localId = 'plan_' + Date.now().toString(36) + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 7);
      var name = (opts.name && String(opts.name).trim()) || ('Region ' + (offlineMapPlannedRegions.length + 1));
      var color = OFFLINE_MAP_PLANNED_COLORS[offlineMapPlannedRegions.length % OFFLINE_MAP_PLANNED_COLORS.length];
      var entry = {
        localId: localId,
        name: name,
        bounds: bounds,
        zoomMin: zoomMinValue,
        zoomMax: zoomMaxValue,
        profile: profile,
        styleConfig: styleConfig,
        estimateTiles: estimateTiles,
        estimateBytes: estimate.estimatedBytes || 0,
        estimateTotalUrls: estimate.totalUrls || estimateTiles,
        estimateResourceTotal: estimate.resourceTotal || 0,
        color: color,
        status: null
      };
      offlineMapPlannedRegions.push(entry);
      addOfflineMapPlannedPreview(entry);
      if (nameInput) nameInput.value = '';
      setOfflineMapMode('search');
      renderOfflineMapPlannedList();
    }

    function removeOfflineMapPlannedRegion(localId) {
      var index = offlineMapPlannedRegions.findIndex(function (region) { return region.localId === localId; });
      if (index < 0) return;
      offlineMapPlannedRegions.splice(index, 1);
      removeOfflineMapPlannedPreview(localId);
      renderOfflineMapPlannedList();
    }

    function clearAllOfflineMapPlannedRegions() {
      offlineMapPlannedRegions.forEach(function (region) { removeOfflineMapPlannedPreview(region.localId); });
      offlineMapPlannedRegions = [];
      renderOfflineMapPlannedList();
    }

    function addOfflineMapPlannedPreview(region) {
      if (!window.L || !state.map || !region || !region.bounds) return;
      try {
        var leafletBounds = window.L.latLngBounds(
          [region.bounds.south, region.bounds.west],
          [region.bounds.north, region.bounds.east]
        );
        var rect = window.L.rectangle(leafletBounds, {
          color: region.color,
          weight: 2,
          fillOpacity: 0.12,
          dashArray: '6,4',
          interactive: false
        }).addTo(state.map);
        offlineMapPlannedPreviewLayers[region.localId] = rect;
      } catch (_) {}
    }

    function removeOfflineMapPlannedPreview(localId) {
      var layer = offlineMapPlannedPreviewLayers[localId];
      if (layer && state.map) {
        try { state.map.removeLayer(layer); } catch (_) {}
      }
      delete offlineMapPlannedPreviewLayers[localId];
    }

    function renderAllOfflineMapPreviews() {
      Object.keys(offlineMapPlannedPreviewLayers).forEach(function (id) { removeOfflineMapPlannedPreview(id); });
      offlineMapPlannedRegions.forEach(addOfflineMapPlannedPreview);
    }

    function clearOfflineMapSearchSuggestions() {
      var container = byId('offlineMapSearchSuggestions');
      if (container) {
        container.innerHTML = '';
        container.classList.add('hidden');
      }
      if (offlineMapSearchAbortController) {
        try { offlineMapSearchAbortController.abort(); } catch (_) {}
        offlineMapSearchAbortController = null;
      }
    }

    function showOfflineMapSearchLoading() {
      var container = byId('offlineMapSearchSuggestions');
      if (!container) return;
      container.innerHTML = '<div class="offline-map-search-suggestion-loading">Suche…</div>';
      container.classList.remove('hidden');
    }

    function showOfflineMapSearchEmpty(message) {
      var container = byId('offlineMapSearchSuggestions');
      if (!container) return;
      container.innerHTML = '';
      var empty = document.createElement('div');
      empty.className = 'offline-map-search-suggestion-empty';
      empty.textContent = message || 'Keine Treffer.';
      container.appendChild(empty);
      container.classList.remove('hidden');
    }

    function renderOfflineMapSearchSuggestions(results) {
      var container = byId('offlineMapSearchSuggestions');
      if (!container) return;
      if (!results.length) { showOfflineMapSearchEmpty(); return; }
      container.innerHTML = '';
      results.slice(0, 12).forEach(function (result) {
        var item = document.createElement('div');
        item.className = 'offline-map-search-suggestion';
        item.setAttribute('role', 'option');
        var info = document.createElement('div');
        info.className = 'offline-map-search-suggestion-info';
        var labelEl = document.createElement('div');
        labelEl.className = 'offline-map-search-suggestion-label';
        labelEl.textContent = result.title || result.label;
        var metaEl = document.createElement('div');
        metaEl.className = 'offline-map-search-suggestion-meta';
        var bboxDist = approximateGroundDistanceKm(result.bounds.north, result.bounds.south, result.bounds.east, result.bounds.west);
        metaEl.textContent = (result.label || '').replace(result.title || '', '').replace(/^[,\s]+/, '') + ' · '
          + bboxDist.widthKm.toFixed(1) + ' × ' + bboxDist.heightKm.toFixed(1) + ' km';
        info.appendChild(labelEl);
        info.appendChild(metaEl);
        item.appendChild(info);
        var addBtn = document.createElement('button');
        addBtn.type = 'button';
        addBtn.className = 'offline-map-search-suggestion-add';
        addBtn.textContent = '+';
        addBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Region hinzufügen');
        addBtn.addEventListener('click', function (event) {
          event.stopPropagation();
          handleOfflineMapSuggestionPicked(result, true);
        });
        item.appendChild(addBtn);
        item.addEventListener('click', function () { handleOfflineMapSuggestionPicked(result, false); });
        container.appendChild(item);
      });
      container.classList.remove('hidden');
    }

    function handleOfflineMapSuggestionPicked(result, addImmediately) {
      var input = byId('offlineMapSearchInput');
      if (input) input.value = result.title || result.label || '';
      var nameInput = byId('offlineMapSearchRegionName');
      if (nameInput && !nameInput.value) nameInput.value = result.title || '';
      saveOfflineMapSearchHistory(result.title || result.label);
      if (state.map && result.bounds) {
        try {
          var lb = window.L.latLngBounds(
            [result.bounds.south, result.bounds.west],
            [result.bounds.north, result.bounds.east]
          );
          state.map.fitBounds(lb, { padding: [40, 40], maxZoom: 14 });
        } catch (_) {}
      }
      if (addImmediately) {
        addOfflineMapPlannedRegion({
          name: result.title || result.label || '',
          bounds: result.bounds
        }).catch(function (error) {
          window.alert('Region konnte nicht geplant werden: ' + (error && error.message ? error.message : String(error)));
        });
        clearOfflineMapSearchSuggestions();
        if (input) input.value = '';
      } else {
        clearOfflineMapSearchSuggestions();
      }
    }

    async function performOfflineMapSearch(query) {
      var trimmed = String(query || '').trim();
      if (trimmed.length < 2) { clearOfflineMapSearchSuggestions(); return; }
      offlineMapSearchToken += 1;
      var token = offlineMapSearchToken;
      if (offlineMapSearchAbortController) {
        try { offlineMapSearchAbortController.abort(); } catch (_) {}
      }
      offlineMapSearchAbortController = ('AbortController' in window) ? new AbortController() : null;
      showOfflineMapSearchLoading();
      var encoded = encodeURIComponent(trimmed);
      try {
        if (!(await isNetworkOnlineForExternalRequests())) {
          logBlockedOfflineNetworkRequest('https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search');
          logBlockedOfflineNetworkRequest('https://photon.komoot.io/api/');
          if (token !== offlineMapSearchToken) return;
          var localResults = buildOfflineMapLocalSearchResults(trimmed);
          if (localResults.length) renderOfflineMapSearchSuggestions(localResults);
          else showOfflineMapSearchEmpty('Offline: Kein lokaler Treffer im Verlauf oder in gespeicherten Orten.');
          return;
        }
        var fetchOpts = { headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' } };
        if (offlineMapSearchAbortController) fetchOpts.signal = offlineMapSearchAbortController.signal;
        var responses = await Promise.allSettled([
          fetch('https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search?format=json&addressdetails=1&limit=8&accept-language=de&q=' + encoded, fetchOpts).then(function (r) { return r.ok ? r.json() : []; }),
          fetch('https://photon.komoot.io/api/?lang=de&limit=10&q=' + encoded, fetchOpts).then(function (r) { return r.ok ? r.json() : { features: [] }; })
        ]);
        if (token !== offlineMapSearchToken) return;
        var aggregated = [];
        var seen = {};
        if (responses[0].status === 'fulfilled' && Array.isArray(responses[0].value)) {
          responses[0].value.forEach(function (entry) {
            if (!entry || !entry.boundingbox || entry.boundingbox.length !== 4) return;
            var south = Number(entry.boundingbox[0]);
            var north = Number(entry.boundingbox[1]);
            var west = Number(entry.boundingbox[2]);
            var east = Number(entry.boundingbox[3]);
            if (![south, north, west, east].every(Number.isFinite)) return;
            var titleParts = (entry.display_name || '').split(',');
            var title = (titleParts[0] || '').trim() || entry.display_name;
            var dedupeKey = title.toLowerCase() + '|' + south.toFixed(3) + '|' + west.toFixed(3);
            if (seen[dedupeKey]) return;
            seen[dedupeKey] = true;
            aggregated.push({
              title: title,
              label: entry.display_name,
              bounds: { north: north, south: south, east: east, west: west }
            });
          });
        }
        if (responses[1].status === 'fulfilled' && responses[1].value && Array.isArray(responses[1].value.features)) {
          responses[1].value.features.forEach(function (feature) {
            var props = feature && feature.properties ? feature.properties : {};
            var coords = feature && feature.geometry && Array.isArray(feature.geometry.coordinates) ? feature.geometry.coordinates : null;
            var extent = feature && feature.properties && feature.properties.extent;
            var bounds = null;
            if (extent && extent.length === 4) {
              bounds = { west: Number(extent[0]), south: Number(extent[1]), east: Number(extent[2]), north: Number(extent[3]) };
            } else if (coords && coords.length >= 2) {
              var lat = Number(coords[1]); var lon = Number(coords[0]);
              if (!Number.isFinite(lat) || !Number.isFinite(lon)) return;
              var radius = props.osm_value === 'city' ? 0.18 : (props.osm_key === 'place' ? 0.08 : 0.04);
              bounds = { north: lat + radius, south: lat - radius, east: lon + radius, west: lon - radius };
            }
            if (!bounds || ![bounds.north, bounds.south, bounds.east, bounds.west].every(Number.isFinite)) return;
            var title = props.name || (props.city || props.country || '');
            if (!title) return;
            var labelParts = [props.name, props.city, props.state, props.country].filter(Boolean);
            var dedupeKey = String(title).toLowerCase() + '|' + bounds.south.toFixed(3) + '|' + bounds.west.toFixed(3);
            if (seen[dedupeKey]) return;
            seen[dedupeKey] = true;
            aggregated.push({
              title: title,
              label: labelParts.join(', '),
              bounds: bounds
            });
          });
        }
        if (token !== offlineMapSearchToken) return;
        renderOfflineMapSearchSuggestions(aggregated);
      } catch (error) {
        if (error && error.name === 'AbortError') return;
        if (token !== offlineMapSearchToken) return;
        showOfflineMapSearchEmpty();
      }
    }

    function handleOfflineMapSearchInputChange() {
      var input = byId('offlineMapSearchInput');
      if (!input) return;
      var value = input.value;
      if (offlineMapSearchDebounceTimer) clearTimeout(offlineMapSearchDebounceTimer);
      if (!value || value.trim().length < 2) {
        clearOfflineMapSearchSuggestions();
        return;
      }
      offlineMapSearchDebounceTimer = setTimeout(function () { performOfflineMapSearch(value); }, 280);
    }

    function activeOfflineRoutePayload() {
      if (!navigationRouteIsActive || !navigationRouteIsActive()) return null;
      var coords = Array.isArray(state.navigationRouteBaselineCoords) && state.navigationRouteBaselineCoords.length >= 2
        ? state.navigationRouteBaselineCoords
        : state.navigationRouteCoords;
      if (!Array.isArray(coords) || coords.length < 2) return null;
      var destination = state.navigationRouteDestination || {};
      var profile = offlineMapProfileValue('offlineMapRouteProfile');
      var corridorMeters = offlineMapCorridorMetersForProfile(profile);
      var styleConfig = window.__getCurrentBaseMapStyleConfig ? window.__getCurrentBaseMapStyleConfig() : null;
      var destinationLabel = destination.label || state.navigationGuidanceDestinationLabel || 'Ziel';
      return {
        id: 'corridor_' + Date.now().toString(36) + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 7),
        name: 'Route: ' + destinationLabel,
        routeCoords: coords.slice(),
        profile: profile,
        corridorMeters: corridorMeters,
        routeCacheKey: state.activeNavigationRouteCacheKey || '',
        route: state.activeNavigationRouteObject || null,
        routeMeta: {
          destination: destination,
          start: state.navigationRouteStart || null,
          waypoints: Array.isArray(state.navigationRouteWaypointsSnapshot) ? state.navigationRouteWaypointsSnapshot.slice() : [],
          transportMode: state.navigationRouteTransportMode || getSelectedTransportModeFromDom(),
          savedAt: Date.now()
        },
        styleConfig: styleConfig
      };
    }

    async function refreshOfflineRoutePanel() {
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      var payload = activeOfflineRoutePayload();
      var nameElement = byId('offlineMapRouteName');
      var corridorElement = byId('offlineMapRouteCorridor');
      var estimateElement = byId('offlineMapRouteEstimate');
      var downloadButton = byId('offlineMapRouteDownloadBtn');
      var token = ++offlineMapRouteEstimateToken;
      if (!payload) {
        if (nameElement) nameElement.textContent = 'Keine aktive Route';
        if (corridorElement) corridorElement.textContent = '-';
        if (estimateElement) estimateElement.textContent = '-';
        if (downloadButton) downloadButton.disabled = true;
        return;
      }
      if (nameElement) nameElement.textContent = payload.name;
      if (corridorElement) corridorElement.textContent = Math.round(payload.corridorMeters / 1000) + ' km · ' + offlineMapProfileLabel(payload.profile);
      if (estimateElement) estimateElement.textContent = '...';
      var estimate = await resolveOfflinePlanEstimate({
        bounds: payload.bounds,
        routeCoords: payload.routeCoords,
        corridorMeters: payload.corridorMeters,
        profile: payload.profile,
        downloadKind: 'corridor',
        styleConfig: payload.styleConfig
      });
      if (token !== offlineMapRouteEstimateToken) return;
      var tiles = estimate.tileTotal || 0;
      if (estimateElement) estimateElement.textContent = tiles ? (tiles.toLocaleString('de-DE') + ' Kacheln · ca. ' + formatBytesHuman(estimate.estimatedBytes || 0)) : '-';
      if (downloadButton) downloadButton.disabled = !bridge || typeof bridge.cacheRouteCorridor !== 'function';
    }

    async function startOfflineMapRouteDownload() {
      if (offlineMapDownloadInFlight) return;
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (!bridge || typeof bridge.cacheRouteCorridor !== 'function') {
        window.alert('Route-Korridor nur in der Mobile-App verfuegbar.');
        return;
      }
      var payload = activeOfflineRoutePayload();
      if (!payload) {
        window.alert('Bitte zuerst eine Route berechnen.');
        return;
      }
      offlineMapDownloadInFlight = true;
      offlineMapDownloadAbortController = ('AbortController' in window) ? new AbortController() : null;
      setOfflineMapDownloadingUiState(true);
      setOfflineMapProgress(null);
      try {
        var result = await bridge.cacheRouteCorridor(Object.assign({}, payload, {
          signal: offlineMapDownloadAbortController && offlineMapDownloadAbortController.signal,
          onProgress: setOfflineMapProgress,
          onRegionComplete: function () { refreshOfflineMapList({ forceOverlay: true, downloadEvent: true, reason: 'routeRegionComplete' }); }
        }));
        var saved = result && result.regions && result.regions[0] ? result.regions[0] : null;
        if (saved && payload.routeCacheKey) attachOfflineCorridorToRouteCache(payload.routeCacheKey, saved);
        if (result && result.failed) {
          window.alert('Route-Korridor unvollstaendig, aber fortsetzbar: ' + payload.name);
        } else {
          window.alert('Route offline vorbereitet: ' + ((saved && saved.name) || payload.name));
        }
        return result;
      } catch (error) {
        var message = error && error.message ? error.message : String(error);
        if (message !== 'Abgebrochen') window.alert('Route-Korridor fehlgeschlagen: ' + message);
        throw error;
      } finally {
        offlineMapDownloadInFlight = false;
        offlineMapDownloadAbortController = null;
        setOfflineMapDownloadingUiState(false);
        refreshOfflineRoutePanel();
        refreshOfflineMapList({ forceOverlay: true, downloadEvent: true, reason: 'routeDownloadComplete' });
      }
    }

    async function runOfflineMapRegionsDownload(regionsToDownload, opts) {
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      var options = opts || {};
      if (!regionsToDownload.length) return null;
      offlineMapDownloadInFlight = true;
      offlineMapDownloadAbortController = ('AbortController' in window) ? new AbortController() : null;
      setOfflineMapDownloadingUiState(true);
      setOfflineMapProgress(null);
      regionsToDownload.forEach(function (r) { r.status = 'pending'; });
      if (options.mode === 'search') renderOfflineMapPlannedList();
      try {
        var payload = regionsToDownload.map(function (region) {
          return {
            id: region.id || region.localId,
            name: region.name,
            bounds: region.bounds,
            zoomMin: region.zoomMin,
            zoomMax: region.zoomMax,
            profile: region.profile || 'standard',
            downloadKind: region.downloadKind || 'region',
            styleConfig: region.styleConfig
          };
        });
        var result;
        if (payload.length === 1 && typeof bridge.cacheMapRegion === 'function') {
          var singleRecord = await bridge.cacheMapRegion({
            id: payload[0].id,
            name: payload[0].name,
            bounds: payload[0].bounds,
            zoomMin: payload[0].zoomMin,
            zoomMax: payload[0].zoomMax,
            profile: payload[0].profile,
            downloadKind: payload[0].downloadKind,
            styleConfig: payload[0].styleConfig,
            signal: offlineMapDownloadAbortController && offlineMapDownloadAbortController.signal,
            onProgress: setOfflineMapProgress
          });
          var singleReady = !!(singleRecord && (singleRecord.ready || offlineRegionStatusLabel(singleRecord) === 'bereit'));
          result = { completed: singleReady ? 1 : 0, total: 1, failed: singleReady ? 0 : 1, regions: [singleRecord] };
        } else if (typeof bridge.cacheMapRegionsQueue === 'function') {
          result = await bridge.cacheMapRegionsQueue(payload, {
            onProgress: setOfflineMapProgress,
            onRegionComplete: function (record, event) {
              if (!event || options.mode !== 'search') return;
              var qi = Math.max(0, Number(event.queueIndex || 0));
              if (regionsToDownload[qi]) regionsToDownload[qi].status = 'done';
              renderOfflineMapPlannedList();
              refreshOfflineMapList({ forceOverlay: true, downloadEvent: true, reason: 'regionComplete' });
            },
            signal: offlineMapDownloadAbortController && offlineMapDownloadAbortController.signal
          });
        } else {
          throw new Error('Download nicht verfügbar');
        }
        var completed = result && result.completed != null ? result.completed : 1;
        var total = result && result.total != null ? result.total : regionsToDownload.length;
        var failed = result && result.failed != null ? result.failed : 0;
        if (total > 1 || options.mode === 'search') {
          window.alert(completed + ' von ' + total + ' Regionen gespeichert' + (failed ? ' (Fehler: ' + failed + ')' : ''));
        } else {
          var saved = result && result.regions && result.regions[0] ? result.regions[0] : (result || {});
          var savedStatus = offlineRegionStatusLabel(saved);
          var ready = !!(saved.ready || savedStatus === 'bereit');
          var present = Number(saved.tileCount || 0);
          var missing = Number(saved.missing || 0);
          var failedTiles = Number(saved.failed || 0);
          window.alert((ready ? 'Region gespeichert: ' : 'Region teilweise gespeichert: ')
            + (saved.name || 'Region') + ' · ' + savedStatus
            + ' · vorhanden: ' + present.toLocaleString('de-DE')
            + ' · fehlend: ' + missing.toLocaleString('de-DE')
            + ' · failed: ' + failedTiles.toLocaleString('de-DE'));
        }
        if (options.mode === 'search') clearAllOfflineMapPlannedRegions();
        if (options.mode === 'view') {
          var viewNameInput = byId('offlineMapViewRegionName');
          if (viewNameInput) viewNameInput.value = '';
        }
        return result;
      } catch (error) {
        var message = error && error.message ? error.message : String(error);
        if (message !== 'Abgebrochen') window.alert('Offline-Karten fehlgeschlagen: ' + message);
        if (error && Array.isArray(error.completed) && options.mode === 'search') {
          var completedIds = new Set(error.completed.map(function (r) { return r && r.id; }));
          offlineMapPlannedRegions.forEach(function (region) {
            if (region.status === 'pending' && completedIds.has(region.localId)) region.status = 'done';
            else if (region.status === 'pending') region.status = null;
          });
        }
        throw error;
      } finally {
        offlineMapDownloadInFlight = false;
        offlineMapDownloadAbortController = null;
        setOfflineMapDownloadingUiState(false);
        if (options.mode === 'search') renderOfflineMapPlannedList();
        refreshOfflineMapList({ forceOverlay: true, downloadEvent: true, reason: 'regionsDownloadComplete' });
      }
    }

    async function startOfflineMapViewDownload() {
      if (offlineMapDownloadInFlight) return;
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (!bridge || (!bridge.cacheMapRegionsQueue && !bridge.cacheMapRegion)) {
        window.alert('Offline-Cache nur in der Mobile-App verfügbar.');
        return;
      }
      var bounds = bridge.getCurrentMapBounds ? bridge.getCurrentMapBounds() : null;
      if (!bounds) {
        window.alert('Kein sichtbarer Karten-Ausschnitt verfügbar.');
        return;
      }
      var zoomValues = readOfflineMapViewZoomValues();
      if (!Number.isFinite(zoomValues.zoomMin) || !Number.isFinite(zoomValues.zoomMax) || zoomValues.zoomMax < zoomValues.zoomMin) {
        window.alert('Bitte gültigen Zoom-Bereich in „Kartenansicht" angeben.');
        return;
      }
      var nameInput = byId('offlineMapViewRegionName');
      var styleConfig = window.__getCurrentBaseMapStyleConfig ? window.__getCurrentBaseMapStyleConfig() : null;
      var estimate = await resolveOfflinePlanEstimate({
        bounds: bounds,
        zoomMin: zoomValues.zoomMin,
        zoomMax: zoomValues.zoomMax,
        profile: zoomValues.profile || offlineMapProfileValue('offlineMapViewProfile'),
        downloadKind: 'view',
        styleConfig: styleConfig
      });
      var estimateTiles = estimate.tileTotal || 0;
      if (estimateTiles > 8000) {
        if (!window.confirm('Dieser Ausschnitt würde ca. ' + estimateTiles.toLocaleString('de-DE') + ' Kacheln laden. Trotzdem herunterladen?')) return;
      }
      var region = {
        id: 'view_' + Date.now().toString(36) + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 7),
        name: nameInput && nameInput.value ? String(nameInput.value).trim() : '',
        bounds: bounds,
        zoomMin: zoomValues.zoomMin,
        zoomMax: zoomValues.zoomMax,
        profile: zoomValues.profile || offlineMapProfileValue('offlineMapViewProfile'),
        downloadKind: 'view',
        styleConfig: styleConfig,
        status: null
      };
      setOfflineMapMode('view');
      await runOfflineMapRegionsDownload([region], { mode: 'view' });
    }

    async function startOfflineMapSearchDownload() {
      if (offlineMapDownloadInFlight) return;
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (!bridge || !bridge.cacheMapRegionsQueue) {
        window.alert('Mehrfach-Download nur in der Mobile-App verfügbar.');
        return;
      }
      if (!offlineMapPlannedRegions.length) {
        window.alert('Bitte zuerst mindestens eine Region über die Suche auswählen.');
        return;
      }
      setOfflineMapMode('search');
      await runOfflineMapRegionsDownload(offlineMapPlannedRegions.slice(), { mode: 'search' });
    }

    function cancelOfflineMapDownload() {
      if (offlineMapDownloadAbortController) {
        try { offlineMapDownloadAbortController.abort(); } catch (_) {}
      }
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (bridge && typeof bridge.cancelActiveOfflineMapDownload === 'function') {
        try { bridge.cancelActiveOfflineMapDownload(); } catch (_) {}
      }
    }

    function attachOfflineMapDownloadNativeListeners() {
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (!bridge || typeof bridge.addOfflineMapDownloadListener !== 'function') return;
      if (window.__offlineMapDownloadListenersAttached) return;
      window.__offlineMapDownloadListenersAttached = true;
      var safeOn = function (name, handler) {
        try { bridge.addOfflineMapDownloadListener(name, handler); } catch (_) {}
      };
      safeOn('progress', function (event) {
        if (!event) return;
        offlineMapDownloadInFlight = true;
        setOfflineMapDownloadingUiState(true);
        setOfflineMapProgress({
          phase: event.phase || 'tiles',
          downloaded: Number(event.downloaded || 0),
          total: Number(event.total || 0),
          failed: Number(event.failed || 0),
          processed: Number(event.processed || 0),
          missing: Number(event.missing || 0),
          workers: Number(event.workers || 0),
          queueIndex: Number(event.queueIndex || 0),
          queueTotal: Number(event.queueTotal || 0),
          regionName: event.regionName || ''
        });
      });
      safeOn('region-start', function (event) {
        if (!event) return;
        setOfflineMapProgress({
          phase: 'region-start',
          downloaded: 0, total: 0, failed: 0,
          queueIndex: Number(event.queueIndex || 0),
          queueTotal: Number(event.queueTotal || 0),
          regionName: event.regionName || ''
        });
      });
      safeOn('region-complete', function (event) {
        refreshOfflineMapList({ forceOverlay: true, downloadEvent: true, reason: 'nativeRegionComplete' });
        if (!event) return;
        var qi = Number(event.queueIndex || 0);
        if (offlineMapPlannedRegions[qi]) {
          offlineMapPlannedRegions[qi].status = 'done';
          renderOfflineMapPlannedList();
        }
      });
      safeOn('region-incomplete', function () {
        refreshOfflineMapList({ forceOverlay: true, downloadEvent: true, reason: 'nativeRegionIncomplete' });
        renderOfflineMapPlannedList();
      });
      safeOn('queue-complete', function (event) {
        offlineMapDownloadInFlight = false;
        setOfflineMapDownloadingUiState(false);
        setOfflineMapProgress(null);
        refreshOfflineMapList({ forceOverlay: true, downloadEvent: true, reason: 'nativeQueueComplete' });
        refreshOfflineDebugInfo({ reason: 'nativeQueueComplete', downloadEvent: true });
        try { bridge.dismissOfflineMapDownloadNotifications && bridge.dismissOfflineMapDownloadNotifications(); } catch (_) {}
      });
      safeOn('complete', function () {
        offlineMapDownloadInFlight = false;
        setOfflineMapDownloadingUiState(false);
        refreshOfflineMapList({ forceOverlay: true, downloadEvent: true, reason: 'nativeComplete' });
        refreshOfflineDebugInfo({ reason: 'nativeComplete', downloadEvent: true });
        try { bridge.dismissOfflineMapDownloadNotifications && bridge.dismissOfflineMapDownloadNotifications(); } catch (_) {}
      });
      safeOn('cancel', function () {
        offlineMapDownloadInFlight = false;
        setOfflineMapDownloadingUiState(false);
        setOfflineMapProgress(null);
        offlineMapPlannedRegions.forEach(function (r) { if (r.status === 'pending') r.status = null; });
        renderOfflineMapPlannedList();
        refreshOfflineMapList({ downloadEvent: true, reason: 'nativeCancel' });
      });
      safeOn('error', function (event) {
        offlineMapDownloadInFlight = false;
        setOfflineMapDownloadingUiState(false);
        var msg = event && event.message ? event.message : 'Unbekannter Fehler';
        window.alert('Offline-Karte fehlgeschlagen: ' + msg);
        refreshOfflineMapList({ downloadEvent: true, reason: 'nativeError' });
      });
      safeOn('openSheet', function () { openOfflineMapSheet(); });
    }

    async function syncOfflineMapDownloadStateFromNative() {
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (!bridge || typeof bridge.getOfflineMapDownloadStatus !== 'function') return;
      try {
        if (typeof bridge.recoverOfflineState === 'function') await bridge.recoverOfflineState();
        var status = await bridge.getOfflineMapDownloadStatus();
        if (status && status.active) {
          if (Number(status.queueTotal || 0) > 1 || offlineMapPlannedRegions.length) {
            setOfflineMapMode('search');
          } else {
            setOfflineMapMode('view');
          }
          offlineMapDownloadInFlight = true;
          setOfflineMapDownloadingUiState(true);
          setOfflineMapProgress({
            phase: status.phase || 'tiles',
            downloaded: Number(status.downloaded || 0),
            total: Number(status.total || 0),
            failed: Number(status.failed || 0),
            processed: Number(status.processed || 0),
            missing: Number(status.missing || 0),
            queueIndex: Number(status.queueIndex || 0),
            queueTotal: Number(status.queueTotal || 0),
            regionName: status.regionName || ''
          });
        }
      } catch (_) {}
    }

    async function clearAllOfflineMapRegions() {
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (!bridge || !bridge.clearAllOfflineRegions) return;
      if (!window.confirm('Wirklich alle gespeicherten Karten-Regionen löschen?')) return;
      try {
        await bridge.clearAllOfflineRegions();
      } catch (error) {
        window.alert('Löschen fehlgeschlagen: ' + (error && error.message ? error.message : String(error)));
      }
      refreshOfflineMapList({ forceOverlay: true, mutation: true, reason: 'clearAll' });
      refreshOfflineDebugInfo({ mutation: true, reason: 'clearAll' });
    }

    function dismissNativeProfileOverlay(event) {
      if (event) {
        event.preventDefault();
        event.stopPropagation();
      }
      closeNativeProfileSheet();
    }

    function initNativeProfileUi() {
      if (nativeProfileUiBound) return;
      if (!isNativeAppContext()) return;
      nativeProfileUiBound = true;
      var previousServerUploadModeChange = window.__capacitorOnServerUploadModeChange;
      window.__capacitorOnServerUploadModeChange = function (enabled) {
        if (typeof previousServerUploadModeChange === 'function') {
          try { previousServerUploadModeChange(enabled); } catch (_) {}
        }
        setServerUploadButtonState(!!enabled, 'bridgeCallback');
      };
      window.addEventListener('capacitor-bridge-status', function (event) {
        var statusEl = byId('nativeGpsStatus');
        if (statusEl && event && event.detail) statusEl.textContent = String(event.detail);
      });
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(byId('serverUploadToggleBtn'), toggleServerUploadFromButton, 'Fehler beim Umschalten der Server-Uebertragung:', 'Server-Uebertragung konnte nicht umgeschaltet werden.');
      bindClickIfPresent(byId('nativeProfileBtn'), openNativeProfileSheet);
      bindClickIfPresent(byId('nativeProfileCloseBtn'), dismissNativeProfileOverlay);
      var profileSheet = byId('nativeProfileSheet');
      if (profileSheet) {
        profileSheet.addEventListener('pointerdown', function (event) {
          if (event.target === profileSheet) dismissNativeProfileOverlay(event);
        });
        profileSheet.addEventListener('input', function (event) {
          markNativeProfileRanges();
          if (event.target && event.target.id === 'nativeProfileMapRotationAuto') {
            syncMapRotationFormUi();
            // Sofort wirksam machen (ohne dass erst gespeichert werden muss).
            saveMapRotationPrefsFromForm();
            applyMapRotationAutoRuntimeState();
          }
          if (event.target && event.target.id === 'nativeProfileMapRotationSec') {
            saveMapRotationPrefsFromForm();
          }
          if (event.target && event.target.id === 'nativeProfileHeadingFilterPreset') {
            syncHeadingFilterFormUi();
            previewHeadingFilterFromForm();
            // Auto-Glaettung haengt vom Filtermodus ab -> grauen Wert auffrischen.
            syncMapRotationFormUi();
          }
          if (event.target && event.target.id && event.target.id.indexOf('nativeProfileHeadingFilter') === 0 &&
            event.target.id !== 'nativeProfileHeadingFilterPreset' &&
            event.target.id !== 'nativeProfileHeadingFilterToggle') {
            var presetEl = byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterPreset');
            if (presetEl) presetEl.value = 'custom';
            syncHeadingFilterFormUi();
            previewHeadingFilterFromForm();
            syncMapRotationFormUi();
          }
        });
        var rotAutoEl = byId('nativeProfileMapRotationAuto');
        if (rotAutoEl) rotAutoEl.addEventListener('change', syncMapRotationFormUi);
        bindClickIfPresent(byId('nativeProfileFilterModeOffline'), function () { setNativeProfileFilterMode('display'); });
        bindClickIfPresent(byId('nativeProfileFilterModeOnline'), function () { setNativeProfileFilterMode('upload'); });
        bindClickIfPresent(byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterToggle'), function () {
          toggleNativeProfileHeadingFilterSection();
        });
      }
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(byId('nativeProfileSaveBtn'), async function () {
        var payload = nativeProfilePayload();
        // Lokale Prefs sofort sichern (greifen direkt) und das Panel mit EINEM
        // Klick schliessen. Das eigentliche Speichern laeuft danach im
        // Hintergrund weiter, ohne das Schliessen zu blockieren.
        saveMapRotationPrefsFromForm();
        saveHeadingFilterPrefsFromForm();
        applyMapRotationAutoRuntimeState();
        closeNativeProfileSheet();
        await saveNativeProfilePayload(payload);
      }, 'Profil speichern fehlgeschlagen:', 'Profil konnte nicht gespeichert werden.');
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(byId('nativeProfileResetBtn'), async function () {
        var defaults = nativeProfileFactoryResetValues();
        fillNativeProfileForm(defaults);
        await saveNativeProfilePayload(nativeProfilePayload(defaults));
      }, 'Profil-Zuruecksetzen fehlgeschlagen:', 'Profil konnte nicht zurueckgesetzt werden.');
      syncServerUploadButtonFromBridge('startup').catch(function () {
        setServerUploadButtonState(readNativeProfileDefaults().serverUploadEnabled !== false, 'startupFallback');
      });
    }

    async function bootstrapNativeMobileApp() {
      if (!isNativeAppContext() && !isCapacitorNativeApp()) return false;
      initNativeAppChrome();
      setTimeout(updateDialogLayout, 80);
      initNativeLiveGpsUi();
      if (window.CapacitorMobileBridge && window.CapacitorMobileBridge.init) {
        await window.CapacitorMobileBridge.init().catch(function () { return false; });
        if (typeof window.CapacitorMobileBridge.isOnline === 'function') {
          window.CapacitorMobileBridge.isOnline().then(function (online) {
            if (!online) logMobileStartup('offline mode');
          }).catch(function () {
            logMobileStartup('offline mode');
          });
        }
      }
      refreshCachedNativePhoneDeviceKey();
      initNativeProfileUi();
      return !!getNativePhoneDeviceKey();
    }

    async function waitForNativeDeviceKey(maxWaitMs) {
      if (!isCapacitorNativeApp()) return '';
      if (!getNativePhoneDeviceKey()) await bootstrapNativeMobileApp();
      var deadline = Date.now() + (maxWaitMs || 10000);
      while (Date.now() < deadline) {
        refreshCachedNativePhoneDeviceKey();
        var nativeKey = getNativePhoneDeviceKey();
        if (nativeKey) {
          if (resolveMarkerLatLngForDevice(nativeKey)) return nativeKey;
          var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
          if (bridge && bridge.refreshNow) await bridge.refreshNow().catch(function () {});
        }
        await new Promise(function (resolve) { setTimeout(resolve, 250); });
      }
      return getNativePhoneDeviceKey();
    }

    async function runColdStartTrackingBootstrap() {
      if (state.coldStartBootstrapInFlight) {
        return;
      }
      state.coldStartBootstrapInFlight = true;
      try {
        applyColdStartAllDevicesMapView();
        bootstrapCachedTrackingState();
        if (isCapacitorNativeApp()) {
          await bootstrapNativeMobileApp();
          refreshCachedNativePhoneDeviceKey();
          bootstrapNativeLocalDevice();
        }
        syncNativeDeviceRegistry();
        await loadTracking();
        syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();
        tryFitAllDevicesAfterColdStart();
      } finally {
        state.coldStartBootstrapInFlight = false;
      }
    }

    function startNativeColdStartRetryIfNeeded() {
      if (isCapacitorNativeApp() && !getNativePhoneDeviceKey()) {
        var nativeBootstrapAttempts = 0;
        var nativeBootstrapTimer = setInterval(function () {
          nativeBootstrapAttempts += 1;
          runColdStartTrackingBootstrap().catch(function (bootstrapError) {
            console.error('Native Kaltstart erneut fehlgeschlagen:', bootstrapError);
          }).finally(function () {
            if (getNativePhoneDeviceKey() || nativeBootstrapAttempts >= 20) {
              clearInterval(nativeBootstrapTimer);
            }
          });
        }, 500);
      }
    }

    function startMapBackgroundStartupTasks() {
      try { loadRecentRouteSuggestions(); } catch (recentRouteError) {
        console.warn('Letzte Routensuchen konnten nicht geladen werden:', recentRouteError);
      }
      setInterval(triggerLiveTrackingUpdate, TRACKING_POLL_INTERVAL_MS);
      setInterval(quickPollOwnTracksLastPosition, LAST_POSITION_QUICK_POLL_MS);
      setInterval(refreshSavedItemsIfPanelOpen, 2500);
      startLiveTrackingChannel();
      window.addEventListener('mobile-server-availability', function (event) {
        if (!event || !event.detail || !event.detail.available) return;
        startLiveTrackingChannel();
        triggerLiveTrackingUpdate();
        syncTrackingStateFromServer().catch(function () {});
      });
      window.addEventListener('beforeunload', stopLiveTrackingChannel);
      window.addEventListener('pageshow', function (pageShowEvent) {
        if (!pageShowEvent || !pageShowEvent.persisted) {
          return;
        }
        runColdStartTrackingBootstrap().catch(function (pageShowError) {
          console.error('Kaltstart nach pageshow fehlgeschlagen:', pageShowError);
        });
      });

      runColdStartTrackingBootstrap().then(function () {
        startNativeColdStartRetryIfNeeded();
      }).catch(function (bootstrapError) {
        console.error('Kaltstart im Hintergrund fehlgeschlagen:', bootstrapError);
        applyLocalTrackingStateToUi(getSelectedDeviceKey());
        startNativeColdStartRetryIfNeeded();
      });

      Promise.resolve().then(async function () {
        await loadSavedPlaces().catch(function (placesError) {
          console.warn('Orte im Kaltstart lokal fortgesetzt:', placesError);
        });
        await loadSavedRoutes().catch(function (routesError) {
          console.warn('Routen im Kaltstart lokal fortgesetzt:', routesError);
        });
        await syncTrackingStateFromServer().catch(function (trackingSyncError) {
          console.warn('Tracking-Status im Kaltstart lokal fortgesetzt:', trackingSyncError);
          applyLocalTrackingStateToUi(getSelectedDeviceKey());
        });
      }).catch(function (startupError) {
        console.warn('Hintergrundstart lokal fortgesetzt:', startupError);
      });
    }

    function initializeMapUiControls() {
      const resetButton = byId('resetBtn');
      const trackingButton = byId('trackingBtn');
      const markPlaceButton = byId('markPlaceBtn');
      const saveRouteButton = byId('saveRouteBtn');
      const settingsButton = byId('settingsBtn');
      const owntracksButton = byId('owntracksBtn');
      const trackingRouteButton = byId('trackingRouteBtn');
      const searchButton = byId('searchBtn');
      const waypointButton = byId('waypointBtn');
      const routeClearButton = byId('routeClearBtn');
      const transportModeElement = byId('transportMode');
      const transportModeButtons = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.transport-mode-btn'));
      const searchToggleButton = byId('searchToggleBtn');
      const locateToggleButton = byId('locateToggleBtn');
      const mapStyleToggleButton = byId('mapStyleToggleBtn');
      const mobileAppToggleButton = byId('mobileAppToggleBtn');
      const mapToolbarCollapseButton = byId('mapToolbarCollapseBtn');
      const clearSearchInlineButton = byId('clearSearchInlineBtn');
      const clearStartInlineButton = byId('clearStartInlineBtn');
      const useCurrentAsStartButton = byId('useCurrentAsStartBtn');
      const routeQueryElement = byId('routeQuery');
      const routeStartQueryElement = byId('routeStartQuery');
      const waypointSuggestionsElement = byId('waypointSuggestions');
      const routeSuggestionsElement = byId('routeSuggestions');
      const syncSavedItemsButton = byId('syncSavedItemsBtn');
      const deleteSelectedButton = byId('deleteSelectedBtn');
      const deleteAllButton = byId('deleteAllBtn');
      const panelToggleButton = byId('panelToggleBtn');
      const previousDeviceButton = byId('prevDeviceBtn');
      const nextDeviceButton = byId('nextDeviceBtn');
      const toggleDeviceViewButton = byId('toggleDeviceViewBtn');
      const dropDeviceButton = byId('dropDeviceBtn');
      const placeSheetCloseButton = byId('placeSheetCloseBtn');
      const placeSheetToggleExpandButton = byId('placeSheetToggleExpandBtn');
      const placeSheetBodyElement = byId('placeSheetBody');
      const placeSheetNavCenterButton = byId('placeSheetNavCenterBtn');
      const placeSheetNavRemainingElement = byId('placeSheetNavRemaining');
      const placeSheetNavStartButton = byId('placeSheetNavStartBtn');
      const placeSheetRouteButton = byId('placeSheetRouteBtn');
      const placeSheetMarkButton = byId('placeSheetMarkBtn');
      const placeSheetAutonomousButton = byId('placeSheetAutonomousBtn');

      updateTrackingButtonLabel();
      updateTrackingRouteButtonLabel();
      updateTrackingStatusChip();
      renderPlacesList();
      renderRoutesList();
      renderVisiblePlacesLegend();
      updateMapStyleButtonState();

      bindClickIfPresent(resetButton, handleResetClick);
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(trackingButton, toggleTracking, 'Fehler beim Umschalten des Trackings:', 'Tracking konnte nicht umgeschaltet werden.');
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(markPlaceButton, saveCurrentPlace, 'Fehler beim Speichern des Ortes:', 'Ort konnte nicht gespeichert werden.');
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(saveRouteButton, saveCurrentRoute, 'Fehler beim Speichern der Route:', 'Route konnte nicht gespeichert werden.');
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(trackingRouteButton, toggleLatestTrackingRouteVisibility, 'Fehler beim Anzeigen der Tracking-Route:', 'Tracking-Route konnte nicht angezeigt werden.');
      bindClickIfPresent(settingsButton, toggleSettingsPanel);
      bindClickIfPresent(owntracksButton, toggleOwntracksPanel);
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(searchButton, function () {
        return handlePlaceSearch().then(function () {
          appendWaypointEditorRowAfterDestinationSearch();
        });
      }, 'Fehler bei der Suche:', 'Ort konnte nicht gesucht werden.');
      bindClickIfPresent(routeClearButton, function () {
        clearRouteVisualization(true);
        setRouteInlineInfo('-', '-');
        // Nach dem Beenden der Route die Kamera sanft wieder flach kippen.
        resetMapPitchFlat(true);
      });
      bindClickIfPresent(waypointButton, toggleWaypointPickMode);
      if (transportModeElement) {
        transportModeButtons.forEach(function (transportButton) {
          transportButton.addEventListener('click', function () {
            const selectedMode = transportButton.getAttribute('data-mode') || 'driving';
            transportModeElement.value = selectedMode;
            transportModeButtons.forEach(function (buttonItem) {
              buttonItem.classList.toggle('active', buttonItem === transportButton);
            });
            const hasSearchText = routeQueryElement && String(routeQueryElement.value || '').trim().length > 0;
            const hasSelectedSuggestion = !!state.selectedRouteSuggestion;
            const hasExistingDestination = !!state.destinationMarker;
            if (!hasSearchText && !hasSelectedSuggestion && !hasExistingDestination) {
              return;
            }
            handleRouteRequest().catch(function (error) {
              handleAsyncActionError(error, 'Fehler bei automatischer Routenberechnung:', 'Route konnte nicht berechnet werden.');
            });
          });
        });
      }
      bindClickIfPresent(clearSearchInlineButton, clearSearchInputAndMap);
      bindClickIfPresent(byId('searchPanelResetAllBtn'), function () {
        clearSearchInputAndMap();
      });
      bindClickIfPresent(mapStyleToggleButton, toggleMapStyle);
      if (routeQueryElement) {
        const setDestinationTarget = function () {
          state.awaitingWaypointPick = false;
          state.activeWaypointRowId = null;
          state.activeSearchTarget = { kind: 'destination' };
          updateWaypointButtonState();
          openRouteSuggestionsForInput(routeQueryElement);
        };
        routeQueryElement.addEventListener('focus', setDestinationTarget);
        routeQueryElement.addEventListener('click', setDestinationTarget);
        routeQueryElement.addEventListener('keydown', function (keyboardEvent) {
          if (keyboardEvent.key === 'Enter') {
            keyboardEvent.preventDefault();
            handlePlaceSearch().catch(function (error) {
              handleAsyncActionError(error, 'Fehler bei der Suche:', 'Ort konnte nicht gesucht werden.');
            });
          }
        });
        routeQueryElement.addEventListener('input', function () {
          state.selectedRouteSuggestion = null;
          updateInlineClearButtonVisibility();
          if (state.routeSuggestTimer) {
            clearTimeout(state.routeSuggestTimer);
          }
          state.routeSuggestTimer = setTimeout(function () {
            fetchRouteSuggestions(routeQueryElement.value).catch(function (error) {
              if (error && error.name === 'AbortError') {
                return;
              }
              console.error('Fehler bei Suchvorschlägen:', error);
              hideRouteSuggestions();
            });
          }, ROUTE_INPUT_DEBOUNCE_MS);
        });
      }
      if (routeStartQueryElement) {
        const setStartTarget = function () {
          state.awaitingWaypointPick = false;
          state.activeWaypointRowId = null;
          state.activeSearchTarget = { kind: 'start' };
          updateWaypointButtonState();
          openRouteSuggestionsForInput(routeStartQueryElement);
        };
        routeStartQueryElement.addEventListener('focus', setStartTarget);
        routeStartQueryElement.addEventListener('click', setStartTarget);
        routeStartQueryElement.addEventListener('keydown', function (keyboardEvent) {
          if (keyboardEvent.key === 'Enter') {
            keyboardEvent.preventDefault();
            const startQueryText = String(routeStartQueryElement.value || '').trim();
            if (!startQueryText || startQueryText === 'Mein Standort') {
              state.selectedRouteStart = null;
              renderRouteStartMarker({ skipMapViewUpdate: true });
              updateStartInlineClearButtonVisibility();
              if (state.selectedRouteSuggestion) {
                clearRouteVisualization(true);
                setRouteInlineInfo('-', '-');
                updateMapViewForRouteSearchEndpoints().catch(function (error) {
                  handleAsyncActionError(error, 'Fehler bei der Kartenansicht:', 'Start und Ziel konnten nicht angezeigt werden.');
                });
              }
              return;
            }
            searchDestinationCoordinates(startQueryText).then(function (resolvedStart) {
              pauseMapFollowForRoutePlanning();
              state.selectedRouteStart = {
                lat: resolvedStart.lat,
                lon: resolvedStart.lon,
                label: resolvedStart.label,
                kind: 'place'
              };
              routeStartQueryElement.value = resolvedStart.label;
              addToRecentRouteSuggestions(resolvedStart);
              renderRouteStartMarker();
              updateStartInlineClearButtonVisibility();
              if (state.selectedRouteSuggestion) {
                clearRouteVisualization(true);
                setRouteInlineInfo('-', '-');
                return updateMapViewForRouteSearchEndpoints();
              }
              return null;
            }).catch(function (error) {
              handleAsyncActionError(error, 'Fehler bei der Start-Suche:', 'Startpunkt konnte nicht gefunden werden.');
            });
          }
        });
        routeStartQueryElement.addEventListener('input', function () {
          const typedStartText = String(routeStartQueryElement.value || '').trim();
          if (typedStartText && typedStartText !== 'Mein Standort') {
            pauseMapFollowForRoutePlanning();
          }
          if (!state.selectedRouteStart || String(state.selectedRouteStart.label || '').trim() !== typedStartText) {
            state.selectedRouteStart = null;
          }
          updateStartInlineClearButtonVisibility();
          if (state.routeSuggestTimer) {
            clearTimeout(state.routeSuggestTimer);
          }
          state.routeSuggestTimer = setTimeout(function () {
            fetchRouteSuggestions(routeStartQueryElement.value).catch(function (error) {
              if (error && error.name === 'AbortError') {
                return;
              }
              console.error('Fehler bei Start-Vorschlägen:', error);
              hideRouteSuggestions();
            });
          }, ROUTE_INPUT_DEBOUNCE_MS);
        });
      }
      bindClickIfPresent(clearStartInlineButton, function () {
        if (routeStartQueryElement) {
          routeStartQueryElement.value = '';
        }
        state.selectedRouteStart = null;
        if (state.startMarker) {
          state.map.removeLayer(state.startMarker);
          state.startMarker = null;
        }
        updateStartInlineClearButtonVisibility();
        hideRouteSuggestions();
      });
      bindClickIfPresent(useCurrentAsStartButton, function () {
        state.selectedRouteStart = null;
        if (state.startMarker) {
          state.map.removeLayer(state.startMarker);
          state.startMarker = null;
        }
        if (routeStartQueryElement) {
          routeStartQueryElement.value = 'Mein Standort';
        }
        updateStartInlineClearButtonVisibility();
        hideRouteSuggestions();
        if (state.selectedRouteSuggestion) {
          clearRouteVisualization(true);
          setRouteInlineInfo('-', '-');
          updateMapViewForRouteSearchEndpoints().catch(function (error) {
            handleAsyncActionError(error, 'Fehler bei der Kartenansicht:', 'Start und Ziel konnten nicht angezeigt werden.');
          });
        }
      });
      bindClickIfPresent(placeSheetCloseButton, handlePlaceSheetCloseButtonClick);
      bindClickIfPresent(placeSheetToggleExpandButton, togglePlaceSheetFromHeaderChevron);
      if (placeSheetBodyElement) {
        placeSheetBodyElement.addEventListener('click', handlePlaceSheetBodyClickForNavigationCompactPeek);
      }
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(placeSheetNavCenterButton, handleNavigationGuidanceCenterClick, 'Fehler beim Zentrieren:', 'Standort konnte nicht ermittelt werden.');
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(placeSheetNavStartButton, handleNavigationGuidanceStartClick, 'Fehler beim Start der Navigation:', 'Navigation konnte nicht gestartet werden.');
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(placeSheetRouteButton, handlePlaceSheetRouteButtonClick, 'Fehler beim Anzeigen der Route:', 'Route konnte nicht berechnet werden.');
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(placeSheetMarkButton, savePlaceSheetPointAsPlace, 'Fehler beim Speichern des Ortes:', 'Ort konnte nicht gespeichert werden.');
      bindClickIfPresent(placeSheetAutonomousButton, sendPlaceSheetPointToAutonomous);
      attachPlaceSheetDragGestures();
      if (waypointSuggestionsElement) {
        waypointSuggestionsElement.addEventListener('scroll', function () {
          if (state.waypointSuggestions.length > 0) {
            renderWaypointSuggestions();
          }
        });
      }
      if (routeSuggestionsElement) {
        routeSuggestionsElement.addEventListener('scroll', maybeRenderMoreSuggestionsOnScroll);
      }
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(deleteSelectedButton, deleteSelectedItems, 'Fehler beim Löschen der ausgewählten Einträge:', 'Einträge konnten nicht gelöscht werden.');
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(deleteAllButton, deleteAllItems, 'Fehler beim Löschen aller Einträge:', 'Einträge konnten nicht gelöscht werden.');
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(syncSavedItemsButton, syncSavedItemsManually, 'Fehler beim Synchronisieren der Orte und Routen:', 'Orte und Routen konnten nicht synchronisiert werden.');
      bindClickIfPresent(previousDeviceButton, function () { switchDevice(-1); });
      bindClickIfPresent(nextDeviceButton, function () { switchDevice(1); });
      bindClickIfPresent(toggleDeviceViewButton, toggleDeviceViewMode);
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(dropDeviceButton, removeSelectedDevice, 'Fehler beim Entfernen des Geräts:', 'Gerät konnte nicht entfernt werden.');
      bindClickIfPresent(mapToolbarCollapseButton, function () {
        setMapToolbarCollapsed(!document.documentElement.classList.contains('map-toolbar-collapsed'));
      });
      bindClickIfPresent(panelToggleButton, toggleControlPanel);
      bindClickIfPresent(searchToggleButton, toggleSearchPanel);
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(locateToggleButton, centerOnCurrentLocation, 'Fehler bei Standortermittlung:', 'Standort konnte nicht ermittelt werden.');
      bindLocateHardRefreshLongPress(locateToggleButton);
      bindClickIfPresent(mobileAppToggleButton, function () { window.location.href = '/mobile/'; });
      bindClickIfPresent(byId('cacheMapRegionBtn'), function () {
        openOfflineMapSheet();
      });
      bindClickIfPresent(byId('offlineMapCloseBtn'), function () {
        closeOfflineMapSheet();
      });
      bindClickIfPresent(byId('offlineMapModeViewBtn'), function () { setOfflineMapMode('view'); });
      bindClickIfPresent(byId('offlineMapModeSearchBtn'), function () { setOfflineMapMode('search'); });
      bindClickIfPresent(byId('offlineMapModeRouteBtn'), function () { setOfflineMapMode('route'); });
      bindClickIfPresent(byId('offlineMapViewDownloadBtn'), function () {
        startOfflineMapViewDownload();
      });
      bindClickIfPresent(byId('offlineMapSearchDownloadBtn'), function () {
        startOfflineMapSearchDownload();
      });
      bindClickIfPresent(byId('offlineMapRouteDownloadBtn'), function () {
        startOfflineMapRouteDownload();
      });
      bindClickIfPresent(byId('offlineMapCancelBtn'), function () {
        cancelOfflineMapDownload();
      });
      bindClickIfPresent(byId('offlineMapClearAllBtn'), function () {
        clearAllOfflineMapRegions();
      });
      bindClickIfPresent(byId('offlineDebugVerifyBtn'), function () {
        refreshOfflineDebugInfo('verify');
      });
      bindClickIfPresent(byId('offlineDebugCheckJobsBtn'), function () {
        refreshOfflineDebugInfo('recover');
      });
      bindClickIfPresent(byId('offlineDebugRefreshBtn'), function () {
        refreshOfflineDebugInfo();
      });
      bindClickIfPresent(byId('offlineDebugRepairBtn'), function () {
        refreshOfflineDebugInfo('repair');
      });
      const offlineMapRefreshViewEstimate = function () { updateOfflineMapEstimate(); };
      const offlineMapViewProfileInput = byId('offlineMapViewProfile');
      if (offlineMapViewProfileInput) offlineMapViewProfileInput.addEventListener('change', offlineMapRefreshViewEstimate);
      const offlineMapSearchProfileInput = byId('offlineMapSearchProfile');
      const offlineMapRefreshSearchEstimates = async function () {
        var token = ++offlineMapSearchEstimateToken;
        await Promise.all(offlineMapPlannedRegions.map(async function (region) {
          var profile = offlineMapProfileValue('offlineMapSearchProfile');
          var zoomRange = resolveOfflineMapZoomRange('region', region.bounds, profile);
          region.profile = profile;
          region.zoomMin = zoomRange.zoomMin;
          region.zoomMax = zoomRange.zoomMax;
          var estimate = await resolveOfflinePlanEstimate({
            bounds: region.bounds,
            zoomMin: region.zoomMin,
            zoomMax: region.zoomMax,
            profile: profile,
            downloadKind: 'region',
            styleConfig: region.styleConfig
          });
          if (token !== offlineMapSearchEstimateToken) return;
          applyOfflineEstimateToRegion(region, estimate);
        }));
        if (token !== offlineMapSearchEstimateToken) return;
        renderOfflineMapPlannedList();
      };
      if (offlineMapSearchProfileInput) offlineMapSearchProfileInput.addEventListener('change', offlineMapRefreshSearchEstimates);
      const offlineMapRouteProfileInput = byId('offlineMapRouteProfile');
      if (offlineMapRouteProfileInput) offlineMapRouteProfileInput.addEventListener('change', refreshOfflineRoutePanel);
      const offlineMapSearchInput = byId('offlineMapSearchInput');
      if (offlineMapSearchInput) {
        offlineMapSearchInput.addEventListener('input', handleOfflineMapSearchInputChange);
        offlineMapSearchInput.addEventListener('focus', function () {
          if (offlineMapSearchInput.value && offlineMapSearchInput.value.trim().length >= 2) {
            handleOfflineMapSearchInputChange();
          }
        });
        offlineMapSearchInput.addEventListener('keydown', function (event) {
          if (event.key === 'Escape') { clearOfflineMapSearchSuggestions(); offlineMapSearchInput.blur(); }
        });
      }
      bindClickIfPresent(byId('offlineMapPlannedClearBtn'), function () {
        if (offlineMapPlannedRegions.length && !window.confirm('Alle ausgewählten Regionen entfernen?')) return;
        clearAllOfflineMapPlannedRegions();
      });
      document.addEventListener('click', function (event) {
        var suggestionsBox = byId('offlineMapSearchSuggestions');
        var searchInputEl = byId('offlineMapSearchInput');
        if (!suggestionsBox || suggestionsBox.classList.contains('hidden')) return;
        if (suggestionsBox.contains(event.target) || (searchInputEl && searchInputEl.contains(event.target))) return;
        clearOfflineMapSearchSuggestions();
      });
      try { attachOfflineMapDownloadNativeListeners(); } catch (_) {}
      try { syncOfflineMapDownloadStateFromNative(); } catch (_) {}
      document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', function () {
        if (!document.hidden) {
          try { syncOfflineMapDownloadStateFromNative(); } catch (_) {}
          try { refreshOfflineMapList(); } catch (_) {}
          try { refreshOfflineDebugInfo('recover'); } catch (_) {}
        }
      });
      window.addEventListener('resize', updateDialogLayout);
      window.addEventListener('orientationchange', function () {
        setTimeout(updateDialogLayout, 120);
      });
      updateInlineClearButtonVisibility();
      updateRouteActionVisibility();
      updateRouteLetterBadgesVisibility();
      updateWaypointButtonState();
      updateDialogLayout();
      syncNavigationCenterButtonVisibility();
      if (placeSheetNavRemainingElement) {
        placeSheetNavRemainingElement.textContent = '—';
      }
      initNativeProfileUi();
    }

    window.addEventListener('load', function () {
      ensureMapLibreRtlTextPlugin().catch(function (rtlError) {
        console.warn('MapLibre RTL text plugin konnte nicht vorbereitet werden:', rtlError);
      });
      initMap();
      if (window.MOBILE_LOCAL_ASSETS) logMobileStartup('local assets loaded');
      initializeMapUiControls();
      startMapBackgroundStartupTasks();
    });
    })();
  </script>
</body>
</html>

Tracking MQTT Quellen
info: OwnTracks ist MQTT-Quelle 1 auf owntracks/+/+ mit source=owntracks. Mobile-App ist MQTT-Quelle 2 auf mobile_app/+/+ mit source=mobile_app. Beide Quellen laufen in dieselbe Tracking-Logik und verwenden lat/lon/timestamp/speed/heading/accuracy/source/trackId/sequenceNumber. Die Mobile-App sendet nur finale displaySettings-Punkte; Raw-GPS wird nicht an den Server gesendet.

name: Capacitor Install Hinweis
template:
GPS Tracking App

Installiere die Android-App — sie öffnet dieselbe Web-Karte wie im Browser (/map). Profil und GPS-Einstellungen nur in der App.

Android App installieren Zur Web-Karte
APK noch nicht auf dem Server. Bitte zuerst in Android Studio bauen und auf den Pi kopieren.

Installation auf Android

  1. Button Android App installieren tippen.
  2. Download bestätigen (Mobile-Tracking.apk).
  3. APK öffnen. Falls nötig: Unbekannte Apps installieren für den Browser erlauben.
  4. App starten — dieselbe Karte wie /map. Profil-Button oben rechts (nur in der App).
  5. Server/Tailscale: https://raspberrypi.tail47e91f.ts.net

Server

Tracking: MQTT mobile_app/<user>/<device> · Tailscale muss auf dem Handy aktiv sein.
